We are a fast-growing finance software company dedicated to delivering innovative solutions that transform the way businesses manage their finances. We thrive on precision, efficiency, and ambition—and we’re looking for someone who shares that mindset.

s, and phone communications professionally and efficiently

title: Product Research & Market Analyst (Helium10, Keepa, Junglescout)
description:
About Us

We're a pan-Asian sourcing consultancy connecting Western clinics and brands with manufacturers across China, Korea, Japan, and the Philippines. We specialize in professional skincare, cosmetics, and wellness products.



We're expanding into three parallel channels:



Distribution — brands are approaching us to distribute their products in Western markets

White Label — sourcing existing formulations from Asian manufacturers and branding for our clients

Custom Formulation — working with OEM/ODM manufacturers to develop proprietary products



We need someone who can identify which products are worth pursuing across all three channels.



The Role

You'll be our product intelligence engine — researching market demand, analyzing competitive landscapes, and producing actionable recommendations on which products to distribute, white label, or develop.

This is NOT a PPC or advertising role. This is research, analysis, and opportunity identification.



Core Responsibilities

Amazon & Marketplace Analysis



*Identify winning and trending products in skincare, beauty, and wellness categories using tools like Helium 10, Jungle Scout, or Keepa

*Analyze Best Seller Rank (BSR), revenue estimates, review velocity, and pricing trends

*Identify gaps and underserved niches (high demand + low competition + weak listings)

*Track seasonal trends and emerging ingredient/product trends (e.g., peptide serums, EMS devices, LED masks)



Distribution Evaluation



When brands approach us for distribution, assess their product-market fit for Western markets (US, Australia, Singapore, UAE)

Evaluate brand strength, existing Amazon presence, pricing positioning, and competitive landscape

Produce a GO / NO-GO recommendation with supporting data



White Label & Custom Formulation Opportunity Assessment



Identify product categories where white label or custom formulation offers better margins than distribution

Estimate landed cost vs. market price to model margin potential

Research existing OEM/ODM capabilities from our supplier network (China, Korea, Japan, Philippines)

Flag formulation trends worth developing (e.g., "glass skin" serums, exosome skincare, cica products)



Competitive Intelligence



Monitor competitor brands, new product launches, and pricing shifts

Track Amazon algorithm changes, category trends, and review patterns

Build and maintain a product opportunity pipeline with scoring/ranking





What You'll Deliver (Weekly)



Product Opportunity Report — 3-5 vetted product opportunities ranked by potential, with data backing each recommendation

Brand Evaluation Briefs — When brands approach us, a 1-page assessment with GO/NO-GO recommendation

Trend Alerts — Quick flags on emerging ingredients, viral products, or category shifts worth watching

Competitive Snapshots — Monthly overview of competitor movements in our key categories





Required Skills & Experience

Must Have:



2+ years experience in Amazon product research or e-commerce market analysis

Proficiency with product research tools (Helium 10, Jungle Scout, Keepa, or similar)

Understanding of BSR, revenue estimation, keyword demand analysis, and review analysis

Ability to model basic unit economics (landed cost, margin, breakeven)

Strong written communication — you'll produce reports, not just spreadsheets

Self-directed and comfortable working asynchronously



Strong Preference:



Experience in beauty, skincare, cosmetics, or wellness product categories

Understanding of white label vs. private label vs. custom formulation business models

Familiarity with sourcing from Asia (China, Korea, Japan) — manufacturing costs, MOQs, lead times

Experience evaluating brands for distribution or retail partnerships

Knowledge of FDA cosmetic regulations or international cosmetic compliance (bonus, not required)



Tools You Should Know (some or all):



Helium 10 (Black Box, Cerebro, Magnet)

Jungle Scout or similar

Keepa / CamelCamelCamel

Google Sheets / Excel for data modeling

Amazon Brand Analytics (if you've had seller access)

------------------------

How to Apply

Please include:



A brief intro — who you are and why this role fits your experience

Tool experience — which product research tools you've used and for how long

A sample analysis — Pick any skincare or beauty product currently in Amazon's top 100 for its subcategory. In 3-5 bullet points, tell us:



What's the estimated monthly revenue?

Who are the top 3 competitors?

Is there a white label or private label opportunity here? Why or why not?

What would you recommend we do with this product (distribute, white label, skip)?





Availability — hours per week (time slots and approximate hours) and timez
Type: Part-time (potential to scale as needed)

Hours: 10-15 hrs/week to start, scaling to 20+



Location: Remote (any timezone, async-friendly)

Communication: Slack + weekly async check-in

Start: Immediate

title: Video Editor/Graphic Designer
description:
Location: Remote (Work from Home)

Salary: PHP 350 – 500 per hour

Employment Type: Part-time

Required Experience: 1-2 years



About Sparkblaze Digital



Sparkblaze Digital is a digital marketing and advertising company that helps businesses grow through data-driven online advertising. Our team focuses on creating and managing paid media campaigns that generate high-quality leads and measurable results for our clients.

We specialize in platforms such as Google and Meta Ads, helping companies reach the right audience at the right time. One of the industries we support is education and consulting services, where we run lead generation campaigns that connect families with premium academic preparation services. We are a fully remote team, and we are looking for motivated Filipino talent who want to grow their career in digital advertising.



What You'll Do



As a Video Editor, you will help create engaging video content used for advertising, marketing, and social media campaigns.

Your responsibilities may include:

• Editing raw footage into engaging short-form videos

• Adding captions, transitions, music, and basic graphics

• Repurposing long-form videos into shorter clips for social media

• Optimizing videos for platforms like
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

• Collaborating with the marketing team to produce content for campaigns

• Organizing video assets and maintaining editing files



What Are We Looking For?



We are looking for someone who has basic to intermediate video editing skills and is passionate about creating engaging digital content.



You should have experience or knowledge in:

• Video editing using tools like Adobe Premiere Pro, CapCut, or similar software

• Editing short-form videos for social media

• Adding captions, simple motion graphics, and transitions

• Understanding pacing, storytelling, and viewer engagement

• Optimizing videos for social media formats and platforms

• Basic audio editing and background music integration



You do not need to be an expert, but you should be comfortable learning new editing techniques and improving your skills.



Who Are We Looking For?



We are looking for an A-player — a results-driven professional who takes pride in delivering performance.



• A recent graduate or early-career creative professional

• Has 1–2 years of experience in video editing or content creation

• Creative and has a good eye for storytelling and visuals

• Familiar with social media video trends

• Detail-oriented and organized

• Able to work remotely and meet deadlines

• Interested in building a long-term career in digital content and marketing



Why Join Sparkblaze Digital



• Fully remote work setup

• Competitive hourly pay

• Opportunity to work on real marketing campaigns

• Build a strong video editing portfolio

• Work with a growing digital marketing team



If you're passionate about video editing, digital content, and creative storytelling, we would love to hear from you.

Apply now and start your career with Sparkblaze Digital.



Application date: 23rd March – 23rd April 2026

About Sparkblaze Digital

Ideal Candidate Profile

Due to a period of development and growth LifeStyle are now looking to recruit a number of experienced Administrators and particularly those that have excellent client communication skills to join their dedicated and close-nit team.



Who are we:



LifeStyle are probably North Bristol's most active Letting & Estate Agents. We have been serving the local area for over 30 years and have established relationships with clients, partners and tenants.



We take care of over 1000 Landlords with approximately 3000 units that result in a fair number of daily rent payments that require processing.



We pride ourselves on having family roots and our staff turnover is extremely low. We are a team. We work hard, respect each other and enjoy the journey - together!



Responsibilities of the role:



Control the day to day elements of the property referencing process - ensuring prospective tenants are eligible for the property they wish to rent.



Liaising with tenants and landlords.



Operating different cloud based systems to ensure tenants are legal, eligible and insured for the property they wish to let.



You will be timely and not afraid of dealing with clients on the telephone or
.



You will be working to constant deadlines to ensure people can move in to their property.



What we are looking for:



Confident and client focused, clear speaking professional that is able to work at pace in a fast moving environment and to deadline.

An accomplished team player, who has a strong work ethic and wants to do a great job!

Highly organised with the ability to prioritise and multi task.

Meticulous and accurate with impeccable attention to detail.

Confident communicator with a good telephone manner.

Building relationships with people internally and externally with come naturally to you.

Most importantly - our roots are in a family run business. It is the core of LifeStyle.

We operate morally, ethically and lovingly as one big family with the respect and care for each other and our clients.



We are always on the look out for like-minded individuals. We believe it's what makes us who we are !

title: URGENT: Hiring "AI Influencer" Video Creator/Editor ( Veo3, CapCut, HeyGen, ElevenLabs etc. )
description:
Please read the ENTIRE description before applying! :)



Our current candidate may NOT continue due to his personal life problems so we're now ONLY looking for VERY dedicated members with experience in CapCut and other AI tools mentioned. This opportunity is seriously much better than it sounds at first glance!







A few words about us:



Hey! We are Organic Media, a micro-agency creating and distributing educational and engaging AI-generated short-form videos for e-commerce brands, mainly in the pet niche.



You’ll work directly with our amazing manager ( 20 years old from Europe, with over 3 years of real experience in this exact space ), who has personally prepared step-by-step tutorials on Loom to teach you everything from the ground up.

No confusion. No guessing. No wasted time. ( Most tea
mbers learned the workflow within a few days and are now working fully independently )







What kind of videos will you create?

Simple UGC-like short-form videos fully based on the provided scripts by us ( you might just need to tweak a few words if needed ) which look realistic and feel "natural" to the viewers on platforms like YouTube Shorts, Instagram or
. Some of them are silently advertising products at the end but the key is that it doesn't sound like an ad but rather a native short-form video which a real person/influencer would record with their iPhone. There are a few styles such as just a calm "sit down" video ( where there's only one image and the influencer would just talk for 2 minutes ) or other ones where there're a few "shots" of them with a few seconds each and the scenes change but it's really not difficult at all - just a few more generations and then connecting them in CapCut.





The process is straightforward:

Getting our scripts ready and approved, using your own creativity and generating high quality base images using tools like Nano Banana Pro, turning these images into video clips using platforms like Veo3, Kling or HeyGen and for voice ElevenLabs, cuts and trimming, other minor adjustments such as background audio effects if needed ( like supermarket background audio ). Whole process is 90% just creating the right images/video clips etc, we might not even do transitions or captions so there won't be much editing skill needed. Everything is shown clearly in the training.



You’ll be creating a lot of videos a day but these are not complex edits AT ALL. Difficulty level: 6/10 ( again, 80% is just generating the rate "input" images and later just animating them with voice. That's it )





Here are visual examples of what the videos look like ( NOT OURS ):

1. 
/reel/DTty7hsAHe_/

2. 
/reel/DT0R9KgDkuW/

3. 
/reel/DSc75hsDQV6/

4. 
/reel/DT8pDFngXfp/

5. 
/reel/DUOAHm3kY7P/



( In your application, let us know your thoughts, do you think you can easily recreate them - what tools would you use and why? )





Training & onboarding ( this is the biggest advantage )

Once hired, you will receive structured video tutorials. In total, we have a few hours available, though most people don’t need all of it. The workflow is clear so no missing steps and no “figure it out yourself.”







Daily workload ( important )

You’ll create around 10 to 20+ videos per day ( 1 to 2 min long - we’ll start with a smaller amount and later increase it - won't negatively affect your monthly pay. We just want to make it easier for you to start - ultimately we'll be doing 20+ but making sure it's under 8-10h a day, at first it may take you longer and we may work harder - but once learned it easily becomes manageable ).

In reality, you'd have exactly 4 unique "AI influencers" but all of 4 them have the same scripts to use, you'd just need to change a few words to help with the context ( some of them might be talking only about "dogs" but some about "cats" so just need to change a few words to make it all make sense ) and you could use the same image prompts to generate almost identical images for each influencer. In reality it’s just 2 to 6 original videos PER INFLUENCER ( 4 of them ) and each with a very similar structure. Once trained, this is very manageable.



Your job is simple:

Create the videos, export them, and send them to us daily on 
.

That’s it. No posting. No account management. No stress.







Equipment & storage ( we make this easy )

You’ll need a good computer that can smoothly handle 1080p/light 4k video editing ( we’ll do 1080p but we’re going to work on multiple browser tabs ), a stable internet connection, and at least 16GB of RAM and 250GB+ of fast storage AVAILABLE. 1TB+ of SSD storage is preferred ( make sure it’s SSD and not old and slow HDD ).



If you need to buy storage/RAM ( for example, a 1TB SSD for around $100 ), we will refund you. This is required ONLY to save you time and speed up your workflow so you can be more efficient since it can be a couple GB of files a day ( you can later remove them after sending them to us. )



There also may be small subscription costs which you’d have to cover later if needed ( only around $10 a month ) for services like iCloud+ on iPhone/iPad or 
 Nitro - we refund those as well.







Tools & software ( HUGE upside )

You get FREE access to ALL paid tools that cost us hundreds of dollars per month, including:

- AI avatar tools like HeyGen or Veo3,

- Copywriting software like ChatGPT+, Grok or Claude,

- Editing software like CapCut PRO on Desktop,

- and our CUSTOM voice-over tools like ElevenLabs,

We provide logins, instructions, and full support.

( ALL OF THEM ARE WORTH $500+ MONTHLY )





Work environment & communication

You’ll have a private 1:1 chat with our manager and separate one to send your daily work in, work fully remotely through 
, receive clear feedback, and be treated as a long-term tea
mber, not disposable labor.

No stressful interviews. No micromanagement. No slow
s back and forth.







Responsibilities

- Adjust our scripts for the context

- Create videos from start to finish.

- Export and send them.

- Apply feedback and improve.

- Prepare scripts for the next day.

- Organize files properly.

- Communicate clearly.

- Hit deadlines without reminders.

That’s it. Simple, repetitive, and enjoyable.







This job is perfect for you if

You’re looking for long-term stability ( months or years ), you’re willing to learn, tech-savvy, creative, organized, and able to focus consistently. You already have video creation/editing experience. Already done some AI influencers related jobs and have good experience in: Google VEO3, Nano Banana Pro, HeyGen, ElevenLabs, CapCut PRO and other similar tools. Your computer can handle multiple tabs open ( A LOT of them ). You care about doing things properly, understand and speak English well, respond to messages quickly, and can work up to 6 days per week. You’re a young, talented, smart individual. You’re okay with a slightly heavier learning phase in the first week, you’re not afraid to ask questions, you’re reliable and honest about mistakes, and you either already have or can get an iPhone device ( used only for specific verification codes - refunded if needed. You can even get some used iPhone 8 for like $40 which works ).

We value dedication, reliability, and improvement more than raw talent.







This job is not for you if

You’re looking for quick money, disappear without communication, can’t focus, you’re on the older side and have never edited 1 video in your life, never played with the AI tools mentioned above, your computer can’t handle having multiple tabs open at the same time, have unstable internet, refuse feedback, rush work carelessly, avoid consistency, or cannot communicate in English.







Salary & payments

This is a full-time position, starting at 6 days per week, under 10 hours per day. ( ultimately under 8h once you become very efficient, which our manager will help you achieve and it won't impact your salary working less - quite the opposite! )



Starting salary ranges from around $440-$540/month based on experience, with the potential in the future to increase to $540+ based on a few factors such as performance, dedication, and quality of work.



Payments are monthly, in any currency or method available in your country. ( we’ll try )



To build trust, we’re offering to pay you $100 after the first week of working with us, with the remaining balance at month end. ( we already got scammed by other platforms so please respect this )



And remember, we pay $500+ dollars/month for paid tools so you can get them for FREE meaning your pay is actually 100% profit + refunds for any costs of yours. ( meaning in theory your total compensation is closer to $1000+ including tool access )







Hiring process (step-by-step)

- Please re-read this job post carefully and only then submit your application.

- In your job application, make sure to set the right title and answer every point.

- We will review it and reach out with an extra message if accepted.

- We'll send you a Google Form to fill out with contact info, etc.

- You’ll be invited to our 
 server and will get your 1:1 chat.

- You'll complete the training and take notes of it to learn everything.

- We'll give you access to all the tools and refund any required purchases.

- You'll officially start creating videos for Organic Media and get hired.

Simple and effective.







Why this is a real opportunity

No confusion, no guessing, no unpaid trials. You get real structured video training on Loom, real tools, real support, and real long-term growth - including potential promotion to coach or lead roles.

Some jobs may offer to pay more, but very few:

Teach you properly step by step, invest in you, respect your time, and give you paid tools for free.







How to apply (pay attention)

Your application title must start with the first word “ Influencer ”:

“ Influencer: (…) “

Applications without this will be ignored.





In your application, please include the following:

- Your detailed thoughts on the 5 videos linked above,

- Your past experience ( or none - that’s fine ),

- Links to any past work or simple edits,

- a detailed introduction about yourself,

- Your daily routine and availability,

- Why you want this opportunity and why we should pick you over someone else. ( why you’re special )

- and detailed answers to these 15 questions:



1. Do you have experience using CapCut on DESKTOP? How long have you been using it, and what type of videos do you usually create with it?

2. Which AI video tools have you personally used? ( For example: VEO, Kling, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4,5, HeyGen, Vozo, etc.) Briefly describe what you used them for.

3. When you watch short-form videos that reuse existing footage, are you able to recognize patterns such as hooks, pacing, avatar placement, and caption timing? Please explain how you notice these patterns.

4. We work with very detailed step-by-step SOPs that specify exactly which clips to use and how to assemble them. How do you typically work when instructions are extremely clear and structured?

5. If you are unsure about a task or something does not match the instructions, what do you do?

6. When generating AI videos, what are the most common problems you run into? (for example: bad lip sync, weird hands, low realism, wrong lighting, artifacts, etc.)

7. Would you say you’re more of a creative problem-solver who looks for shortcuts, loopholes, or ways around limitations, or someone who prefers to strictly follow rules and structure?

8. Have you ever had to regenerate the same AI scene or just an image multiple times to get a usable result? What usually goes wrong and how do you fix it?

9. When working with AI tools, do you prefer experimenting freely or strictly following a proven workflow? Why?

10. Tell us about your PC specs, how much RAM and Available Storage and is it a PC or laptop/Macbook. Also, do you already have an iPhone/iPad? If so, which model is it/generation?

11. Are you good at learning? Meaning if you want to learn something by for example, watching YouTube tutorials - do you usually rewatch it or take notes? Or just watch it once and try it yourself?

12. Describe exactly how you usually organize your project files when working on multiple videos at the same time.

For example: how you name folders, how you separate drafts vs finals, and how you avoid losing assets.

13. Take a look at the job post once again and find the 5 video example links we've included above. Watch all of them fully and let us know your overall thoughts, how do you think they were created - what tools would you use and why? Please cover the whole process in detail ( these aren't our videos but very similar )

14. What are your long-term plans or goals with this opportunity?

15. To confirm that you’ve read everything carefully, please tell us your favorite meal and dessert, as well as a restaurant in your country. Explain why someone from outside your country should absolutely try it. :)





Do not use ChatGPT or any AI to fully write your application. Be real, honest and detailed. We value spelling mistakes over perfect, AI generated responses. ( Yes, we can detect AI generated responses and it just isn't a good look on you )



You must also follow our Instagram: ( 
/organicxmedia )







Final note

We are hiring ONLY 1 PERSON for this role and are focused strictly on long-term relationships ( months + )

If you are dedicated, reliable, and willing to learn, this can be a very comfortable long-term position. Good luck!

title: Junior Creative Strategist
description:
We're a fast-growing health & beauty e-commerce company looking for a sharp junior creative strategist to lead the thinking behind our ad content across multiple brands.



What You'll Do



You'll dive deep into our ideal customer profiles and customer psychology to understand what truly drives purchasing decisions. You'll research competitors, analyze winning ads, and develop creative concepts that our team brings to life. You'll write hooks, scripts, and angles for VSLs, UGC, AI ads, and short-form ads, then track performance and iterate based on data. You're the bridge between what's working in the market and what our editors and designers produce.



What We Need



* Proven experience in creative strategy for e-commerce or direct response brands

* Strong ability to research and deeply understand target audiences, their pain points, desires, and buying triggers

* Deep understanding of Meta and Google/YT ad ecosystems

* Ability to research, analyze, and reverse-engineer winning ad creatives

* Strong copywriting skills including hooks, scripts, CTAs, and advertorial angles

* Data-driven mindset with a focus on ad performance and knowing what to test next

* Fluent in English, both written and spoken

* Organized, deadline-driven, and comfortable managing multiple brands at once

* Self-motivated with a habit of bringing strategies and ideas to the table rather than waiting for direction



Nice to Have



* Experience in the health, beauty, or supplement space

* Understanding of the full funnel from ad creative through landing page to conversion



To Apply



Send us a brief intro, examples of ad concepts or campaigns you've developed, and any results you can share. We want to see how you think, not just what you've made.

title: YouTube Graphic Designer
description:
About Viral Vault Studios:

Viral Vault Studios is a digital content creation company dedicated to producing educational and entertaining videos on YouTube. Our mission is to make online learning fun and engaging by creating content that captivates and informs global audiences. We focus on high-quality faceless YouTube content across niches like anime recaps, celebrity health, and more.



We’re looking for a skilled and detail-oriented Graphic Designer who can create visually compelling and high-converting designs, especially for YouTube.



This role is for someone who can execute fast, think creatively, and follow instructions precisely.



If you understand that design is not just about aesthetics but about performance—we want to work with you.



IMPORTANT – READ BEFORE APPLYING!



To be considered for this role, you MUST complete the following:

- Submit your updated resume

- Provide a portfolio or sample work (thumbnails, social media graphics, etc.)

- Complete the test task (instructions will be provided)



Note: Applications that do NOT include all three (resume, portfolio, AND completed test task) will be automatically disqualified and will not be reviewed.



Key Responsibilities:

- Design high-converting YouTube thumbnails

- Create graphics for social media (YouTube, Instagram, TikTok)

- Follow references and replicate styles accurately

- Ensure all designs align with brand identity and content strategy

- Collaborate with video editors and marketing team

- Deliver high-quality outputs on time with minimal supervision



Qualifications:

- Proven experience in graphic design (YouTube thumbnails preferred)

- Proficiency in Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or similar tools

- Strong understanding of marketing with composition, typography, and visual hierarchy

- Ability to follow instructions and brand guidelines strictly

- Fast turnaround without compromising quality

- Reliable internet and equipment

- Detail-oriented and responsive

title: Social Media Manager
description:
About Us:

Viral Vault Studios is a fast-growing company with a strong focus on building engaging digital communities through our social media business. In this role, you’ll primarily lead social media and branding initiatives, with the exciting possibility to also contribute to my other second business, Michaud CPA, an accounting firm. A unique opportunity to gain exposure across two industries, expand your skills, and make a meaningful impact across multiple business units. This is a full-time role that will start at 20–25 hours per week and gradually ramp up to 30-40 hours per week as production and campaigns increase, providing flexibility while scaling into the role.



What You’ll Do:

- Develop and execute end-to-end social media campaigns that drive engagement, growth, and brand awareness

- Manage a high-performing social media and content production team, including video editors, scriptwriters, and voice actors, ensuring smooth workflow and timely delivery

- Lead branding initiatives across multiple channels, aligning with marketing and business objectives

- Collaborate with cross-functional teams to integrate social media strategies into broader marketing plans.

- Oversee content calendars, scheduling, and publishing across platforms including Instagram,
, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube

- Monitor, analyze, and report on social media performance metrics to inform strategy

- Stay ahead of trends, platform updates, and best practices in social media, branding, and digital marketing



Qualifications:

- 4+ years of experience in social media management, digital marketing, or related fields

- Proven experience managing a creative team for digital/video content production (video editors, scriptwriters, voice actors).

- Strong project management skills; experience leading multiple campaigns simultaneously

- Expertise in branding, campaign management, and audience engagement strategies

- Proficient with tools like Slack, Clockify, and Asana for team communication, tracking, and project management

- Knowledgeable of SEO, content marketing, and social media analytics tools

- YouTube experience is a plus, including video content strategy, optimization, and community engagement

- Exceptional communication, storytelling, and organizational skills



If you're interested in applying, please attach an accessible link of your updated resume / portfolio and put on the subject "Your Name - Applying for SMM"

title: Bookkeeper / Accountant
description:
Bookkeeper / Accounting Assistant – First Class Media 



**Hours:** Part-Time (est. 5–15 hrs/month, flexible)

**Compensation:** $3-7/hr USD (based on experience)

**Start Date:** ASAP



---



About Us



First Class Media is a US-based drone media company specializing in high-quality photography and videography for real estate clients. We produce property content that helps agents and developers market their listings at the highest level. We're a small, fast-moving operation and we're looking for a reliable accounting professional to help us stay financially organized as we grow.



--



Role Overview



We're hiring a remote bookkeeper/accounting assistant to manage our books, help with tax preparation, and generate regular financial reports. This is a part-time, ongoing role with potential to grow. You'll work directly with the owner and have a high degree of independence — we need someone trustworthy, detail-oriented, and proactive.



---



Responsibilities



- Record and categorize all business transactions (income, expenses, transfers)

- Reconcile bank and credit card statements monthly

- Maintain the general ledger and chart of accounts

- Track outstanding invoices and accounts receivable

- Organize and document deductible business expenses

- Assist with quarterly estimated tax preparation (US-based filings)

- Track equipment, gear, and vehicle-related deductions

- Generate monthly and on-demand financial reports

- Issue 1099s to contractors as needed



---



Reports You'll Own



- Profit & Loss Statement (monthly)

- Cash Flow Statement

- Expense Breakdown by Category

- Revenue by Client

- Accounts Receivable Aging

- Tax Summary Report (quarterly/annually)

- Budget vs. Actual



---



Requirements



- Proven experience in bookkeeping or accounting (2+ years preferred)

- Proficiency in **QuickBooks Online**, **Xero**, or **Wave**

- Solid understanding of US tax basics for small businesses (self-employment, deductions, 1099s)

- Strong attention to detail and ability to work independently

- Reliable internet connection and availability for occasional video check-ins

- Excellent written English communication



---



Nice to Have



- Experience working with US-based clients or businesses

- Filipino CPA license or equivalent certification

- Familiarity with service-based or creative industry businesses



---



We look forward to hearing from you!

title: AI Chatbot Developer
description:

We're seeking an expert Chat AI Developer to join our growing development team. This is a unique opportunity to work with cutting-edge Chat AI technology, building custom conversational flows that directly impact real estate businesses across North America.



As our Chat AI Developer, you'll be responsible for designing, building, testing, and maintaining sophisticated Chat AI systems using CloseBot and GoHighLevel. You'll work closely with our CEO, Chief of Product, Voice AI Developer, and development team to create custom chat experiences that solve real business problems for our clients.



We're scaling rapidly - onboarding 3 new clients per week - which means you'll have the opportunity to work on diverse, challenging projects while being part of a high-growth company.



You're the perfect fit if you:

   - Love solving technical problems - You get satisfaction from debugging, troubleshooting, and finding elegant solutions

   - Are extremely detail-oriented - You notice small bugs, edge cases, and potential issues others miss

   - Thrive on precision and accuracy - You take pride in writing clean, well-documented workflows that function flawlessly

   - Are methodical and patient - You can work through complex technical challenges systematically without getting frustrated

   - Follow processes religiously - You understand that consistency, documentation, and standards are critical in development

   - Are analytical and logical - You use data and systematic thinking to diagnose problems and implement solutions

   - Work well independently - You don't need constant supervision but collaborate effectively when needed

   - Are naturally curious - You want to understand how things work and are always learning new technologies

   - Value quality over speed - You'd rather build it right than build it fast

   - Are a team player - You collaborate well, communicate clearly, and support your teammates



Key Responsibilities



Chat AI Development (50% of time)

   - Design, build, and deploy custom Chat AI solutions using CloseBot and GoHighLevel

   - Build sophisticated conversation flows for lead qualification, appointment scheduling, and property detail gathering

   - Develop automated workflows that integrate with CRMs, calendars, and marketing systems

   - Configure AI chat behaviors optimized for real estate wholesalers and house flippers

   - Implement complex conditional logic and multi-step qualification processes

   - Create custom integrations with GoHighLevel and third-party platforms

   - Handle API integrations, webhooks, and workflow automations

   - Work with LLMs (GPT-4, Claude, etc.) to optimize chat performance



Testing & Quality Assurance (25% of time)

   - Test conversation flows, edge cases, trigger conditions, and failure scenarios

   - Troubleshoot and debug issues across all Chat AI implementations

   - Perform quality assurance on new features and updates

   - Ensure all Chat AI solutions meet our quality standards before launch

   - Test integrations with GoHighLevel, CRMs, and external systems

   - Maintenance & Support (25% of time)

   - Monitor and maintain existing client Chat AI systems

   - Fix bugs and resolve technical issues promptly

   - Handle assigned support tickets from clients and internal team

   - Upgrade and optimize current client implementations

   - Respond to urgent technical issues with quick resolution

   - Continuously improve chat flows based on performance data



Documentation & Collaboration

   - Build comprehensive SOPs and technical documentation for all solutions

   - Document custom workflows, integrations, and automation processes

   - Collaborate with account management team to customize solutions for new clients

   - Attend daily team syncs at 10:00 AM ET Monday-Friday

title: Onboarding Lead/Project Manager (CINC Systems)
description:
CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager

Sliceo – Remote (Philippines) | Full-Time | U.S. Eastern Hours



About Sliceo

Sliceo is a technology and operations consulting firm focused exclusively on the community association management (CAM) industry. We help property management companies modernize their technology stack, workflows, and operational infrastructure.



Our work includes:

• Implementing and optimizing property management systems such as CINC Systems

• Designing and integrating software ecosystems for management companies

• Workflow automation and AI enablement

• IT coordination, cybersecurity planning, and system integrations

• Operational process design and training

• Supporting management companies through growth, technology transitions, and modernization



Sliceo works closely with proptech providers, integration partners, and management companies to ensure technology implementations are successful and that clients fully adopt and benefit from their systems.



As Sliceo expands, we are building a world-class onboarding and implementation team to support management companies implementing the CINC platform and related integrations.



Position Overview

The CINC Platform Onboarding Lead / Implementation Project Manager is responsible for coordinating and supporting the successful implementation of CINC Systems and related technology solutions for management company clients.



This role works directly with:

• Management company leadership and operational teams

• Sliceo implementation and consulting teams

• CINC Systems implementation teams

• Integration and technology partners

• Sliceo development and IT teams



You will serve as the primary project coordinator and onboarding guide during system implementation, ensuring that clients successfully configure, adopt, and integrate their technology platform.



This role is highly client-facing and requires strong project management, communication, and organizational skills.



Key Responsibilities

Implementation Project Management

• Coordinate CINC platform implementations for management company clients

• Manage implementation timelines, milestones, and deliverables

• Track progress across multiple concurrent implementation projects

• Ensure successful project completion and client sign-off



Client Onboarding & System Configuration

• Work with clients to understand their current operational workflows

• Assist in designing and documenting best-practice workflows using CINC technology

• Support configuration of CINC modules including community tools, portals, and communication systems

• Coordinate onboarding for WebAxis, CINC Connect, homeowner/board portals, and other platform features



Data Migration Support

• Assist with migration of data from legacy systems into CINC

• Use Excel and data mapping tools to prepare, clean, and validate migration files

• Coordinate with technical teams to ensure accurate data transfers



Integration Coordination

• Work with Sliceo’s development and IT teams to support integration projects

• Help coordinate integrations between CINC and other software platforms

• Assist with rollout of partner technology solutions within the client’s tech stack



Training & Adoption

• Provide onboarding training and guidance to management company teams

• Support clients during early adoption of the platform

• Help create documentation and implementation SOPs

• Ensure clients are comfortable using their systems and workflows



Client Support & Issue Resolution

• Identify configuration issues or system errors during implementation

• Coordinate with technical teams to resolve issues

• Help ensure the client experience remains positive throughout the project lifecycle



Documentation & Project Tracking

• Maintain project documentation and implementation records

• Track tasks and milestones using Sliceo’s project management tools

• Maintain organized documentation within SharePoint and Zoho One systems



Required Skills & Experience

• 4+ years of experience implementing software for external clients or managing onboarding projects

• Experience working in client-facing project management roles

• Strong Excel skills, including data cleanup and migration preparation

• Excellent written and verbal communication skills

• Strong organizational and problem-solving abilities

• Ability to manage multiple projects simultaneously

• Ability to work independently and prioritize tasks without supervision

• Experience coordinating with multiple teams and departments



Preferred Experience

• Experience working with CINC Systems or similar property management platforms

• Experience in community association management (HOA/condo management)

• Experience implementing or supporting SaaS platforms

• Familiarity with property management software ecosystems

• Experience coordinating system integrations



Tools & Systems Used

You may work with tools such as:

• CINC Systems platform

• Excel and data migration tools

• Zoho One project management systems

• SharePoint documentation systems

• Time tracking tools

• Collaboration and implementation tracking software



Work Environment

• Fully remote position (Philippines-based)

• Full-time role working U.S. Eastern Time hours

• Work directly with U.S.-based leadership and clients

• Opportunity to grow into Senior Implementation Manager or Director of Implementations



What Success Looks Like

Within your first 90 days you will:

• Successfully support multiple client implementations

• Help coordinate system onboarding and training

• Manage implementation timelines and documentation

• Assist with data migration and system configuration

• Ensure clients are confident using their new platform



Compensation

Competitive compensation for experienced implementation specialists based in the Philippines.

Performance bonuses and advancement opportunities available.



How to Apply

Please submit:

1. Your resume

2. A short video introduction (2–3 minutes) explaining:

o your experience with software implementations

o your project management experience

o any experience with property management systems

title: CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)
description:
Job Title

CINC Systems Expert – Configuration, Modules & Automation (HOA / Condo)



READ THIS FIRST 

This role is for someone with deep, hands-on ownership of CINC Systems.

If your experience is limited to using CINC, assisting with setup, or following instructions created by someone else, do not apply.

We are specifically looking for someone who has built, configured, and owned multiple parts of CINC Systems in real HOA/Condo environments.



ROLE SUMMARY 

We are hiring a CINC Systems expert with a deep understanding of how CINC works end-to-end. You will be responsible for configuring, improving, and supporting multiple CINC modules, automations, workflows, and reporting structures.

This is not a narrow role. You are expected to understand how different modules interact and how configuration decisions impact operations, accounting, boards, and homeowners.



CORE RESPONSIBILITIES 

You will personally:

• Configure and maintain CINC Systems environments

• Set up, customize, and optimize multiple CINC modules, such as:

o     Violations

o     Work Orders / Maintenance

o     Accounting-related workflows

o    Owner & Board portals

o    Vendors and services

o    Reporting and dashboards

• Build and manage:

o    Automation rules

o    Triggers and workflows

o    Custom fields and layouts

• Support system launches, migrations, and cleanups

• Create clear documentation for system logic and configuration

• Troubleshoot complex CINC issues independently

• Act as a senior internal resource before escalating to CINC support



REQUIRED EXPERIENCE  (Non-Negotiable)

You must clearly demonstrate all of the following:

• Direct, hands-on experience building inside CINC Systems

• Experience configuring multiple CINC modules, not just one

• Strong understanding of how CINC behaves across:

o    Operations

o    Accounting

o    Compliance

o    Board and homeowner workflows

• Ability to explain why configuration and automation decisions were made

• Comfort owning systems without step-by-step instructions

If you have only “helped,” “assisted,” or “supported” CINC work created by others, this role is not a fit.



APPLICATION REQUIREMENTS 

Applicants should be prepared to:

• Submit a resume with their application

• Discuss systems they have personally built

• Explain automation decisions and tradeoffs

• Demonstrate ownership, not assistance

You will be asked to give real examples. General or vague answers will be disqualified.



WORKING CONIDTIONS 

• Full-time remote, Independent Contractor

• Flexible EST-aligned hours

o    Pre-launch: Flexible, provided deliverables and communication are met

o    Post-launch: Expected overlap with standard business hours (9–5 or 10–6 EST)

• Occasional weekend work during launch phases

o    Not frequent

o    Communicated in advance

• Time tracking required (Hubstaff)



Must have:

• Personal computer used exclusively for work

• Backup computer, internet, and power

• Quiet, professional workspace



Compensation & Growth

• $9/hour starting rate

• Hourly rate increases based on performance and contribution

• Long-term contractor relationship intended

• Opportunity to help shape systems, processes, and your own role as Sliceo grows

This role is designed for someone looking for long-term stability and ownership, not short-term task work.



CONFIDENTIALITY 

This role involves access to sensitive systems, internal strategy, and proprietary information. Strict confidentiality is required.



REQUIRED APPLICATION QUESTIONS 

Applicants must answer the following:

Describe your hands-on experience with CINC Systems.



Include:

1. Which CINC modules you personally configured or built

2. One automation or workflow you owned end-to-end

3. A system decision you made and why you made it

4. How many years have you used CINC Systems?



***Applications without a resume or without clear ownership examples will not be reviewed.

title: Senior Civil Site Development Drafter – US Commercial Projects (Remote, Full-Time)
description:
We are hiring an experienced Civil 3D drafter/designer to support U.S. commercial site development projects.



This is not an entry level drafting role. We are looking for someone who already knows how to produce high-quality commercial civil plan sets and can work confidently in AutoCAD Civil 3D with minimal supervision.



Experience matters more than degree or licensure. If you have strong hands-on experience drafting U.S. commercial site plans, we want to hear from you.



What you will do

 • Prepare complete commercial site civil plan sets

 • Draft and develop:

        • site layout plans

        • grading plans

        • utility plans

        • erosion control plans

        • plan/profile sheets for water, sewer, and paving

        • civil details and construction notes

 • Build and edit surfaces, profiles, alignments, and grading elements in Civil 3D

 • Assist with drainage layouts, stormwater exhibits, and drafting support for drainage reports

 • Prepare exhibits, redline revisions, permit revisions, and drawing updates

 • Support the team with drafting, estimating, quantity takeoffs, and other project-related tasks as needed

 • Maintain organized project files, CAD standards, and sheet setups

 • Help turn markups and direction from our team into clean, accurate, buildable plans



Must-have experience:

 • 5+ years of drafting/design experience in commercial site development

 • Strong AutoCAD Civil 3D skills

 • Real experience on U.S. commercial projects

 • Ability to produce grading plans, utility plans, and plan/profile sheets

 • Strong understanding of typical U.S. site development plan sets and commercial civil drafting standards

 • Able to read redlines, ask smart questions, and work independently

 • Good written English and reliable communication during work hours



Nice to have:

 • Experience with drainage reports or stormwater drafting support

 • Familiarity with tools such as HydroCAD, HEC-HMS, HEC-RAS, or ICPR

 • Experience with quantity takeoffs, estimating, or construction support

 • Residential subdivision work experience

 • EIT/PE is welcome, but not required



Important:

 • Degree is not required

 • License is not required

 • We care most about real experience, quality of work, speed, and accuracy



What success looks like in this role:

 • You can take a marked-up set and turn it into clean, organized sheets

 • You understand how commercial sites go together, not just how to draw lines

 • You catch drafting conflicts before they become problems

 • You can support a fast-moving team with drafting, takeoffs, revisions, and production work

 • You can work with minimal hand-holding and meet deadlines



Work schedule

 • 40 hours per week

 • Remote

 • Our office hours are 8:00 AM–5:00 PM Central Time. More overlap is preferred when possible, but we are flexible for the right candidate.



About us



We are a U.S.-based civil site development team focused on commercial projects. We offer a relaxed and friendly office environment and need a strong  drafter who can help us move projects forward with accurate plans, revisions, takeoffs, and general drafting support. This role is important to our day-to-day work and will directly support our internal team across multiple projects.



Benefits & employment

 • $1,500–$2,500/month, negotiated on experience

 • Full-time, 40 hours per week remote

 • Long-term opportunity with room to grow

 • This is a full-time employee role, with employment handled through an Employer of Record (EOR) and statutory benefits provided through the EOR



To apply



Please send:

 1. Your resume

 2. 2–3 sample projects, sheet examples, or links to redacted work samples you personally worked on

 3. The word GRADING in your application subject line so we know you read the full post



Screening questions:



Please answer these in your application:

 1. How many years of U.S. commercial site development experience do you have?

 2. What types of projects have you worked on: retail, industrial, multifamily, mixed-use, fuel station, office, residential,  etc.?

 3. Which parts of Civil 3D do you use confidently: surfaces, grading, profiles, alignments?

 4. Have you prepared grading plans, utility plans, and plan/profile sheets for U.S. jurisdictions?

 5. Have you worked from survey base files and coordinated internally with engineers or designers?

 6. Do you have experience with quantity takeoffs or estimating support?

 7. What is your expected monthly salary for full-time work?

title: Nederlandstalige WordPress Content Specialist
description:
Functiebeschrijving – Nederlandstalige WordPress Content Specialist



Doel van de functie

Je bent verantwoordelijk voor het creëren, optimaliseren en publiceren van kwalitatieve content in WordPress, met een sterke focus op SEO en AI-ondersteunde copywriting. Je werkt gestructureerd, zelfstandig en rapporteert duidelijk in Basecamp.



Taken en verantwoordelijkheden

Contentcreatie en publicatie

Je schrijft en publiceert blogs en webcontent in perfect Nederlands

Je gebruikt AI-tools zoals Claude.ai voor het genereren en optimaliseren van copy

Je vertaalt prompts naar kwalitatieve, menselijke en converterende teksten



SEO en optimalisatie

Je voorziet elke pagina en blog van correcte meta titles en meta descriptions

Je optimaliseert alt-tags, headings, interne links en structuur

Je denkt actief mee in zoekwoorden en contentopbouw



WordPress beheer

Je publiceert en structureert content in WordPress

Je zorgt voor een nette opmaak, correcte lay-out en gebruiksvriendelijke pagina’s

Je controleert of alles technisch en visueel correct staat



Rapportering en opvolging

Je rapporteert je werk en voortgang in Basecamp

Je werkt met duidelijke updates, zodat het team perfect zicht heeft op de status



Profiel

Je spreekt en schrijft perfect Nederlands (native niveau vereist)

Je bent gevestigd in de Filipijnen en werkt remote

Je hebt ervaring met WordPress

Je hebt sterke copywriting skills en gevoel voor structuur en leesbaarheid

Je kan zelfstandig werken en neemt verantwoordelijkheid voor je output

Je werkt nauwkeurig en hebt oog voor detail



Werkvolume

Gemiddeld 1 dag per week, met mogelijkheid tot uitbreiding bij goede samenwerking



Wie is hiervoor geschikt

Dit profiel past ideaal bij iemand die eerder werkte als content marketeer, SEO-copywriter of WordPress content manager

Bij voorkeur iemand die al ervaring heeft met Europese klanten of Nederlandstalige content

Sterk in zelfstandig werken, zonder constante opvolging



Resultaatverwachting

Content die direct publiceerbaar is

SEO-technisch correct opgebouwd

Minimale revisies nodig

Heldere en gestructureerde communicatie in Basecamp
salary: 8–12 USD per hour depending on experienc

title: Book Keeper (Property specialist)
description:
The Property CFO is a rapidly growing accountancy firm established in 2026. Owned by Sam, the firm is seeking a proactive and detail-oriented bookkeeper to join the team and grow with the business.



You will be responsible for managing the bookkeeping for a portfolio of UK-based property businesses.



You will work closely with and report directly to, the UK-based team. Please note that this role is not client-facing.



The ideal candidate will be an excellent communicator with strong technical bookkeeping knowledge, particularly around VAT, client money, and accurate cost allocation.



Key Responsibilities

- General bookkeeping duties

- Take full responsibility for managing bookkeeping for a portfolio of clients

- Maintain accurate and timely accounting records

- Review your own work and collaborate with colleagues where required

- Report key financial information to management

- Support ad hoc financial reporting projects

- Allocate income and costs by individual property using tracking categories or equivalent

- Allocate shared or bulk costs, such as software or supplies, consistently across properties

- VAT and compliance

- Prepare and review VAT returns

- Ensure correct VAT coding for cleaning, maintenance, and software costs

- Software and systems

- Confident daily use of Xero

- Experience of working with Airbnb management companies 

- Experience handling client monies accounts

- Experience producing owners statements



To be considered for the role, you MUST SUBMIT:

- A PERSONALISED MESSAGE detailing your experience with Xero and property businesses

- A video introducing yourself

- Your availability for an interview over the next 7 days



This role is currently part time but we envisage this to lead to a full time role within the next 6 months

title: Creative Strategist (Copywriting) – DTC E-commerce
description:
We are looking for a highly creative and performance-driven Creative Strategist with a strong background in copywriting for DTC e-commerce brands. This role is ideal for someone who understands consumer psychology, writes compelling ad copy, and can turn ideas into high-converting campaigns across paid social platforms.



You will play a key role in ideating, scripting, and optimizing creative strategies that drive engagement, conversions, and revenue.



Key Responsibilities

Develop high-converting ad copy for platforms such as
, Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube

Create engaging hooks, scripts, and storytelling angles for UGC-style and performance creatives

Collaborate closely with video editors, designers, and media buyers to execute winning creatives

Research target audiences, competitors, and market trends to inform creative direction

Analyze ad performance and iterate on copy and messaging to improve results

Generate new creative concepts and testing ideas on a weekly basis

Align messaging with brand voice while optimizing for direct response and conversions

Requirements

3+ years of experience in DTC e-commerce, specifically in copywriting or creative strategy

Proven track record of writing high-performing ad copy for paid social

Strong understanding of direct response marketing and consumer psychology

Experience working with UGC content and performance-driven creatives

Ability to analyze metrics and translate data into actionable creative insights

Excellent English writing and communication skills

Experience working in a remote, fast-paced environment

Nice to Have

Experience scaling ads to 6–7 figure monthly spend

Familiarity with tools like Meta Ads Manager, TikTok Ads, Motion, or Triple Whale

Background in branding or storytelling alongside performance marketing

What We Offer

Fully remote role

Competitive salary (up to $3,000 USD depending on experience)

Opportunity to work with fast-growing DTC brands

Collaborative and performance-driven team environment

How to Apply



If you are passionate about crafting high-converting copy and scaling DTC brands, we would love to hear from you. Please share your portfolio, case studies, or examples of ad creatives you’ve worked on.

title: Multi-Platform Media Buyer / Ad Launcher — E-Commerce $250K+/month — Google Ads Priority
description:
We're hiring a Multi-Platfor
dia Buyer to launch and manage paid ads across 8+ platforms for a fast-growing e-commerce company doing $250K+/month.

Our
 Ads are already managed separately. Your job is everything ELSE. You'll be the person who opens new acquisition channels, launches campaigns worldwide, optimizes for ROAS, and scales what works — with full autonomy.

Priority #1 is Google Ads. Once Google is profitable and scaling, you move to the next platform, then the next. You don't wait for instructions — you launch, test, learn, optimize, repeat.



PLATFORMS YOU'LL MANAGE (in order of priority):



Google Ads (Search, Display, YouTube, Performance Max) — THIS IS YOUR FIRST MISSION

Microsoft / Bing Ads (duplicate Google campaigns, capture cheap traffic)

Taboola & Outbrain (native ads — "advertorial" style landing pages)

 / X Ads

Pinterest Ads

Reddit Ads

LinkedIn Ads (B2B campaigns targeting agencies and social media managers)

Any other platform you identify as high-potential — you have the freedom to propose and test





WHAT YOU'LL DO:



Launch Google Ads campaigns worldwide (multiple countries, multiple languages using AI for translations)

Build campaign structures from scratch: keyword research, ad copy, landing page recommendations, bid strategy

Monitor daily and optimize: kill what doesn't work, scale what does

If an ad account gets banned or suspended, you fix it or set up a new one — fast, no drama

Once Google is profitable, launch the next platform using the same methodology

Manage 5-10K budget per platform during testing phase, scale to 20-50K+ when profitable

Create native/advertorial-style landing pages for Taboola/Outbrain campaigns

Adapt ad copy and creatives for each platform's format and audience

Use AI tools (ChatGPT, DeepL, Claude) for translations and ad copy in multiple languages

Weekly report every Monday: spend, revenue, ROAS, CPA per platform, actions taken, plan for the week

Work independently — you don't need to be told what to do next





WHO YOU ARE:



2+ years managing Google Ads (Search + Shopping/PMax) with proven results

Experience with at least 2-3 other ad platforms (Taboola,
, Reddit, Pinterest, Bing — any combination)

You've managed $10K+/month in ad spend across platforms

Strong understanding of ROAS optimization, CPA targets, and scaling strategies

Comfortable launching campaigns in multiple countries and languages

You use AI tools daily for copywriting, translation, research

Resourceful problem-solver: ad account banned? You handle it, not us

Self-starter who thrives without micromanagement

Experience with e-commerce or digital products (not just lead gen)

Strong English communication





BONUS (not required but huge plus):



Experience with native advertising (Taboola/Outbrain) and advertorial funnels

Experience with Shopify and conversion tracking setup

Knowledge of social media growth / digital marketing niche

Experience launching ads in 5+ countries simultaneously

Google Ads certification





COMPENSATION:



Base: $800-$1,400/month depending on experience

Performance bonus: 5-10% of NET PROFIT generated from YOUR platforms (not
 — only the platforms you manage)

Example: if your Google Ads generates $10K profit in a month, you earn $500-$1,000 bonus on top of your base

Bonuses paid monthly based on verified ROAS data

As budget scales, your base and bonus scale too





HOW WE MEASURE SUCCESS:



Google Ads live and profitable within 14 days of starting

ROAS above 2.0 on Google within 30 days

Second platform launched within 30 days

3+ platforms running profitably within 90 days

Weekly report delivered every Monday — no exceptions

Ad account issues resolved within 24 hours





HIRING PROCESS:



Apply with a Loom video (see below)

Short interview (30 min)

NDA signed — we share full business details

Paid 1-week test: launch Google Ads on a $2-5K test budget and show results

30-day trial with full KPI tracking and performance bonuses





HOW TO APPLY:

Send a 3-minute Loom video where you:



Show your Google Ads dashboard — walk through a campaign you built, explain your structure, show the ROAS

Name the other platforms you've managed and your best result on each

Explain how you'd approach launching ads for an e-commerce product in 5+ countries simultaneously

Example 2:

websites, landing pages, or sections you have built or recreated

if you don’t have client work, you can also share practice projects

Best,

Eugen

title: LinkedIn Outreach Campaigns Manager: AEC Growth (Remote)
description:
We're hiring a LinkedIn Outreach Campaign Manager to run outreach campaigns for our ConTech (construction technology) startup clients. You will be working directly with the founder from IIT Bombay and using cutting-edge technology with lots of learning opportunities.





This is not a generic lead gen role. You'll be working exclusively with ConTech startups selling to construction companies — think software for GCs, project management tools, field tech, BIM solutions. You'll write messages that sound like they came from a human, not a bot. You'll be accountable for meetings booked, not just messages sent.





If you've run LinkedIn campaigns before and know what a 30?cept rate actually means, keep reading. 







What You'll Do







Day-to-day:







- Launch and manage LinkedIn outreach campaigns in HeyReach

- Monitor campaign performance daily (accept rates, reply rates, meetings)

- Write and test outreach message variations

- Respond to positive replies and hand off warm leads to clients

- Update campaign trackers and report metrics in Slack





Bi-weekly:







- Launch 1 new campaign per client every 2 weeks

- Analyze underperforming campaigns and implement fixes

- Join brief sync calls with clients (async-first, but some calls)

- Document what's working in our campaign playbook





Monthly:







- Generate 20+ qualified meetings per client

- Maintain 30%+ connection accept rate and 15%+ response rate

- Hit 5% meeting conversion (5 meetings per 100 leads)

- Propose optimizations based on A/B test results





---





What You'll Need







Required:





- 2+ years running LinkedIn outreach campaigns (agency or in-house)

- Proven metrics: you can quote your accept rates, reply rates, and meetings booked

- Strong written English — you'll write hundreds of outreach messages

- Process discipline — you document without being asked

- Comfortable with SaaS tools — HeyReach, Apollo, Slack, Google Sheets





Preferred:





- Experience with B2B SaaS, construction tech, or enterprise software industries

- Familiarity with HeyReach, Dripify, Expandi, or similar tools

- Background in SDR, BDR, or B2B SaaS sales

- Based in India, Philippines, Eastern Europe, or LATAM





What You'll Get







Compensation:





- Above market rate compensation

- Performance bonus incentives per meeting above monthly target

- Paid time off: 20 days/year





Work Environment:





- Fully remote, async-first culture

- Your timezone flexibility (overlap with US Eastern 2-3 hours/day)

- Direct access to founder — no middle management

- Clear metrics = clear expectations





Growth:





- Specialize in the AEC industry (growing, underserved market)

- Learn our outreach system (Claude, Apollo, HeyReach, Clay)

- Path to team lead as we scale





---





Who We Are





AEC Growth is a LinkedIn lead generation agency focused exclusively on ConTech startups. We help construction technology companies book meetings with GCs, subcontractors, developers, and construction executives.





We're not a generic marketing agency. We only work with ConTech startups selling to construction companies. 







Our approach:





- Value-first outreach (every message provides value, even if they never reply)

- Human-sounding messages (no AI slop, no "I hope this message finds you well")

- D100 methodology (deep personalization at scale)





---

How to Apply



Submit your application on this link:

title: B2B Sales & CRM
description:
Virtual Assistant – B2B Sales & CRM

Location: Remote   |   Type: Part-Time / Full-Time   |   Reports to: Founder / Sales Lead

Role Overview

We are looking for a detail-oriented Virtual Assistant to manage our B2B sales pipeline in Pipedrive. You will own the top of the funnel — researching prospects, maintaining deal stages, and running follow-up communications — so that senior tea
mbers are engaged only at the demo and proposal stage onward.

Responsibilities

Add and maintain contacts, companies, and deal records in Pipedrive CRM

Research prospects using LinkedIn and other tools to qualify fit before outreach

Execute follow-up
 sequences using approved templates

Schedule discovery calls and demos on the senior team's calendar

Prepare a short briefing note for each booked meeting

Monitor the pipeline for stalled deals and flag overdue follow-ups

Produce a brief weekly pipeline report

Deal Stage Handoff

The VA is responsible for Stages 1–5. Senior team involvement begins at Stage 6.



  1. New Lead — contact logged in Pipedrive

  2. Researched & Qualified — decision-maker and fit confirmed

  3. Outreach Initiated — first contact sent

  4. Follow-Up Sequence — 2–3 touches, responses logged

  5. Meeting Scheduled — call booked, brief prepared  ? VA handoff point

  6. Demo / Proposal onward — senior team takes over

Requirements

Minimum 5 year in a B2B sales support, SDR, or VA role

Direct hands-on experience with Pipedrive CRM (required)

Strong written English for professional outbound communications

Proficient with Gmail and Google Calendar

Self-managed, reliable, and comfortable working to targets

Nice to Have

Experience with LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Apollo, or similar prospecting tools

Familiarity with
 sequencing platforms (Lemlist, Outreach, etc.)



How to Apply

Send a short message (max 300 words) covering your CRM experience, a pipeline or follow-up process you have managed, and your availability. Please include the phrase "Pipedrive pipeline" in your application.

title: Freelance Video Editor (YouTube & Content Growth Focus)
description:
Company: Shot Blast Media

Location: Remote-based in the Philippines

Working Basis: Ongoing freelance contract

Commitment: Approx. 2–3 days per week

Start Date: ASAP

Budget: $350-$450 per month freelance retainer, depending on experience



Shot Blast Media is looking for a creative, versatile, and experienced Freelance Video Editor to support our team on an ongoing freelance basis, with an expected commitment of 5 days per week.



This is a fully remote, editor-focused role for someone who can confidently move between fast-paced social edits, brand content, founder-led personal brand content, and longer-form YouTube and storytelling-led edits.



You’ll be editing a wide range of content — from punchy vertical social videos with strong 3–5 second hooks, to longer-form brand stories, case studies, founder-led content, and YouTube videos. We’re looking for someone with strong creative instincts, solid technical ability, and a sharp eye for storytelling, but also someone who understands how content performs across platforms and can use that understanding to shape better edits over time.



The ideal person will be comfortable looking at YouTube performance data, understanding what it is saying, and using those insights to improve pacing, hooks, structure, retention, and overall content performance. This role is not just about editing well — it is about helping content perform better, travel further, and contribute to long-term channel growth.



You’ll work closely with our team remotely, collaborating across projects and agreed deadlines, with some overlap with UK working hours preferred for communication and feedback.



This freelance engagement has the potential to develop into a permanent role in future, depending on business needs and mutual fit.



What You’ll Be Working On



Short-form social media content for brands, especially vertical/portrait formats

Content creation edits for both client brands and founder-led personal brand content

Longer-form YouTube videos, brand stories, case studies, and documentary-style edits

Promotional, brand, and campaign videos

Repurposing existing long-form and archive content into fresh, platform-specific edits

Supporting the growth and development of YouTube channels through stronger editing, optimisation, and content repurposing

Helping build channel authority through consistent, strategic, high-quality content output



What You’ll Do



Edit engaging, high-quality video content across multiple platforms

Build strong 3–5 second hooks that capture attention quickly

Add energy, pace, and polish through strong editorial choices

Edit content for both brand channels and founder-led personal brands

Repurpose older and existing content into new edits for social, YouTube, and wider content distribution

Work closely with producers and creatives throughout the edit process

Incorporate basic motion graphics in After Effects, including titles, transitions, and callouts

Maintain consistency, quality, and technical accuracy across all deliverables

Manage multiple projects efficiently and hit deadlines

Organise project files clearly and work effectively within a remote workflow

Edit with YouTube best practice in mind, including pacing, structure, retention, and audience engagement



Support channel growth through a solid understanding of titles, thumbnails, watch time, audience retention, click-through rate, discoverability, and SEO fundamentals



Analyse YouTube content performance data and use insights to shape stronger edits over time



Understand audience behaviour and apply that understanding to hooks, storytelling, structure, and edit decisions



Help identify opportunities to improve channel performance, strengthen content strategy, and build long-term channel authority



Role Requirements

Experience & Background



5+ years’ editing experience in a production agency, post-production environment, or similar creative setting

Proven ability to edit both portrait social content and longer-form narrative or YouTube-led content

Experience editing for brands, campaigns, founder-led content, case studies, or documentary-style pieces

Strong understanding of pacing, story flow, and structure

Experience repurposing content strategically across multiple platforms

Experience supporting YouTube channels or content-led brands is highly desirable



Technical Skills



Highly proficient in Adobe Premiere Pro

Competent in After Effects for basic to intermediate motion graphics

Skilled at creating strong, attention-grabbing opening hooks

Good understanding of codecs, formats, aspect ratios, and delivery specs

Basic audio, colour, and finishing skills

Confident working remotely with shared drives, feedback rounds, and organised project workflows

Good understanding of YouTube workflows, channel optimisation, and SEO best practice

Able to work with existing content libraries and identify repurposing opportunities

Good understanding of YouTube analytics, performance data, and audience behaviour

Able to interpret data and turn it into practical editing improvements



Creative Skills



Ability to add flair, texture, and polish to edits

Strong sense of rhythm, timing, and emotion

Good visual design instincts

Ability to elevate storytelling through thoughtful editorial choices

Strong understanding of what makes content work across social, branded, and YouTube formats

Able to shape edits with both creative quality and platform performance in mind

Understands the nuance of crafting content based on data, audience behaviour, and platform insight, not just instinct alone



Soft Skills



Collaborative and comfortable working as part of a remote team

Able to take feedback well and make fast iterations

Highly organised with strong time-management skills

Detail-oriented, proactive, and reliable

Strong communication skills and comfortable working across time zones

Curious and proactive in using performance insights to improve future content



Best summary of the role



This role is ideal for an editor who can do more than just cut content together. We’re looking for someone who understands how to craft strong edits, how content performs, and how to use data and platform insight to improve results over time — particularly across YouTube, social media, brand content, and founder-led channels.

title: Long-term Video/Audio Editor: Transform Meditative Audio into Cinematic Course Modules
description:

This is not "social media" editing. This is about creating a deep, meditative, and cinematic learning experience. I am looking for a long-term premium partner—specifically a female collaborator with whom I can build a smooth, intuitive communication flow.



What You Will Do:

Audio First: Clean and polish my raw audio (noise removal, vocal warmth, and leveling). The voice is the most important part.



Visual Storytelling: Layer the audio with minimalist, high-definition B-roll, clean visuals



Course Creation: Convert 20-40 minute audio sessions into professional video modules.



Platform Ready: Export versions optimized for both desktop courses and mobile.



About You:

You have a "Hell Yes" attitude toward personal growth and spirituality. You don't just "edit"; you listen to the message.



You are an expert in video and audio editing and creation.



You understand that silence and pacing are just as important as the visuals.



You are looking for a long-term, part-time partnership, rather than one-off gigs.
