title: Affiliate Outreach Manager — Mass Cold Outreach in 5+ Languages — E-Commerce $250K+/month
description:
We're hiring an Affiliate Outreach Manager to recruit hundreds of content creators and influencers across the world to promote our e-commerce brand through an affiliate program.

Your job is simple but intense: contact thousands of people every week via
, Instagram DM, and TikTok DM. Propose our affiliate program. Follow up. Close the deal. Track the collaboration. Repeat.

This is a HIGH-VOLUME outreach role. You'll be sending
+ messages per day across multiple platforms and languages. If you love systems, automation, and talking to people at scale — this is your role.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

Mass outreach (80% of your time):



Receive organized contact lists from us: creators, influencers, pages in French, English, Italian, German, Spanish, Portuguese, Arabic

Contact every single person on the list via cold
, Instagram DM, and TikTok DM

Use personalized message templates (provided) adapted to each language using AI tools (ChatGPT, DeepL)

Send
+ outreach messages per day — this is non-negotiable

Follow up systematically: Day 1 initial message, Day 3 follow-up, Day 7 final follow-up

Track every single contact in a Google Sheet or CRM: name, platform, language, date contacted, response status, WhatsApp obtained



Conversation management (15% of your time):



When someone responds positively, explain the affiliate program details

Answer their questions using a FAQ document we provide

Obtain their WhatsApp number for closer relationship

If they're a big creator or need special terms, escalate to the founders

Nurture relationships: check in after they post, thank them, keep them active



Collaboration tracking (5% of your time):



When an affiliate posts a video or content promoting us, save the video and upload to Google Drive

Organize Drive folders by language/country

Log in the tracking sheet: creator name, platform, date posted, link to content, views/engagement

Track affiliate sales and commissions



KPIs (how we measure you):



Messages sent per day: minimum 150

Response rate: track and optimize (target 5-10%)

New affiliates signed per week: target 10-20

Videos/content posted by affiliates per week: track all

Follow-up completion: 100% — no contact falls through the cracks

Google Drive and tracking sheet always up to date

Daily report posted in Slack before end of day — every single day





TOOLS YOU'LL USE:



Instagram (DMs) — you'll manage outreach accounts

TikTok (DMs) — same

 outreach tool (Instantly, Smartlead, or similar) — for mass

Google Sheets — tracking everything

Google Drive — storing collab videos and content

ChatGPT / DeepL — translating and personalizing messages in 5+ languages

Slack — daily reporting and communication with the team

VPN — to manage accounts in different regions if needed





WHO YOU ARE:



Experience in cold outreach, lead generation, influencer outreach, or SDR/BDR role

You've sent 100+ cold messages per day before and you know how to do it without burning accounts

You understand Instagram and TikTok — how DMs work, how to avoid getting flagged/banned

Comfortable using AI tools for translation and personalization

Extremely organized — you never lose track of a conversation

You can write compelling messages that get responses (not copy-paste spam)

Resilient — 90% of people won't respond and that doesn't bother you

Strong English + at least one other language is a bonus (French, Spanish, Arabic, etc.)

Fast typer, fast learner, fast executor



COMPENSATION:



Base: $500-$800/month depending on experience

Performance bonus: $2-5 per affiliate who actually posts content (verified)

Example: if 50 affiliates post videos this month = $100-$250 bonus

Monthly bonus paid on top of base

If you consistently hit 20+ new affiliates per week, base salary increases





HIRING PROCESS:



Apply with a Loom video (see below)

Short interview (20 min)

NDA signed

Paid 3-day test: we give you a list of 200 contacts, you send outreach messages and show us your tracking system, response rate, and follow-up process

30-day trial





HOW TO APPLY:

Send a 2-minute Loom video where you:



Show an outreach campaign you've done before — how many messages sent, what response rate you got

Write a sample DM in English that you would send to a TikTok creator with 50K followers to propose an affiliate deal — show it on screen

Explain how you'd organize tracking 1,000+ contacts across 5 languages without losing any



Applications without a Loom will NOT be reviewed.

title: Assistant Property Manager
description:
INTRODUCTION: Hello! 
 (on IG). I'm an entrepreneur that started by buying rentals and is now developing houses by building and renovating in Nashville, TN. Now with ~35 units, I established a property management company (
) to manage them. My goal is 100 rental units, but to get there I need your help! I rely heavily on my team in place to keep things running smoothly so I can grow the company.



Location: Remote

Time Schedule: Business hours M - F in the U.S.A. (Overnight hours in the Philippines)

Compensation: $6-8/hr USD, paid bi-weekly via Onlinejobs.ph

Benefits: Paid USA bank holidays (~13 days) after trial period.



Job Summary:

Flywheel needs an APM to run the day to day business operations. You will report to me, Allan, for confirming outcome metrics and overcoming obstacles. You are the singular employee of Flywheel and play a critical role in its success!



The Perks:

• Play a direct role in a growing local company and enjoy a distinct sense of satisfaction from seeing results that YOU made happen.

• Enjoy autonomy of identifying and handling tasks using your own judgment, without micromanagement of a supervisor.

• Plenty of training provided to build on your existing experience and ensure your success!



A Typical Week:

• Receive notice of a tenant not renewing lease. Schedule contractor to begin turnover repairs.

• Receive a maintenance request from a unit in the software, and forward to the appropriate vendor.

• Follow up on certain tenants if rent not received on the 1st.

• Run month-end reports and distribute to rental property owners.



Qualifications:

• Read sections “Outcomes” & “Core Competencies” down below.

• This job is not for a “first timer”. Only those with Property Management experience need apply.

• Level of Completed Education: N/A

• English Fluency: 4+ out of 5. Some accent is fine but must be easy to understand.



===============================================



Mission: To manage a rental property portfolio for maximum profitability, especially by turning vacancies quickly and handling repairs and maintenance requests quickly and cost-effectively.



Outcomes: Property Management

• Rent collections are at 100% by the end of each month (excluding detainer warrants).

• Vacant units are filled in less than 3 weeks by getting units rent-ready, listing them, and screening tenants.

• Global Vacancy stays at or below 5% on a trailing 30 day basis (different from the above in that low global vacancy means tenants are staying and renewing leases likely due to effective management)

• All valid maintenance requests are completed within 7 days by quickly scheduling vendors and following up.

• Recurring tasks are performed on time by completing each item in the SOP’s checklists (Ex: Interim inspections, monthly owner statements and distributions).

• <24 hour response time on all property management-related
s, calls, & SMS.



Core Competencies

• Honesty & Integrity – Displays consistent, straightforward behavior. Always speaking in truth and not deception. Does not cut corners ethically.

• Proactive problem solving – Tackles new problems using self-administered resources.

• Own it – Sees tasks through to results (AKA tenacity or persistence)

• Assertiveness – Quick to take action, not afraid of conflict.

• Checklist Aficionado - Thorough executor of to-do lists and SOPs.

• Professional Communication skills – Concise and clear via phone and written. Grammar is largely appropriate.

• Intelligence –Retains information and thinks through tasks for optimum results at an above-average capability.

• High Attention to Detail – Does not let details slip through the cracks by carefully keeping track of each one.

• Work Ethic – Has no qualms about working many hours every day without dopamine distractions.

• Computer Literate – Is comfortable with computer-based web applications.

• Customer Service – Responds quickly to inquiries. Empathizing and moving them towards the goal.



TO APPLY: If you’ve read this far, show your attention to detail in your application: Add “FLYWHEEL” in all caps to the subject line (or title). Attach your resume and for a cover letter, use the application body to summarize your property management experience!

title: Elite Google Ads and  LSA Growth Operator
description:
**Full Ownership | Healthcare | Performance-Driven**



This is not a basic virtual assistant role.



We are a multi-location healthcare organization seeking a high-level Google Ads and Local Services Ads specialist who can take full ownership of our paid acquisition strategy. This role is for someone who understands business economics, not just campaign setup.



If you think in terms of LTV:CAC, revenue attribution, and lead quality — not impressions and clicks — continue reading.



Also, put the word 'Pineapple' in the subject line of your application.



---



## The Mission



Your primary objective:



Generate high-quality patients at a minimum 5:1 LTV:CAC ratio.



We are specifically targeting:

* Motor vehicle a
 (MVA) patients

* Patients with active health insurance

* Patients willing and able to pay out of pocket



This role is about economic optimization and revenue growth — not just traffic generation.



---



## What You Will Fully Own



You will be responsible for strategy, execution, optimization, and reporting across:



### Paid Acquisition

* Google Search Ads

* Performance Max (if appropriate)

* Display and retargeting campaigns (within strict healthcare compliance)

* Google Local Services Ads (LSAs)

* Google Business Profile optimization



### Campaign Infrastructure

* Advanced keyword research and high-intent targeting

* Negative keyword management

* Geo-targeting and bid strategy optimization

* Conversion tracking (calls, forms, booked appointments)

* CRM alignment for closed-loop reporting



### LSA & Creative Optimization

* Managing Google Screened/Guaranteed background checks and license verifications

* Disputing unqualified LSA leads aggressively to protect budget

* Writing and testing ad copy with A/B testing frameworks

* Landing page performance feedback

* Call tracking and lead quality review



### Analytics and Reporting

* Weekly reporting dashboards

* Cost per qualified lead & Cost per booked appointment

* Revenue tracking by campaign

* LTV:CAC analysis (minimum 5:1 target)

* Clear strategic recommendations (not just data reports)



---



## Performance Metrics



You will be measured on:

* Cost per qualified lead

* Cost per booked appointment

* Show rate

* Revenue per acquired patient

* LTV:CAC ratio

* ROI by segment (MVA vs Insurance vs Cash)



This is a results-driven position. Activity alone does not equal success.



---



## Required Experience



* Minimum 3 years managing Google Ads for healthcare or local service businesses

* **Crucial:** Deep understanding of Google’s Personalized Advertising policies regarding healthcare and HIPAA compliance to prevent account suspensions (You must know what you can and cannot retarget in the medical space)

* Proven experience improving lead quality, not just lowering cost per lead

* Experience managing LSAs (including disputes and verifications)

* Strong analytical ability with revenue-based reporting

* Experience setting up and auditing conversion tracking

* Strong English communication skills (written and verbal)

* Comfortable being accountable to revenue outcomes



**Bonus:**

* Multi-location business experience

* Experience optimizing campaigns for high-value case types (like MVA)



---



## This Is Not For You If



* You focus on CTR, impressions, or traffic without tracking revenue

* You have never calculated LTV or CAC

* You rely on increasing budgets instead of improving efficiency

* You require daily direction to function

* You avoid accountability for performance



---



## Compensation



* **$1,500+ USD/month base** (depending heavily on proven experience)

* Performance-based bonuses tied directly to revenue and ROI

* Long-term growth opportunity

* Potential to grow into a senior paid acquisition leadership role



Top performers will grow with us.



---



## Application Instructions (Important)



To be considered, you must complete the following:



**1. Record a 3–5 minute Loom video explaining:**

* A campaign you managed for a healthcare or local service business

* The revenue results achieved (LTV:CAC or ROI)

* What specific levers you pulled to improve performance



**2. Provide screenshots of:**

* A campaign structure you built

* A reporting dashboard you use

* Before-and-after performance metrics



**3. Answer the following questions in writing:**

* How do you improve lead quality rather than just increasing lead volume?

* How would you structure campaigns to prioritize motor vehicle a
 patients while remaining compliant with Google's healthcare ad policies?

* What would you do if cost per lead increased 30% month over month?

* When do you scale ad spend versus reduce it?



Applications without the Loom video, screenshots, and detailed answers will not be considered.



---



We are building a scalable patient acquisition engine that prioritizes patient quality, revenue efficiency, and long-term growth.



If you are in the top tier of offshore Google Ads operators and can prove it, apply.



If you are average, this role is not for you.



***

title: Creative Strategist DTC
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-scaling DTC beauty and skincare brand doing 6 figures per month, and we’re looking for a Creative Strategist to lead the development of high-performing ad concepts for Meta 
 & Instagram).



You will research, ideate, and create ad concepts that convert — using storytelling, emotional triggers, and proven direct-response principles.

Your goal is to turn insights into creative strategies that drive real sales and help scale the brand to the next level.



You’ll work directly with the founder and marketing team, with full creative freedom and support to test, learn, and grow.



Key Responsibilities



- Research the target audience and understand their emotions, desires, and motivations.

- Develop creative ad angles, hooks, and scripts that connect emotionally and convert.

- Write clear creative briefs for video editors and UGC creators.

- Review ad performance results and identify ideas for new tests or iterations.

- Collaborate with the team during weekly creative planning and performance calls.

- Keep creative assets organized and maintain a structured testing system.



What We’re Looking For



- Experience in creative strategy, ad scripting, or direct-response copywriting (beauty, skincare, or eCommerce is a plus).

- Strong understanding of direct-response advertising and emotional storytelling.

- Ability to interpret performance data and turn insights into actionable ideas.

- Skilled in writing hooks, short scripts, and creative briefs.

- Highly organized, consistent, and willing to improve through feedback.

- Excellent English communication skills.



Day-to-Day Tasks

- Create 4–6 new ad concepts per week (scripts, briefs, or iterations).

- Research audience insights and new emotional angles.

- Communicate with the founder and editors on upcoming creatives.

- Review ad performance and update creative documentation.

- Attend weekly strategy meetings via Zoom.



What Success Looks Like

- You consistently create ad concepts that generate profitable sales.

- You bring fresh ideas and emotional storylines that resonate with the audience.

- You turn data and feedback into new creative concepts.

- You take ownership of the creative system and help improve it over time.



How to Apply



Please send:

- A short introduction about your experience in creative strategy.

- 2–3 examples of ads, scripts, or campaigns you’ve created (Google Drive or portfolio link).

- Your expected monthly salary (USD).

- A short explanation of your process for coming up with new ad ideas.

title: Espesyalista sa Pag-promote ng Turismo sa Pilipinas
description:
Work Location

Philippines  (Work from home / on-site office available, negotiable)

Requirements: Must be locally live based in Manila.

Working Hours

9:00 AM - 6:00 PM, 1-hour lunch break, 2 days off per week

Job Responsibilities

1.Be fully responsible for connecting with local travel agencies and tourism institutions in the Philippines, conduct daily business communication and negotiation, efficiently convey the advantages of our company’s China tourism products and cooperation policies, and promote in-depth cooperation between both parties.

2.Maintain existing cooperative travel agency resources, respond to cooperation needs and solve business problems in a timely manner, follow up the progress of cooperation implementation, ensure smooth cooperation, and expand long-term and stable local tourism cooperation channels.

3.Assist in collecting information on the local Philippine tourism market, tourist needs and competitor dynamics, sort out and feedback to the domestic team to help optimize tourism products and promotion plans.

4.Assist in cross-border business coordination, information synchronization and other related auxiliary work to ensure barrier-free business communication between China and the Philippines, respond promptly and actively to all work communications.

Job Requirements

1.Native Filipino speaker, fluent in English (listening, speaking, reading and writing), capable of unobstructed work communication, copywriting and oral negotiation; English shall be the daily working language.

2.Familiar with the local Philippine tourism market and the operation mode of local travel agencies as well as tourist travel preferences; candidates with relevant experience in tourism industry or business coordination are preferred.

3.Possess excellent communication, business negotiation and customer maintenance skills, proactive and responsible, with strong execution ability, able to independently promote business implementation.

4.Have basic copywriting and content editing skills, able to quickly create tourism promotion materials, and be proficient in basic office software operations.

5.Careful and rigorous in work, with strong cross-cultural communication awareness, high sense of responsibility and good team spirit.

Salary & Benefits

Basic Salary: 30,000 Peso per month

Sales Commission Rules

1.200 Peso reward for each travel agency successfully contacted and registered in the company system.

2.800 Peso reward for each valid tour group order placed by the cooperative travel agency, calculated based on the final group quantity confirmed by the company.

3.No sales commission for the current month if the total number of registered travel agencies is less than 10 in a month.

title: URGENT! Hiring Multimedia Artist - START ASAP
description:
Hey, you. Yeah, you — the one who can make a brand look like a million bucks, cut a video that actually gives people chills, and probably has opinions about kerning and loading speeds that most people in your life don't want to hear about.



We see you. We need you.



We're Redfern Media, a digital marketing agency out of Dallas, Texas that's been in this game for nearly two decades. We've worked with some names you'd recognize — folks from Shark Tank, Dr. Benjamin Hardy (bestselling author of Personality Isn't Permanent and Who Not How), Robin Sharma (yes, the guy who wrote The Monk Who Sold His Ferrari), and a growing roster of founders, visionaries, and companies doing genuinely cool things.



We move fast, we care about craft, and we take the work seriously without taking ourselves too seriously.



Right now, we're looking for a Multimedia Artist to join us full-time and for the long haul. This isn't a gig. It's not a trial run. We want someone who's ready to plant roots, grow with us, and own the creative side of what we're building — starting immediately.





What You'll Be Working On



You'll be the creative engine behind everything visual we put into the world. That means:



? Brand creative across the board — ads, social assets,
 visuals, pitch decks, one-pagers, sales collateral, partner materials, and whatever else a growing agency throws your way

? Video production and editing — from scripted brand videos and explainer content to campaign assets and event recaps. You take raw footage (or a blank timeline) and turn it into something people actually want to watch

? Design for print and digital — booth displays, guidebooks, onboarding decks, investor materials, and everything in between

? Web design (a strong plus) — if you can contribute to website overhauls, landing pages, and think about how people actually move through a site, you'll fit right in here

? Whatever else comes up — because it always does, and you're the kind of person who's energized by that, not rattled





What We're Looking For



? 5–10 years of hands-on experience as a multimedia artist, creative generalist, or similar — you've been doing this long enough that your instincts are sharp and your portfolio proves it

? Deep graphic design expertise — you know your way around Adobe Creative Suite, Canva Pro, whatever the job calls for. Layout, typography, color, composition — these aren't buzzwords to you, they're second nature

? Deep video editing skills — you can take a script, raw footage, or just a creative direction and deliver something polished, paced, and genuinely compelling

? Web design experience is a big plus — if you can handle site layouts, landing pages, and think in terms of UI/UX, that puts you ahead

? You work well under a deadline without the drama

? You can take a creative brief and run with it, but you're also not afraid to ask a good question

? Strong eye for detail — we notice when something's off, and so do you

? Bonus points if you've worked on pitch decks, investor materials, or in fast-moving startup environments





The Details



Type: Full-time, long-term

Rate: TBD - Based on Experience

Start Date: ASAP — we mean it





To Apply



Head to 
/careers and fill out the form. Show us some work. Tell us a little about yourself. We actually read these.



Draye Redfern

CEO / Founder – Redfern Media / Fractional CMO & Other Businesses

title: Growth Operations Lead
description:
Department: Marketing & Revenue Operations

Employment Type: Full-Time

Location: Remote

Compensation: Base + Performance-Based Bonus



Overview

We are seeking a Growth Operations Lead to architect, manage, and scale the revenue engine across a portfolio of digital creators.



This is a strategy-first role, not execution-heavy. You will design high-performing systems across funnels, lifecycle marketing, and monetization, while leading a team of VAs responsible for execution.



Success in this role is measured by one core outcome:

consistent and scalable revenue growth



Key Responsibilities:



1. Funnel Architecture

Design and optimize end-to-end customer journeys (acquisition ? conversion ? retention)

Identify friction points and implement conversion improvements



2. Messaging & Monetization Strategy

Develop messaging frameworks across all creator accounts

Optimize pricing, offers, upsells, and content positioning

Own campaign structure and performance outcomes



3. Lifecycle Marketing

Build and scale:

Welcome sequences

Re-engagement flows

Retention & resubscription campaigns

Win-back strategies



4. Performance Optimization

Track and analyze key metrics (conversion rates, LTV, churn, ARPU)

Run experiments on offers, pricing, and messaging

Continuously improve revenue performance using data insights



5. Team Leadership & Execution Oversight

Lead and manage a team of VAs

Translate strategy into clear execution frameworks

Ensure consistent, high-quality implementation at scale



Ideal Candidate Profile

- Growth-Oriented Marketer

Deep understanding of funnels, buyer psychology, and conversion drivers

Experience turning attention into revenue



- Systems Thinker

Thinks in frameworks, flows, and scalable structures

Builds repeatable systems, not one-off campaigns



- Data-Driven Operator

Comfortable with performance metrics and experimentation

Uses data to inform decisions and validate ideas



- Ownership Mindset

Fully accountable for outcomes, not just activity

Proactive in identifying opportunities and solving problems



- Relevant Experience

Background in:

Direct response marketing

E-commerce or subscription businesses

High-volume digital sales environments

Experience with creator platforms is a plus



Compensation & Benefits

Base Salary: $1,200 – $1,600/month

Performance Bonus: Directly tied to revenue growth

Career Growth: Clear path to senior leadership roles

Work Setup: Fully remote, performance-driven environment



If you meet the requirements and are interested to apply, fill out this form: 



Only applications through the link will be processed.

title: Video Editor
description:
The purpose of the Video Editor Role is to process ad briefs from our creative team and bring them to life through the power of video editing.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the actual execution & applying the finishing touches on all the video ads we create. Our success as a marketing team will rely on your ability to comprehend each ad concept, strategically put the pieces together, and enhance the overall marketing message with your edits.



You understand that the smallest details can make the biggest differences. So, you take pride in paying immense attention to detail in everything you do as those details can be the difference between an ad that is shown to millions & an ad that is shown to very few.



Your active purpose is to work alongside our Creative Directors and Copywriters to edit & bring to life ad briefs, utilize our creative resources, and help produce winning ads month over month for our clients.





Video Editor Primary Roles 



Onboarding:

Analyze and process client brand guidelines for creative purposes



Ongoing:

Edit 5-10 ad briefs per week 

Upload & organize edited ads into specific client folders with the correct resolutions

Communicate with copywriters & creative directors to ensure ad concepts are executed correctly

Listen & apply feedback from the creative team & clients for existing and new ads

Learn the Ads Strategy to understand  what makes “Winning” & “Losing” ad concepts

Complete weekly 30-minute ad analysis & review on concepts you have created







Qualifications & Character Traits 



Direct Experience Qualifications

1 Year of experience in video editing or designing ads

1 Year of experience in Video Editing tools like CapCut, Adobe 

1 Year of experience editing eCommerce ads

Working in a team environment & understanding individual roles



CHARACTER TRAITS

Excruciatingly high level of attention to detail with all designs & edits

Artistic & creative oriented mindset

Visual communicator & storyteller 

High curiosity & an active imagination 

Strong willingness to do the ‘boring’ work required

Great communicator with the team

Time-efficient, but willing to spend extra time to do things right

Coachable & desire to grow skill set & personal traits



This is NOT For You If: 

You are not a creative person

You do not enjoy editing content

You do not have creative skills

You do not like a high-operating environment

You are unorganized

You are not a team player 

You do not understand eCommerce

You are not passionate about growth 



Hours 

M-F 8:00 AM - 4:00 PM Philippines Time (flexible)





Growth Potential 



We highly value growth and development in all areas. With great performance, the potential for you as a Video Editor is significant: 

Get priority on editing ads & receive the bulk of requests.

Creative Director role to lead and manage other editors & focus on high-level strategy

title: Video Editor for Reels & Coaching Content
description:
We’re looking for a reliable freelance video editor to support us on a recurring, project-based basis. We regularly produce short-form content (Reels, TikToks) as well as longer coaching videos in English, and need someone who can turn pre-produced assets into clean, engaging final videos.



What you’ll do:

• Edit short-form videos (Reels / TikTok style)

• Edit coaching videos in English

• Work with provided footage and AI-generated voiceovers

• Add subtitles (clean, modern, engaging style)

• Cut, pace, and structure content for high retention

• Occasionally add basic motion graphics or visual elements



What we provide:

• Raw footage

• AI voiceover files

• Clear instructions and examples



What we’re looking for:

• Experience editing short-form social media content

• Strong sense of pacing, hooks, and storytelling

• Good understanding of subtitles and viewer retention

• Ability to work independently and meet deadlines

• Fluent understanding of English (for editing coaching content)



Nice to have:

• Experience with viral content formats

• Knowledge of current social media trends

• Fast turnaround times



How to apply:

Send us:

• Your hourly rate

• Relevant references / portfolio (especially Reels or similar content)

• Short introduction about your experience



We’re looking for someone we can work with long-term across multiple projects.

title: Experienced Performance Video Editor | E-commerce
description:
We’re an eCommerce brand in the supplement space looking for a creative, fast, and reliable Video Editor who knows how to turn raw clips into scroll-stopping, conversion-driven ads for Instagram and
.



This is not a basic editing role. We’re looking for someone who combines strong creative instincts with a performance mindset, and who’s comfortable using AI tools to work faster and test ideas.



What You’ll Be Creating

- Short-form paid ads (10s–1:30s) that feel native to Reels, and Shorts

- UGC-style ads with multiple hook variations to maximize performance

- Mini VSLs (1–3 mins) with clean pacing, emotional storytelling, and B-roll flow

- Performance iterations based on real ad data, not guesswork

- Trend-inspired edits that ride platform culture while staying brand-aligned



AI & Tools (Important)

- Comfortable using AI tools to support creative production and ideation

- Experience with tools like Kling, Veo 3, Nano Banana, Sora, or similar AI video tools is a strong plus

- Able to use AI for B-roll generation, concept testing, visual enhancements, or creative experimentation



Weekly Output & Expectations

- Deliver 5-6 briefs per week (quality over quantity)

- Proactively iterate based on ad performance data & strategist feedback

- Stay on top of TikTok/IG trends and bring fresh creative ideas to the table



You’re a Good Fit If You

- Have proven experience editing direct response ads that convert

- Understand key ad metrics (hook rate, watch time, CTR) and how edits affect them

- Know how to make videos feel native to social media paltforms

- Are detail-oriented, reliable, and fast without sacrificing quality



Compensation & Growth

$1,200 – $1,500/month (depending on experience)

Performance bonuses for winning creatives

Clear growth path into Lead Editor / Creative Strategist

Fully remote – flexible schedule, results over hours



How to Apply

Include your portfolio (short-form ads only — UGC or paid social preferred).

Bonus if you share results (metrics, ROAS, CTR improvements) from ads you’ve edited.



To confirm you read this fully, start your application with “HOOK”



We’re building a performance-focused creative team.



If you’re consistent, creative, and serious about improving ad results, we’d like to see your work.

title: B-Roll Sourcing Specialist (Storyblocks) - High Volume
description:
I am looking for a fast, detail-oriented B-Roll Sourcing Specialist to help scale my YouTube channels. Your only job is to find high-quality stock footage that matches a provided script.



You do NOT need to edit the video. You only need to find the clips, download them (or provide the links), and organize them so my editors can put them together.



Responsibilities

Read and understand 15–20 minute scripts (documentary/storytelling style).



Search Storyblocks (access provided) for relevant, high-quality B-roll.



Match visuals precisely to the tone and specific "hooks" in the script.



Organize and send the clips to me daily.



Handle multiple scripts per day.



Requirements

High-Speed Internet: You will be browsing and downloading large video files. This is non-negotiable.



Visual Storytelling: You must understand how to pick clips that aren't just "generic"—they need to actually tell the story.



Reliability: I need multiple videos done every single day.



Storyblocks Experience: Preferred, but if you are a fast learner, I will provide access and a quick walkthrough.



How to Apply

Change the subject line to: "I am your B-Roll Specialist for [Your Channel Category]"



Tell me about your experience with stock footage or video editing.



Confirm that you are comfortable with the $5 per 15-20 min video rate.



Include a link to any previous work or a portfolio if you have one.

title: wedding photo editor
description:
We are looking for a super-talented and responsible wedding photo editor to join our photo editing boutique team on a remote, part-time, and project-based basis.



The candidate has a deep, experience-based sense of color and composition, developed through years of practice. You should be able to achieve precise color consistency both on skin color and background consistency colors across large wedding galleries, show great attention to detail, and maintain punctuality and focus throughout editing work.



Responsibilities:

 • Perform color editing and creative cropping+straightening of wedding photos based on client samples 

 • Conduct self-checks and ensure the final gallery meets client quality standards.



Requirements:

 • Excellent command of Lightroom classic and Photoshop.

 • Strong understanding of color balance, lighting, and composition.

 • Solid portfolio showcasing previous wedding editing projects.

 • Ability to meet deadlines and communicate clearly in English.



Required Tools:

 • Active Adobe Lightroom Classic subscription with the latest version installed

 • Fast and reliable computer (macOS only)

 • Monitor with accurate color calibration



Please note that we are not looking for a beginner to be trained; we need an experienced, well-established professional who can deliver high-quality work and immediately start contributing to our current projects.

title: Video Assembly Editor (Blackmagic Cloud + DaVinci Resolve)
description:
I document the process of making swords and I’m looking for a detail-oriented "Assembly Editor" to handle the first cuts of my YouTube content. This is a part-time, long-term role for someone who is highly organized and technically proficient in DaVinci Resolve.



-- Please do not apply if you aren’t familiar with, or do not use, Davinci Resolve --



We will be using a Proxy-to-Cloud workflow:



I will upload low-res Proxy Media to our shared Blackmagic Cloud storage.

You will perform the edit in a Blackmagic Cloud project.

No rendering required: Once your assembly is finished, I will open the project on my end, relink to my 4K masters, add technical captions, and handle the final export.



My audience expects a "raw" and authentic experience:



NO background music, fancy transitions, or color grading.

YES to clean, linear storytelling that highlights the satisfying sounds and visuals of craftsmanship (ASMR-style).

Deliverables: One 25–30 minute long-form assembly + one vertical "Short" per project.



Technical Requirements:



Software: Must be proficient in the latest version of DaVinci Resolve.

Connectivity: A stable internet connection (Fiber preferred) to sync Proxy files via Blackmagic Cloud.

Hardware: Ability to playback 1080p Proxy files smoothly.



Turnaround: Finished assembly within 24 hours of the final build footage being synced. I upload footage daily so you are able to edit as the project progresses, but the final deadline is 24 hours after the last clip is in.



Compensation & Stability:



Rate: $200 USD Monthly Retainer.

Scope: This covers up to 4 projects per month (1 Long-form Assembly + 1 Short-form per project). Note: I typically only complete ~3 projects per month, but the $200 is guaranteed.

Bonus: Any 5th project (or beyond) in a single month will be paid at a $50 bonus rate per project.

Payment: Guaranteed monthly pay via Wise (TransferWise).



Expected Effort:

I currently handle the editing myself, and because the style is "Raw & Linear" (no music/effects), a typical 25–30 minute assembly takes me approximately 5-7 hours. I am looking for an editor who can match or beat that efficiency once they are familiar with the workflow.



Note: This is a long-term position. I am looking for a partner to grow with the channel, not a one-time freelancer.



To prove you’ve read this entire post, please start your application with the word "ANVIL" in all caps.



Please send your portfolio (specifically looking for "Process," "Craft," or "ASMR" style edits).

title: AI-Powered Marketing & Executive Assistant
description:

 / C# development.

title: CRO Account Manager – E-commerce
description:
We are seeking a CRO Account Manager to own client relationships and lead delivery across CRO and web projects for ambitious eCommerce and Shopify brands. 



This is not a passive coordination role. You will drive outcomes, set direction, create clarity, remove blockers, and keep delivery moving at pace.



Key Responsibilities



1) Client Leadership

-Be the primary point of contact for key accounts.

-Lead calls confidently, with structure and clear outcomes.

-Translate business goals into CRO strategy, roadmaps, and execution plans.

-Proactively manage expectations, risks, and priorities.

-Build long-term trust through reliability, honesty, and strong communication.





2) Delivery & Project Execution

-Run delivery in ClickUp: scoping, prioritisation, timelines, and accountability.

-Write clear briefs that designers and developers can execute without confusion.

-QA design and development output to ensure accuracy, polish, and alignment with CRO goals.

-Keep work organised, time-bound, and commercially aligned—no drifting scope.





3) CRO Strategy, Audits & Roadmapping

-Conduct mini and full CRO audits (qualitative and quantitative) and turn insights into clear priorities.

-Build CRO roadmaps outlining what we’re doing, why, and how success is measured.

-Plan experiments and site improvements that drive CVR, AOV, LTV, and funnel performance.

-Spot and communicate upsell opportunities that genuinely align with client growth.



4) Pod Leadership (Design + Dev)

-Lead pods of designers and developers.

-Set expectations, push for standards, and drive accountability.

-Keep teams aligned, motivated, and moving quickly.

-Improve systems and SOPs as we scale.



This role is ideal for someone charismatic, sharp, and intensely organised. You thrive on responsibility, take ownership, and finish what you start. You can manage client relationships with confidence and run delivery with discipline.



Requirements

-3+ years experience in eCommerce, websites, or Shopify.

-2+ years experience in conversion rate optimization (CRO).

-2+ years experience as an account manager (agency or similar).

-Experience leading delivery with designers and developers.

-Strong understanding of eCommerce metrics: CVR, AOV, LTV, funnel performance, and experimentation logic.

-Comfortable owning client relationships.

-Strong briefing and QA skills.

title: Scrum Master
description:
We are seeking a highly motivated Scrum Master / Agile Lead / Delivery Manager to guide and inspire our development teams, ensuring the successful delivery of projects while fostering a culture of continuous improvement. You will be responsible for coordinating multiple teams, implementing agile practices, and driving efficiency across the organization.



Key Objectives

-Champion the use of metrics and objective measures to track team performance.

-Inspire, organize, and support teams, identifying growth opportunities.

-Identify and resolve controversial issues in internal and external interactions, seeking win-win solutions.

-Guide teams to stay on track with agile techniques, fine-tuning approaches to align with overall strategy.

-Promote continuous improvement by setting goals, defining milestones, and assigning responsibilities.



Responsibilities

-Manage Agile procedures, including PIP planning, iterations, demos, and retrospectives.

-Conduct assessments of engineers and product team leads.

-Maintain a general development plan in Jira, monitoring deadlines and task completion.

-Coordinate 3 development teams, ensuring autonomy and operational efficiency.

-Propose effective methods and approaches to achieve business results in alignment with company priorities.

-Build and maintain realistic planning and execution processes with teams to ensure timely deliveries.

-Define and utilize key metrics to analyze and improve team performance.

-Effectively manage conflicts and train teams to handle challenges proactively.

-Act as facilitator, process manager, mentor, and change agent, contributing to organization-level process improvements.



Required Skills and Qualifications

-Minimum 3 years’ experience as a Scrum Master, Agile Leader, or similar role in development/testing teams.

-Proficiency with Agile tracking tools (e.g., Jira, Confluence).

-Ability to plan iterations, resolve conflicts, and remove bottlenecks.

-Skilled in facilitating meetings and interacting with multiple management levels.

-Experience conducting team assessments and evaluating effectiveness.

-Strong understanding of the software development lifecycle (SDLC).

-Systems thinker capable of seeing the big picture and identifying root causes.

-Practical knowledge of Scrum and Kanban methodologies.

-Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.



Preferred Skills and Qualifications

-Certifications in Leadership, Agile Leadership, Scrum Mastering, or People Management.

-Experience in e-commerce.

-Certification as Agile Coach or Scrum Master.

-Educational background in Computer Science or related field.

title: Video Editor
description:
Video Editor Job Description



Summary



We run a fast-growing media operation producing high-retention, documentary-style videos for faceless

YouTube channels.



We're hiring a full-time Video Editor who can adapt to a wide range of niches — from business and tech to

lifestyle, entertainment, and storytelling. 



You'll be highly coachable, follow SOPs closely, and iterate fast based on feedback. Training, templates, and editing frameworks are provided.



What You'll Do (Daily Responsibilities)

• Edit documentary-style videos using provided voiceovers, scripts, and footage.

• Follow our editing SOPs for pacing, storytelling, retention, and audience engagement.

• Incorporate b-roll, sound design, motion graphics, and captions that match our brand style.

• Continuously improve speed and quality by implementing team feedback and examples from

top-performing videos.

• Maintain organized project files, clear version naming, and on-time delivery of drafts and finals.

• Communicate clearly with project managers and flag any blockers early.



Requirements (Must-Have)

• Strong proficiency with Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut Pro, or DaVinci Resolve.

• Solid understanding of pacing, narrative flow, and YouTube retention dynamics.

• Coachable & process-driven: you enjoy following SOPs and improving through feedback.

• Reliable internet, solid workstation/laptop capable of rendering 1080p–4K videos.

• Full-time availability and ability to handle high-volume editing.



Nice to Have (Bonus Points)

• Experience editing for faceless or documentary-style YouTube channels.

• Skills in color correction, basic sound mixing, and adding dynamic subtitles.

• Familiarity with YouTube analytics (CTR, AVD, retention cues).

• Comfort working in Google Drive, Notion, and Trello for task management.

• Basic motion graphics or After Effects knowledge.



Compensation & Workload

• $20–$30 USD per completed video (depending on complexity and turnaround).

• Up to 20+ videos/month available with consistent pipeline.

• Long-term, full-time position for the right candidate.

• Flexible schedule — we prioritize consistent delivery and communication over fixed hours.



Quality Bar (What "Great" Looks Like)



If you dont send through your resume and some of your work I will not take the application any further.

title: Espesyalista sa Pag-promote ng Turismo sa Pilipinas
description:
Oras ng Trabaho

9:00 umaga - 6:00 hapon, 1 oras na pahinga sa tanghalian, 2 araw na pahinga bawat linggo

Mga Tungkulin sa Trabaho

1.Buong pananagutan sa pakikipag-ugnayan sa mga lokal na ahensya sa paglalakbay at institusyong panturismo sa Pilipinas, gumawa ng pang-araw-araw na komunikasyon sa negosyo at negosasyon, iparating nang mahusay ang mga bentahe ng mga produktong panturismo ng Tsina ng aming kumpanya at mga patakaran sa pakikipagtulungan, at itaguyod ang malalim na pakikipagtulungan sa pagitan ng dalawang panig.

2.Panatilihin ang mga umiiral na mapagkukunan ng ahensya sa paglalakbay na nakikipagtulungan, tumugon kaagad sa mga pangangailangan sa pakikipagtulungan at lutasin ang mga problema sa negosyo, sundan ang pagpapatupad ng pakikipagtulungan, tiyakin ang maayos na pagpapatuloy ng pakikipagtulungan, at palawakin ang mga matatag na pangmatagalang channel sa pakikipagtulungan sa lokal na turismo.

3.Tumulong sa pagkolekta ng impormasyon tungkol sa lokal na merkado ng turismo sa Pilipinas, mga pangangailangan ng mga turista at mga kilos ng mga katunggali, ayusin at ibalik ang impormasyon sa koponan sa loob ng bansa upang makatulong na mapabuti ang mga produktong panturismo at mga plano sa promosyon.

4.Tumulong sa cross-border na koordinasyon ng negosyo, pag-synchronize ng impormasyon at iba pang kaugnay na pantulong na gawain upang tiyakin ang walang hadlang na komunikasyon sa negosyo sa pagitan ng Tsina at Pilipinas, at tumugon kaagad at aktibo sa lahat ng komunikasyon sa trabaho.

Mga Kinakailangan sa Trabaho

1.Katutubong nagsasalita ng Filipino, bihasa sa Ingles (pakikinig, pagsasalita, pagbabasa at pagsusulat), kayang gumawa ng walang hadlang na komunikasyon sa trabaho, pagsusulat ng teksto at pasalitang negosasyon; Ingles ang pang-araw-araw na wika sa trabaho.

2.Pamilyar sa lokal na merkado ng turismo sa Pilipinas, sa paraan ng pagpapatakbo ng mga lokal na ahensya sa paglalakbay at mga kagustuhan sa paglalakbay ng mga turista; mas gusto ang mga aplikanteng may kaugnay na karanasan sa industriya ng turismo o koordinasyon ng negosyo.

3.May mahusay na kasanayan sa komunikasyon, negosasyon sa negosyo at pagpapanatili ng kostumer, proactive at responsable, may malakas na kakayahang magpatupad, kayang magsulong ng pagpapatupad ng negosyo nang mag-isa.

4.May pangunahing kakayahan sa pagsusulat ng teksto at pag-edit ng nilalaman, kayang mabilis na gumawa ng mga materyal sa promosyon ng turismo, at bihasa sa pangunahing operasyon ng software ng opisina.

5.Maingat at mahigpit sa trabaho, may malakas na kamalayan sa cross-cultural na komunikasyon, mataas na pakiramdam ng responsibilidad at mabuting espiritu ng koponan.

Suweldo at Mga Benepisyo

Batayang Suweldo: 30,000 Peso bawat buwan

Mga Patakaran sa Komisyon sa Pagbebenta

1.Gantimpala ng 200 Peso para sa bawat ahensya sa paglalakbay na matagumpay na nakontak at nairehistro sa sistema ng kumpanya.

2.Gantimpala ng 800 Peso para sa bawat wastong order ng grupo ng paglalakbay na ibinigay ng ahensya sa paglalakbay na nakikipagtulungan, kinakalkula batay sa huling bilang ng grupo na kinumpirma ng kumpanya.

Walang komisyon sa pagbebenta sa kasalukuyang buwan kung ang kabuuang bilang ng nairehistrong ahensya sa paglalakbay ay mas mababa sa 10 sa isang buwan.

title: Short Form Video Editor (Viral Hooks, Retention Editing, AI Content)
description:
We are hiring a high-level short form video editor who understands how to create engaging, viral-style content — not just basic edits.



This role is for someone who knows how to hold attention, increase retention, and make content that performs.



You will be editing short-form videos (Instagram Reels, TikTok) for a fast-growing AI marketing brand that helps clinics get more bookings.

We are looking for someone who understands:



* Fast-paced cuts and zooms

* Hook-first editing (first 1–2 seconds matter most)

* Subtitles that enhance retention (not just captions)

* B-roll, overlays, and visual storytelling

* 
-style inserts, pattern interrupts, and engagement triggers



Your job is to take talking-head style videos and turn them into highly engaging content.



---



WHAT YOU’LL DO:



* Edit 1–3 short form videos per day

* Add dynamic cuts, zooms, subtitles, and overlays

* Insert relevant B-roll and visual elements

* Improve retention and watch time

* Follow a clear content style (we will provide direction)



---



REQUIREMENTS:



* Strong experience editing short-form content

* Must understand viral editing styles (TikTok / Reels)

* Must be able to think creatively (not just follow instructions)

* Fast turnaround time

* Good English understanding



---



IMPORTANT:



To apply, include:



1. Your BEST 3 short-form edits (not long videos)

2. The word "FLOW" at the start of your application

3. A short explanation of what makes a video engaging



Applications without this will be ignored.



---



This is long-term work for the right person.

We are building a serious brand and need someone who can grow with us through out our ventures.

title: Fleet Operations Manager – Private Car Rental & Gig Economy Specialist
description:
Part-Time (Leading to Full-Time)

We are a growing private vehicle rental company specializing in providing high-quality, reliable economy vehicles to gig economy drivers (Uber, Lyft, DoorDash etc ). We are looking for an experienced, proactive Operations Manager to help us start, maintain, and scale our fleet.



This is not a data-entry role. You will be the "nerve center" of the business, responsible for protecting our assets and ensuring our drivers are successful and compliant.

Key Responsibilities:



 * Driver Vetting & Onboarding: Conduct deep background checks using tools like Intelius. Verify gig-worker stats and driver history.

 * Fleet Security: Monitor GPS tracking systems (Goldstar/LoJack) daily. Manage "starter-disable" protocols for late payments.

 * Marketing & Social Proof: Execute "back-foot" marketing strategies in local driver
 groups to maintain a 0% vacancy rate.

 * Administrative Management: Manage digital contracts, collect signatures (and thumbprints), and organize maintenance schedules.

 * Scaling Research: Use marketplaces to find high-ROI vehicles (Ford Fusions, Toyota Camrys) that fit our "90-day payoff" criteria.

 * Customer Support: Act as the primary point of contact for driver issues, payment reminders, and maintenance coordination.



Requirements:



 * Industry Experience: Previous experience in car rentals (Turo, HyreCar, or Private Fleet Management) is highly preferred.

 * Technical Literacy: Familiarity with GPS tracking software and remote kill-switch interfaces.

 * Communication: Elite English verbal and written skills. You must be comfortable "firmly" communicating with drivers regarding payments.

 * Entrepreneurial Mindset: You understand the goal is ROI and asset protection. You don't wait for instructions; you solve problems.

 * Hours: Must be available to work during CST business hours.



How to Apply:

 * Send a brief summary of your experience specifically in the automotive or rental industry.

 * Tell me which GPS or tracking software you have used in the past.

 * Use the subject line: "The Sauce: Fleet Manager Application"

Cold calling

Closing opportunities



You will be engaging directly with businesses and decision-makers across Sydney.

CANDIDATE REQUIREMENTS

Strong English communication (clear, confident speaking)

Sales or call centre experience highly preferred

Disciplined, reliable, and results-driven

Fast learner who can implement feedback immediately

Do NOT apply if:

This is a high-performance position and is not suitable for everyone.

INTERVIEW PROCESS

ABOUT EVERLUXE PROPERTY CARE



We are building a premium, scalable cleaning company across Sydney, focused on:



Professional systems and processes

title: Social Media Marketing Manager & Executive Assistant Support Role
description:
Looking for our next Social Media Marketing Manager & Executive Assistant 



We’re a fast-growing digital marketing agency, education & consulting business based in Australia Sydney, specialising in Meta Ads, content strategy, sales funnels, and conversion-focused marketing for service-based businesses.

We don’t do fluffy marketing, and we are driven by results.

Everything we create is designed to drive leads, sales, and measurable growth. Our clients range from health and fitness brands, online coaches, ecommerce and education businesses - all looking to generate more leads/sales & scale.



We’re now at the stage where execution speed matters more than ever, and we’re building a lean, small high performance to support that growth.

If you like moving fast, taking ownership, and actually seeing the impact of your work… you’ll fit right in.

We are a non-corporate business and don’t do things conventionally.



We’re looking for an experienced Social Media Marketing Manager/Executive Assistant to support the execution of content, paid ads, landing pages, automations, graphic design, day-to-day marketing operations and some EA admin work to support the founder



This role is focused on implementation and organisation and a bit of input with content strategy, so a minimum 3+ years experience with social media is neccesary. You’ll be working directly with the founder to help bring ideas to life quickly and consistently.



Role and Responsibilities:

This role is fluid. Different periods of the business will require different focuses — from content to ads to operations. You’ll be expected to adapt quickly and execute where needed.



CONTENT EXECUTION:

- Upload and schedule Instagram + TikTok content

- Write captions based on rough notes, voice notes, or direction,

- Repurpose content (reels ? carousels ? captions ?
s)

- Post and manage Instagram stories

- Research content ideas and viral trends on social media

- Organise content folders (Google Drive / Dropbox)

- Content Coordination

- Work directly with our video editor for ideation/briefs/scripts + content delivery 

- Ensure content is ready and scheduled on time

- Request revisions and manage feedback loops

- Maintain a clear content pipeline (what’s done, what’s next)



ADS SUPPORT: (Execution of tasks only - Founder will guide you on strategy & how to do this) 

- Upload creatives into Meta Ads Manager

- Duplicate campaigns/ad sets and follow naming conventions

- Organise and create ad creatives on Canva (hooks, angles, winners)

- Pull basic performance metrics (CPL, leads, spend)



MARKETING & OPERATIONS:

- Upload and format landing pages in GoHighLevel 

- Manage basic
 follow-ups 

- Create landing pages and sales carts

- Create and set up funnels for digital products based on detailed instructions and ideas the founder has 

- Help execute the business ideas the founder has 

- Keep systems, folders, and client assets organised

- Assist with reporting and tracking performance

- Setting up automated workflows,
 triggers, and lead management to ensure no lead falls through the cracks.



EA/ADMIN:

- Own and execute day-to-day tasks end-to-end 

- Manage inbox, follow-ups, and communication with the founder to keep everything moving

- Draft proposals for prospective clients

- Build and maintain systems to improve efficiency and reduce manual work

- Send out invoices + contracts

- Identify bottlenecks and proactively solve them before they slow down the business





Ideal Skills + Experience

- Minimum 3+ years of experience in a marketing, social media/content and have experience in admin work. (You must have experience in social media NOT just admin)



- Experience of:

- Managing, creating & scheduling content on Instagram and/or TikTok

- Working in a fast-paced environment with tight deadlines

- Executing tasks quickly and accurately (not just planning)

- Creating automations and
 campaigns



Experience using most of these tools:

- Canva

- Meta Ads Manager (preferred but not required)

- Google Suite

- Trello (Optional) 

- Zapier 

- Miro (Optional)

- GoHighLevel or a similar CRM 

- Capcut



OTHER SKILLS:

- Highly organised and detail-oriented 

- Building funnels/landing pages

- Strong written English (for captions +
s)

- Fast executor - you get things done without overthinking and needing to be micromanaged 

- Able to follow instructions and take initiative

- Claude/AI tools 





What to expect:

- Pace of the agency & education/consulting business

- Fast-paced. We move quickly, test ideas, and prioritise execution over perfection.



Hours & Timezone

This is a full time role but can be part time to start and slowly transition into full time within 90 days but must eventually be FT so please do not apply if you can not work full time.

Must be able to work within or overlap with AEST (Sydney time).



Support

- You’ll work directly with the founder with clear direction, briefs, and systems in place. You won’t be left guessing what to do and you will be able to upskill. 

- Great work culture and flexibility 

- Small of 3, lean team focused on output and results. No corporate layers, no unnecessary meetings, we prefer as few meetings as possible and just letting you execute the tasks!



Growth opportunity

- As the business grows, there’s opportunity to take on more responsibility and move into a higher-level role and manage people.

- Perks & Benefits

- 14 days paid annual leave per year after working for a minimum of 8 months

- Australian public holidays observed

- Option to take up to 3 Philippines public holidays of your choice

- Performance-based bonuses based on output and consistency

- Professional Development: We are big on professional development, and you’ll be coached by the founder and have access to upskilling when required.





How to Apply?

Please do the following below and share with 



TO APPLY:

- Tell me why you're good fit for this job in no more than 4-5 sentences to the above

- Must fill out this JotForm application - LINK: 

- (OPTIONAL but preferred) Share an example of content or work you’ve previously executed that you’re proud of. You can attach any links/files to 
 or send a screen recording on Loom.

- Send me your CV with your portfolio with the SUBJECT LINE & secret word “Blueberries” followed by your name





Any applications without the secret word and have not completed the JotForm will not be considered for the role.

title: Operations & Fulfilment Coordinator
description:
GCB is a Queensland-based windows and doors business going through an exciting transformation. After six years as a family business, we're building out a fully professional team with new systems and clear processes. This is a ground-floor opportunity to own a critical role as we scale.



About the Role



Once the sales team closes a deal, it lands with you. You are the engine that makes sure every order is fulfilled accurately, every customer is kept in the loop, and every delivery happens on time — and only after payment is received.



Your core responsibilities:



• Generate invoices and confirm deposits are received before any order is placed

• Triple-check every order (colour, size, specifications) with the customer before sending to the manufacturer — you are the last line of defence against costly errors

• Prepare and send orders to the manufacturer with complete accuracy

• Proactively update customers on order status — they should never need to call wondering what's happening

• Handle customer calls and complaints professionally, set clear expectations, and follow through on every resolution

• Ensure completion payments are received before any delivery is dispatched

• Coordinate with the warehouse manager on incoming deliveries and delivery scheduling

• Log and maintain all activity in Zoho CRM — accurate records are non-negotiable

• Support the sales team during high-volume periods to help prepare quotes (secondary responsibility)



Systems you'll use:



• Zoho CRM — daily hub for order tracking and customer communications

• Zoho Quoting — for reviewing and supporting quote preparation

• Xero — for invoicing and tracking payments



What We're Looking For



• Proven background in operations, order management, or customer service coordination

• Exceptional attention to detail — this is the #1 requirement

• Strong written and verbal communication skills in English

• Comfortable managing unhappy customers and resolving issues calmly

• Proactive mindset — you spot problems before the customer does

• Reliable, organised, and self-managing

• Available 8am–4pm AEST, Monday–Friday + occasional Saturdays



Role Details:



• Full-time, 8 hours/day

• Fully remote

• Queensland business hours: 8am–4pm AEST



THIS ROLE IS FOR YOU if you:



• Have a system for everything and never let things fall through the cracks

• Take pride in being proactive — customers never need to chase you because you've already reached out

• Stay calm and professional when a customer is unhappy and turn complaints into positive outcomes

• Have high attention to detail — you triple-check things before sending because you know the cost of getting it wrong

• Thrive in a growing, fast-moving business where you can genuinely shape how things are done



DO NOT APPLY if you:



• Need to be constantly told what to do or chased for updates

• Get flustered when customers are upset or frustrated

• Are sloppy with details — wrong measurements, wrong colours, wrong specs cost real money

• Have never used a CRM or don't know what Xero is

• Are looking for a relaxed, low-accountability role

• Can't commit to 8am–4pm Queensland time (AEST), Monday–Friday (and occasional Saturdays)



How to Apply — MUST complete all three:



Tell us about a time you caught an error before it became a problem — what happened and what did you do?



Describe how you manage multiple tasks or active orders at once — what system do you use?



Complete this DISC personality assessment (~10 mins) and send a screenshot of your pie chart:

???? https://www.123test.com/disc-personality-test/



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

title: Content and Media Operator
description:
We are hiring a Content and Media Operator to help keep our marketing consistent and moving.



This role is responsible for taking raw footage, photos, ideas, and content direction and turning them into clean, organized, on brand content that gets edited, scheduled, and published on time.



This is not a creative director role.

This is not a strategy only role.



This is an execution role for someone who is fast, organized, dependable, and strong at following through.



If you are the type to wait around for constant reminders or need heavy hand holding to get things done, this is not the role for you.



Primary Objective

Make sure content never goes silent by consistently editing, organizing, scheduling, and preparing content across platforms.



Key Responsibilities

• Edit raw video into short form content optimized for engagement and retention

• Repurpose one piece of content into multiple platform ready assets

• Edit and format photos for social posts, covers, thumbnails, carousels, and promo content

• Add captions, text overlays, simple branding, and clean visual formatting

• Organize raw footage, finished assets, folders, and content libraries properly

• Maintain and follow a content calendar

• Prepare content for posting and scheduling across platforms

• Deliver content on time without needing repeated follow up

• Communicate clearly with the team when something is missing, delayed, or needs clarification



What We Need From You

• Strong video editing ability

• Basic photo editing and content design ability

• Good eye for clean formatting and visual presentation

• Strong organization and file management

• Ability to follow direction and still make smart execution decisions

• Consistent communication

• Speed, reliability, and respect for deadlines



Preferred Experience

• Experience editing short form content for social media

• Familiarity with CapCut, Adobe Premiere, Canva, Photoshop, or similar tools

• Experience working with content calendars and scheduled posting

• Experience supporting a brand, business, or personal brand with ongoing content production



Who This Role Is Best For

This role is best for someone who enjoys production and execution.

You do not need to be the mastermind behind the brand.

You do need to be someone who can take direction, move fast, stay organized, and help us keep content flowing consistently.



Creativity matters.

Consistency, speed, and follow through matter more.



Performance Expectations

• Content is delivered on schedule

• Edits are clean and need minimal revisions

• Files and assets stay organized

• Communication is clear and timely

• Posting and content preparation stay consistent

• Marketing stays active instead of going quiet for days or weeks



Work Details

• Remote position

• Part time or full time

• Flexible schedule, but deadlines must be respected

• Starting at $5 per hour

• Around 25 hours per week to start, with room to grow for the right person



Application Instructions

To apply, send:

• Links to your previous work

• A short message introducing yourself

• The tools you use for video editing and photo editing

• Any experience you have with scheduling or posting content

• The word “consistent” in your application so I know you read everything



Applications that do not follow instructions will not be reviewed.

title: Corporate Sales Manager – Real Estate Solutions
description:
Job Position is BASED IN SINGAPORE




.sg



Full job description : 



Start Something Purposeful. 



At Urban Space Group , we believe in creating concepts that allow people, business and purpose to come together and thrive. We’re a privately owned real estate group dedicated to real estate concepts for industrial and commercial spaces. We are both owners of industrial properties, commercial shophouses and spaces, as well as operators of business models and concepts such as urbanspace self storage, Urbanpod workspace etc. 



We actively invest to expand our asset portfolio and grow our industrial and shophouse asset management capabilities and offerings.  



We’re looking for a Business Development and Sales Manager to bring our asset investment and management services to our clients, partners and stakeholders. 



Why Join Acuvest :



Your Mission :



To be part of the team to grow our asset portfolio and drive performance through innovations and teamwork. 



This is a full-stack business development and sales role with plenty of room to use your skillsets in sales, strategy, innovation and execution. You’ll lead a motivated team and collaborate closely with other departments. You will report to the Business Development / Sales Director and play a critical role in the company’s performance. 



Why Join us :



- Mentored by management of a company with decades of experience in investment management, property management, development, and self-storage solutions across Singapore and the region. We combine strategic insight with innovation, offering real opportunities to grow and make an impact across a diversified real estate portfolio.



- Build an Elite Network: Connect directly with a high-value network of Corporate and SME business leaders / decision-makers, building a powerful network for your long-term career success. 



- Thrive in a High-Growth Self-Storage Sector. Our self-storage business, Co-working business space, E-commerce fulfilment hubs, serve both individual and corporate clients with flexible space solutions in a fast-rising market. You’ll be at the forefront of lead generation, networking, and deal closing—driving measurable results in an expanding industry.



- Collaborative Culture. Real Career Progression. Work with experienced professionals across property and investment teams, gain exposure to full deal cycles, build strong client relationships, and accelerate your career in sales and business development at Acuvest.



Full job description : What you will be doing



Property Leasing : 



- Develop and implement leasing strategies and initiatives to maximize occupancy, rental income, and tenant satisfaction 



- Identify leasing opportunities and prospective tenants that align with the positioning and target market of each property, and develop relationships with tenants and prospective tenants. 



- Negotiate lease agreements, including terms and conditions, rental rates, lease incentives, and lease renewals, and ensure compliance with company policies and industry standards. 



- Collaborate with property management teams to conduct market research and analysis, assess competitive landscape, and identify trends and opportunities in the property market. 



- Develop and maintain leasing budgets, forecasts, and reports, and track leasing activity, occupancy rates, and financial performance against targets and benchmarks. 



- Manage tenant relations and communication, including addressing tenant inquiries, resolving disputes, and ensuring tenant compliance with lease terms and property rules and regulations. 



- Represent the company at industry events, trade shows, and networking opportunities to promote our properties and attract potential tenants and partners. 



Self storage and Co working space sales : 



- Work closely self storage sales team and management on drive the sales and occupancy of our self storage business. 

Enjoy interacting with customers, drive Sales, customer service and relationship management. 



- Actively manage customer enquiries through telephone,
 and messaging applications 



- Providing sales service & consultation to all potential customers 



- Working with Team to formulate marketing promotions and collateral 



- Building relationship with Co-working space, Self Storage and E-commence fulfilment centre customers. 





Requirements : Who we are looking for.



- Strong business acumen and a strategic mindset. Enterprenuerial mindset 



- An outgoing, optimistic personality with exceptional interpersonal skills. Strong networking and interpersonal skills. 



- The ability to communicate confidently and effectively at all levels. Excellent communication skills, with the ability to build relationships and influence stakeholders at all levels. 



- Minimum of 5 years of experience working experience. 



- Strong understanding of leasing principles, market dynamics, and negotiation strategies in the real estate industry. 



- Proven track record of successfully negotiating lease agreements, driving occupancy, and achieving leasing targets and goals. 



- Strong analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to analyze market data, evaluate leasing opportunities, and make data-driven decisions. 



- Results-oriented mindset with a focus on driving leasing outcomes and delivering exceptional customer service to tenants and partners. 



- Ability to manage multiple projects and priorities simultaneously in a fast-paced, deadline-driven environment. 



- An eagerness to learn and grow through hard work and dedication

title: Digital Marketing VA for Fast-Growing Online Course
description:
Job Description

About Us

Cut to the Case (
) is an online consulting interview prep course built by a former McKinsey interviewer. We've helped 130+ students land offers at McKinsey, BCG, and Bain. The course is priced at $69 with lifetime access and has strong word-of-mouth 
ntum. We're now ready to pour fuel on the fire with paid ads and content marketing.

We're a lean, fast-moving one-person operation backed by an LLC. You won't be buried in bureaucracy. You'll have real ownership, fast feedback loops, and direct access to the founder.



The Role

You'll be our first marketing hire. You'll own the setup and day-to-day execution of our digital marketing channels. This is NOT a "schedule some posts" role — you'll be building ad accounts from scratch, creating ad creatives, testing copy, and optimizing spend.



What You'll Do



Set up ad accounts on: Meta 
/Instagram), Google Ads, Reddit Ads, TikTok Ads, LinkedIn Ads

Create ad creatives: static images (Canva), short-form video ads (CapCut or similar), carousel ads

Write ad copy: headlines, descriptions, CTAs — we'll give you the angle, you write variations

Launch and manage campaigns: set up targeting, budgets, A/B tests

Monitor performance daily: CTR, CPC, ROAS — report weekly in a shared Google Sheet

Create and schedule organic social media content (LinkedIn,
/X, TikTok, Reddit)

Engage in relevant Reddit/
munities (authentically, not spammy)

Help with
 sequences (welcome
s, abandoned cart, re-engagement)

Light landing page tweaks if needed (HTML/CSS is a plus, not required)





You're a Great Fit If You



Have 1+ years of hands-on experience running Meta Ads or Google Ads (not just boosting posts — actual Ads Manager experience)

Can show screenshots of past ad dashboards with real metrics (spend, CTR, conversions)

Know your way around Canva and can create clean, modern ad creatives quickly

Can edit short-form video (CapCut, InShot, or similar) — even basic cuts, text overlays, captions

Write clean English copy (doesn't need to be perfect grammar — needs to be punchy and clear)

Are comfortable working independently with minimal hand-holding

Are responsive on Slack/WhatsApp during agreed working hours

Have a bias toward action — you try things, test fast, and report what worked





Bonus Points (Not Required)



Experience marketing online courses or digital products

Familiarity with Teachable, Gumroad, or similar platforms

Experience with SEO or blog content writing

Experience with
 marketing tools (Mailchimp, ConvertKit, etc.)

Familiarity with consulting/MBA recruiting space





What We Offer



$5–7/hr USD, paid weekly via Wise or PayPal

Part-time (20 hrs/week) with clear path to full-time if results are strong

Full creative ownership — you're not executing someone else's playbook, you're building ours together

Direct access to the founder — no layers, no politics

Performance bonuses tied to revenue milestones

A product that actually helps people (130+ MBB offers and counting)





To Apply

Send a message that includes:



A 2–3 sentence intro about yourself

Links to or screenshots of ONE ad campaign you managed (with metrics)

ONE sample ad creative you've made (image or video — can be for any product)

Your hourly rate expectation in USD

Your available hours per week and timezone



Do NOT send a generic "I am a hardworking VA" message. Show me your work.

We will respond to every qualified application within 48 hours. Top candidates will receive a paid trial task ($20) before we make a decision.Content
