title: TikTok & Meta Creative + Ads Manager for Mobile Apps
description:
I’m looking for a creative?plus?performance marketer to handle TikTok and Meta content and paid ads for my iOS and Android apps. You’ll own everything from researching what works, to making the creatives, to managing CPI and scaling winners.



What you’ll do

Research top?performing ads and organic posts for similar apps, reverse?engineer the hooks, angles and formats.



Plan and create a variety of short?form videos and image creatives: UGC, role?play / character scenarios, AI?assisted or stylized concepts, product demos, testimonials, skits, etc.



Manage organic posting on TikTok and Meta (Reels/Feed/Stories): scheduling, basic engagement, and iteration based on performance.



Set up and manage app?install campaigns on TikTok Ads Manager and Meta Ads Manager: audiences, budgets, creative testing, and scaling.



Track CPI and key in?app behaviours (install ? first use ? trial/subscription) and report results in a simple weekly summary with clear next steps.



What you should bring

Proven experience running TikTok and Meta campaigns that drove installs or sales (please show examples).



Strong short?form creative skills: scripting hooks, planning shots, editing vertical video, writing high?converting captions/headlines.



Comfortable experimenting with multiple creative styles (not only UGC) and iterating quickly based on data.



Able to work to CPI targets and daily budgets, and adjust when performance changes.



Solid English and clear, concise written communication.



Practical details

Part?time to start (10-20 hours/week) with potential to increase based on results.



Long?term relationship if you can consistently produce winning creatives and lower CPI.



You’ll get access to the apps, ad accounts, and shared folders for assets.



How to apply

Please send:



Links to 3–5 TikTok or Meta ads you created or managed, plus a one?line metric for each (e.g. “CPI $2.10 US, 2.8% CTR, 1M impressions”).



A short paragraph on how you’d approach the first 2 weeks of testing creatives and audiences for a new mobile app launch.



Your expected hourly rate (USD) and your available hours per week.



Start your subject line with exactly "No More Bedtime Battles" so I know you read the whole post.

title: Social Media Growth Manager and PA — Swiss Tech Founder, 3 Companies (Full-Time Remote)
description:
===========================

ABOUT US

===========================



Glenty SA is a Swiss holding company building three tech ventures at once:



• Centuris — A decentralized crypto exchange (DEX) with a proprietary index token (TOPX)

• Spark — Premium connected hardware (flagship: Swisscase, a smart case for Rolex watches)

• Unity — An AI-powered local assistant with intelligent routing (pre-launch)



The founder is a 33-year-old Swiss entrepreneur who travels the world full-time. He needs a sharp, hungry social media operator who can build and grow the online presence of all three brands AND his personal founder brand from scratch.



This is a ground-floor opportunity. You won't be posting templates for a boring corporate page. You'll be building the digital identity of a founder and his companies across crypto, luxury tech, and AI. If you're the kind of person who checks their analytics before breakfast, this role is for you.





===========================

WHAT YOU'LL DO

===========================



SOCIAL MEDIA GROWTH (75% of your time)

---------------------------------------

• Own and operate 5-6 accounts across Instagram,
/X, LinkedIn, TikTok, and YouTube

• Create and publish daily content: posts, Reels, Stories, threads, carousels, short-form videos

• Build platform-specific growth strategies for each brand and the founder's personal account

• Engage daily: reply to comments, answer DMs, build relationships with key accounts in each niche

• Research trending formats, hooks, sounds, and hashtags — and implement them fast

• Track analytics weekly: followers, engagement rate, reach, impressions. Report what works and what doesn't

• Source and repurpose content: UGC, industry news, competitor insights

• Brief the founder on what content to capture during his travels (photo/video shot lists)



PERSONAL ASSISTANT TASKS (25% of your time)

---------------------------------------------

• Manage DMs across all platforms: filter, respond, and flag important messages

• Handle partnership and collaboration requests (respond, negotiate, schedule calls)

• Research tasks: competitor analysis, influencer/creator sourcing, industry trend reports

• Sourcing: find photographers, videographers, models, and agencies for brand content shoots

• Light admin: file organization, tool management, updating spreadsheets





===========================

ACCOUNTS YOU'LL MANAGE

===========================



1. Anthony (Founder Personal Brand) — IG, X, LinkedIn

   Tech founder lifestyle. Travel, behind-the-scenes, building in public. Aspirational but real.



2. Centuris — X, LinkedIn, YouTube

   Crypto/DeFi education, TOPX index updates, market commentary. Smart, not hype.



3. Spark — IG, TikTok, YouTube

   Luxury product showcase, Swisscase for Rolex. Visual-first, premium feel, desire-driven.



4. Unity — X, LinkedIn

   AI industry commentary, product teasers, tech community. Build pre-launch audience.





===========================

SKILLS WE'RE LOOKING FOR

===========================



MUST-HAVE:

• Proven experience growing social media accounts for businesses (show us the numbers — not just your personal page)

• Native or near-native English — US market-ready copy with zero grammar errors

• Strong knowledge of Instagram (Reels, Stories, algorithm),
/X (threads, engagement loops), and LinkedIn

• Design skills: Canva is the minimum. You should be able to create clean, scroll-stopping posts and carousels

• Basic photo retouching: color correction, cropping, filters — make average photos look professional

• Basic video editing: CapCut, InShot, or similar — cut Reels, add text overlays, sync to music

• Familiarity with AI tools for content creation (ChatGPT, Midjourney, Runway, etc.)

• Self-starter — you don't wait for instructions, you bring ideas and solutions

• Available full-time (40 hrs/week) with flexibility to overlap US and European time zones



NICE-TO-HAVE (will set you apart):

• Experience with crypto/Web3/DeFi content

• Experience with luxury or premium brand positioning

• Paid ads experience (Meta Ads,
 Ads)

• YouTube/TikTok SEO and optimization knowledge

• Photography or videography direction skills



For advanced design work, complex video production, or specialized tasks beyond your skill set, you can brief and coordinate external professionals — the founder covers those costs. Your job is to be the creative director of the content pipeline, not necessarily do everything yourself.





===========================

COMPENSATION

===========================



• Performance bonus at year-end based on realistic growth targets set together during onboarding

• Salary increases based on proven results — we reward people who deliver

• Budget for external pros (designers, videographers) when needed — you coordinate, the founder pays

• Direct access to the founder — no middle management, no red tape

• Real growth opportunity: as the companies scale, this role grows into Head of Social / Brand Director

• Paid time off (15 days/year)





===========================

HOW TO APPLY

===========================



Do NOT send a generic cover letter. We've seen thousands. Instead, include ALL of the following:



1. Links to accounts you've managed with before/after metrics (screenshots welcome)

2. A 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself and telling us why you're the right person for this

3. Pick ONE of our brands (
, Spark.Tech, or the founder's personal brand) and create 3 post ideas with captions you would publish in your first week

4. Your available start date



Applications missing the Loom video or post ideas will be skipped. We want people who take action, not people who write nice
s.



Start your application with the words "GROWTH ENGINE" so we know you actually read the full post.

title: Video Editor for High-Performance Meta Ads
description:
We're a growing ecommerce brand and looking to bring on new editors to expand. 



What we need is more talented editors who can execute at pace while exploring fresh angles.



If you care about performance data, creative strategy, and actually seeing the impact of your work - keep reading.



What You'll Be Doing:



1. Editing 10–15 direct-response video ads per week from detailed creative briefs

2. Building new variations of proven winners to help us scale what's already working

3. Working directly alongside our creative strategists - daily feedback, daily collaboration

4. Researching competitor ads and market trends so you understand what's performing

5. Using industry-leading tools — ElevenLabs, HeyGen, Higgsfield, VEO, Midjourney, and more

6. Reviewing performance data so you can apply real insights to every edit



What We're Focused On:



1. AI-assisted and B-roll driven editing

2. Ads built to convert — not just look pretty

3. Compliance-safe creative for Meta (this is where most editors slip up)

4. High volume output: we'd rather see 10 ads at 80% than 1 at 100%





Who We're Looking For



1. Editors with ecommerce experience and a portfolio to back it up

2. People who move fast, communicate clearly, and take ownership of their output

3. Someone passionate about the craft who puts genuine effort into every piece

4. Available on Slack Monday–Saturday and ready to commit properly

5. Hungry to learn - not just about editing, but about marketing and creative strategy



Don't apply if:



1. You have no ecommerce ad experience or portfolio

2. You've never worked with AI editing tools

3. You're after something casual or part-time

4. You're not prepared to work weekends when the workload demands it





What You Get:



1. Fully remote, flexible working hours

2. Direct training and mentorship from experienced creative strategists

3. Full transparency on ad performance - you'll see exactly what's scaling and why

4. Access to best-in-class AI and creative tools

5. A real growth path, not a dead-end freelance loop



Growth Path:

If you want to develop into a marketer and not just stay behind the timeline, this is the place to do it.

title: Graphic Designer & Video Editor (with Social Media Skills)
description:
We’re Firestarter—a fast-growing international creative company helping entrepreneurs and experts build high-caliber brands. Through our creative agency, coaching programs, and digital platforms, we combine strategy, design, and tech to empower leaders to step into their next-level vision. We’re hiring a full-time Graphic & Video Designer to join our team!



As our Graphic & Video Designer, you’ll work closely with our CEO/Creative Director and our Design & Brand Experience Lead to support both company brand presence and client projects. We have a lot of internal graphic design and other creative production needs sitting in the pipeline, and are excited for you to jump in and start working closely with our team. 



Responsibilities

- Graphic Design & Animation: Create professional graphics and branded assets using Canva, Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign), and other tools, including animated graphics. 

- Video Editing: Edit engaging videos for social media, podcasts, and YouTube (Premiere Pro, CapCut)

- Podcast Editing: Edit audio and video for company podcast

- Social Media Branding: Develop brand-aligned social assets, templates, and graphics.

- Website Updates: Keep websites fresh by interfacing with our development team to add new testimonials, client stories, and assets.

- Figma: Use for collaboration, mockups, and design workflows.



Preferred (but not required): GoHighLevel & funnel design experience for alignment with our digital platform work.



You’re a Great Fit If You…

 • Are highly creative with a sharp eye for branding and visual storytelling.

 • Have proven experience in both design and video editing.

 • Are detail-oriented, organized, and thrive in a remote, collaborative environment.

 • Can juggle priorities and move efficiently through varied daily, monthly, and weekly creative team needs. 

 • Are proactive, resourceful, a good team player and communicator, and willing to learn new tools.



Requirements

 • Strong portfolio showcasing graphic design and video editing work.

 • Proven experience with: Canva, Adobe Creative Suite, Premiere Pro, CapCut, Figma.

 • Reliable internet connection and a professional home office setup. Our team communicates via Slack & Zoom. 

 • Excellent written and spoken English communication skills. Comfortable on camera meeting with team & clients. 

 • Ability to work US hours - ideally Eastern Time 9am-5pm ET



Bonus Skills (Nice to Have)

 • GoHighLevel platform familiarity (we run our company on GoHighLevel and have a white label SaaS for clients)

 • Funnel design experience.



What We Offer

 • Full-time, long-term role with a fast-growing international creative company.

 • Work-from-home flexibility.

 • Professional growth opportunities, including optional GoHighLevel certification training.

 • A supportive, collaborative team environment where your creativity and ideas are valued.

 • Competitive salary (to be discussed based on experience).



Learn more about us:

title: Xactimate Insurance Supplement Specialist (Roofing | Part-Time | Per Job Pay)
description:
We are a growing roofing and exterior company looking for a reliable Xactimate estimator to assist with insurance claims on a part-time basis.



You will be responsible for reviewing insurance scopes, rebuilding estimates when needed, and identifying missing line items to maximize claim value.



This is not a customer-facing role. You will not be speaking with homeowners or insurance adjusters. Your focus is strictly on building accurate, complete estimates and supplement scopes.



We currently have a small volume (around 5 jobs per month) but are looking to grow.



Responsibilities:

Review insurance scope of loss and photos

Rebuild estimates in Xactimate when needed

Identify and add missing line items

Prepare supplement-ready estimates

Ensure estimates are clean, organized, and accurate

Turnaround time: 24–48 hours per file



Compensation:

$50 per estimate

Performance bonus: $50–$150 per project based on approved supplements



Strong performance will lead to consistent work and increased volume.



Requirements (Must Have):

Experience using Xactimate (roofing preferred)

Ability to review a scope and identify missing items without needing measurements ordered

Understanding of roofing systems and common insurance omissions

Ability to write clear, professional supplement notes

Strong attention to detail



What We’re Looking For:

We are not looking for someone to simply copy the insurance scope.



We want someone who can:

Catch what others miss

Think through the full scope of the job

Build estimates that put us in a strong position when negotiating with insurance



Application Process:

If you seem like a good fit, we will send a simple test project to evaluate your ability to review a scope and Identify missing items. And then Build a clean estimate



This is the most important step in our hiring process.



How to Apply:



Please include:

Your experience with Xactimate

Types of projects you’ve worked on (roofing, siding, etc.)

A brief explanation of how you identify missing items in an insurance scope



Final Note:

We value accuracy, speed, and the ability to think critically through a project. If you’re detail-oriented and take pride in your work, this will be a great fit.

title: GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist | Onboarding, Client Support, Funnels & Automations  (Full-Time, Remote)
description:
We are looking for an experienced GoHighLevel (GHL) Specialist to join our team full-time, with a primary focus on client onboarding, customer support, and ongoing client success.



This role is ideal for someone who is highly skilled in GHL, but just as importantly, excels in communication, client experience, and guiding users with clarity and confidence.



You will play a key role in both client-facing support as well as behind-the-scenes technical execution — helping ensure everything we build for clients is working smoothly, optimized, and set up for success.





What You’ll Be Doing



Client Onboarding & Support

• Lead 1:1 and group onboarding calls via Zoom

• Walk clients through platform setup and best practices, based around the needs of their specific business

• Answer client questions via
, chat, and messaging in a timely, professional way

• Provide ongoing support to ensure clients are fully utilizing the platform



Customer Experience & Communication

• Act as a key point of contact for client questions and needs

• Maintain a high level of responsiveness, clarity, and care in all communication

• Support clients inside our community (Slack and GHL FF Community)

• Help create a positive, supportive, and high-touch client experience



GHL Technical Support & Optimization

• Support implementation of funnels built by our team (not primary builder)

• Set up and refine automations, workflows, pipelines, and integrations

• Test funnels, forms, and user flows to ensure everything is working correctly

• Troubleshoot issues and proactively identify opportunities for improvement

• Assist in optimizing client systems based on performance and usage



Team Collaboration

• Work closely with internal tea
mbers across strategy, design, and marketing

• Help ensure smooth handoff between strategy, build, and client experience

• Communicate clearly around client needs and technical updates

• Help document processes and improve systems over time





Who We’re Looking For



This is not an entry-level role.



We are looking for someone who has strong experience inside GoHighLevel and is equally comfortable supporting clients directly and contributing behind the scenes.



Required

• Advanced experience with GoHighLevel (GHL)

• Strong understanding of automations, workflows, pipelines, and integrations

• Experience leading onboarding calls (1:1 and/or group)

• Excellent spoken and written English

• Strong customer support and communication skills 

• Comfortable being both client-facing and working behind the scenes

• Highly organized, proactive, and detail-oriented



Strongly Preferred

• GHL Certification

• Experience supporting online businesses (coaches, consultants, creators)

• Experience with
 marketing and automation

• Experience supporting communities or group programs



Work Schedule



• Full-time (40 hours per week) or almost full time (30 hrs. min)

• Must be available to work Eastern Time (ET) hours (USA)

• Required for real-time collaboration with our team and clients





What Success Looks Like



• Clients feel supported, confident, and taken care of

• Onboarding calls are clear, smooth, and empowering

• Client questions are answered quickly and thoughtfully

• Funnels, automations, and systems are properly set up, tested, and optimized

• Internal team workflows feel smooth and well-coordinated

• You become a trusted, reliable point of contact for both clients and team





About Firestarter Funnels



Firestarter Funnels is part of the broader Firestarter ecosystem, founded by entrepreneur Willa Kammerer.



We support entrepreneurs, coaches, and business owners in building high-caliber personal brands and scalable online businesses through strategy, systems, and execution. Learn more here: 



Our platform is built on GoHighLevel and provides an all-in-one solution for funnels, websites, CRM, automations,
 marketing, and community — combined with hands-on support and guidance.





How to Apply



Please include:



• A short introduction about your experience with GoHighLevel

• Examples of your experience with onboarding and client support

• Any relevant examples of automations or systems you’ve worked on

• Confirmation that you are available full-time during Eastern Time hours

- Bonus: a video introduction



We are looking for someone who takes ownership, communicates clearly, wants to be part of a great team building something for the long term, and genuinely cares about client success.



If that sounds like you, we’d love to hear from you.

title: SEO Content Specialist (Blog Writer & On-Page SEO Manager)
description:
Role Overview



We’re looking for a detail-oriented SEO Content Specialist to support our growing client portfolio at Warren Digital. This role focuses on publishing and optimising blog content for SEO — not creating strategy.



You’ll be responsible for executing clearly defined SEO tasks to improve rankings, internal linking, and overall on-page performance across client sites.



Note: This is an execution-focused role. No strategy creation is required.



Key Responsibilities

Content Publishing & Optimisation

Upload and publish blog content across client websites (primarily WordPress or similar CMS)

Format content for readability (headings, spacing, lists, etc.)

Add and optimise images (including generating AI images when required)

Ensure all blogs meet SEO best practices before publishing

On-Page SEO Execution

Write and optimise:

Meta titles & descriptions

H1–H3 structure

Image alt text

URL slugs

Implement schema markup (Article, FAQ, etc.)

Apply E-E-A-T principles (Experience, Expertise, Authority, Trust)

Ensure proper keyword placement and density

Internal Linking

Add relevant internal links across blogs and service pages

Identify linking opportunities to improve site structure and SEO authority

Content Enhancement

Improve existing blog posts with:

Updated formatting

Better keyword targeting

Additional internal links

Image enhancements

EEAT improvements (author signals, credibility, trust elements)

Requirements

Proven experience in SEO content publishing

Strong understanding of:

On-page SEO

Meta tags & schema markup

Internal linking strategies

E-E-A-T principles

Experience with CMS platforms (WordPress preferred)

Ability to generate or source relevant images (AI tools like Midjourney, DALL·E, etc. are a plus)

High attention to detail and consistency

Nice to Have

Experience with SurferSEO, Ahrefs, SEMrush, or similar tools

Basic understanding of technical SEO

Copywriting skills for conversion-focused content

Experience developing AI prompts for content and meta tag generation

Compensation

$5 USD per hour

Ongoing work for the right candidate

Application Requirements



To be considered, please submit:



1. 3-Minute Loom Video



Explain:



Your experience with SEO content publishing

Your process for optimising a blog post

Tools you use

2. Practical Test Task



Visit: 



Provide a short audit outlining:



5 specific things you would do to improve the site’s SEO, for example:



Content improvements

Internal linking opportunities

On-page SEO fixes

Technical or UX suggestions

Blog/content strategy ideas



(Be specific — we’re looking for actionable insights, not generic advice.)

title: (LOOKING NOW) Social Media Manager & Video Editor (PART-TIME, LONG-TERM)
description:
Generation God is looking for a creative and faith-aligned Content Creator & Social Media Manager to help grow and engage our audience across our social platforms. You’ll lead content execution, manage our brand’s online presence, build our community voice and grow the business through its social pillars.

We’re looking for someone who thrives on creating content that’s real, relatable, viral, and spiritually rooted. If you find joy in seeing your work make an impact, both in results and in meaning, and you have a proactive mindset to test ideas and bring concepts to life, we want you on the team.



Key Responsibilities:



1. Social Media Management & Posting

- Manage our TikTok and Instagram daily

- Post organic content consistently. Reels, TikToks, stories, carousels, static posts.

- Respond to comments, DMs, story replies, and tagged posts

- Repost UGC and customer content that fits our brand

- Keep all channels active and on brand



2. Content Editing & Creation

- Edit short-form video content for TikTok and Reels (viral, organic style)

- Create branded graphics and story content in Canva

- Edit and reformat influencer and UGC content for reposting

- Primary tools: CapCut and Canva



3. Content Strategy & Planning

- Plan and manage a content calendar with the founder

- Research trends (sounds, formats, hooks, topics) and bring ideas regularly

- Track performance and put together bi-weekly reports

- Stay across what's working for DTC and fashion brands on TikTok and Instagram



4. Paid Ad Creative Support

- Reformat existing video assets into ad variations for Meta 
 + Instagram)

- Deliver ad creatives on time in coordination with the founder or ad manager

- Understand the basics of direct-response ads. Hooks, pain points, social proof, CTAs.



5. Brand & Community

- Know our brand voice, aesthetic, and mission inside out

- Make sure everything we post feels authentic and on brand

- Suggest ideas to grow engagement and followers organically



This Role is NOT For You If:

- You want to post and log off. We need someone who cares about what they put out.

- You need hand-holding for every task. We want initiative.

- You see this as just another VA gig. We need someone who gets the mission.



Who We're Looking For:

Character and taste matter more than a long resume. We'd rather someone with a sharp eye for what works and the drive to prove it than someone with years of corporate social media experience.



- You're plugged into TikTok and Instagram. You know what's trending and why it works.

- You know how to edit short form content via Capcut

- You have a good eye for aesthetics and what feels on brand

- You're results oriented. You care about what performs, not just what looks nice.

- You're proactive. You bring ideas, not just wait for instructions.

- You've worked with Meta ad creatives before, or you're willing to learn fast

- Comfortable working async with someone in an Australian timezone



Growth:

Starting at 20 to 25 hours per week, with a clear path to full time. If you're the right fit, there's also opportunity to take on work across a second brand we're connected to. We want someone long-term who's building with us.



How to Apply:

Please include:

1. A short video (1-2 min) introducing yourself and why you'd be a good fit

2. Your resume or portfolio with social media and video editing work

3. Links to accounts you've managed (with metrics if possible)

4. 2-3 examples of short-form video you've edited



Let’s build something that matters.

Together.

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Fully Flexible, $3,000-$5,000 / month)
description:
Before applying, complete the following (incomplete applications will not be reviewed):

- Share 3 videos you've edited, not a portfolio page, just 3 specific links. For each one, write one sentence on why you're proud of it.

- Watch this video: https://drive.google.com/file/d/1bamjMX35cpjt3qHoT8pEnfRIupRShGto/view?usp=sharing and tell us what you would change about the editing and why.

- Start your application message with the phrase "I'm ready!"



Role Overview



We are looking for a highly creative and results-driven Performance Video Editor to join our team. Your mission will be to create high-performing organic video for Instagram and TikTok that don't look like ads. If you have a knack for creating content that stops the scroll and engages audiences, we want to talk to you.



This is a long-term, fully remote position for an editor who is passionate about the intersection of creativity and data, and is excited by the opportunity to have their work directly impact business results.



What You'll Do:



- Edit raw footage into compelling, fast-paced short-form video tailored for organic TikToks and Instagram Reels.

- Incorporate viral trends, engaging hooks, and retention-focused pacing to maximize performance.

- Add dynamic captions, relevant B-roll, and sound design to create a native viewing experience.

- Collaborate with our marketing team to test new creative concepts and iterate on winning ads to scale campaigns.

- Analyze ad performance to understand what resonates with the audience and apply those insights to future edits.



Who We're Looking For:



- A Viral Content Creator: You have proven experience creating organic short-form videos (TikToks, Reels) that have achieved significant reach and engagement. You understand what makes content shareable and how to capture attention in the first three seconds.

- A Performance-Minded Editor: You are excited by the idea of your creative work driving measurable results. Experience editing direct-response or paid social ads is a major plus.

- CapCut or Premiere Pro Whiz: You are highly proficient in a fast-paced editing workflow using modern tools.

- Excellent Communicator: You have strong English skills and are reliable, detail-oriented, and can work independently.

- Available & Ready: You have a perfect internet connection and are available to dedicate 3-4 hours daily to this role.

- This is a part-time remote role requiring approximately 24 hours per week (around 4 hours per day, Monday to Saturday), with the potential to grow into a full-time position based on performance.



Compensation & Growth: Earn Based on Performance



We believe in rewarding top talent for outstanding results. This role offers a unique compensation structure designed to give you significant earning potential.



- Base Rate: You will start with a competitive base rate of $10 per hour (596 PHP / hour)

- Performance Bonuses: On top of your hourly rate, you will earn substantial monthly bonuses for creating viral videos and "winning" ads that meet or exceed performance targets. Our bonus structure is uncapped.

- Earning Potential: Our top-performing editors consistently earn $3,000 - $5,000+ per month by creating ads that convert.



This is not a gig. It is a long-term partnership. Most of our editors have been with us for over a year, and we are committed to investing in your growth and success.



Why Join Our Team?



- Fully Remote: Work from anywhere in the world.

- Flexible Schedule: Manage your own hours and workflow.

- Direct Impact: See your creative work translate directly into business success and your own earnings.

- Growth & Stability: Join a team that values long-term relationships and provides ongoing training and opportunities.

title: Data Validation Expert
description:
About Fundable



At Fundable, we are building a new-age startup intelligence platform. We combine

advanced web-scraping and LLMs to track VC-backed startups in real-time, sourcing

and extracting key financing details from the latest press releases. Our mission is to

provide the most comprehensive, accurate, and up-to-date data on the startup

ecosystem, offering real-time deal coverage and transparent sourcing as a cost

effective alternative to industry leaders.



Job Description: Data Validator

We are seeking a detail-oriented Data Validator to assist with reviewing, verifying, and

validating data ingested from our pipeline.



This is an integral role for our startup. As an early-stage company, this position offers

the unique opportunity to wear many hats. While your primary focus will be data

validation, you will be encouraged to learn about, and potentially contribute to, other

functions such as sales, growth, or product development based on your interests and

evolving company needs.



Responsibilities

- Review and meticulously verify the accuracy of newly reported funding rounds

and related data.

-- Related data consists of (but not limited to)

-- Investors, Angel Investors, Lead Partners, Valuations, etc

- Research companies to find missing funding rounds

- Validate company slugs (linkedin, x, pitchbook, crunchbase, etc)



Requirements

- Understanding of the Venture Capital (VC) and startup ecosystem.

- General understanding of finance (what is an investor, M&A, IPO, etc.)

title: Delivery Program Operations Associate
description:
At Medley, we empower the next generation of leaders at the world's most iconic companies through transformational group coaching. Our clients are Fortune 500 organizations and other leading enterprises across industries. As a Delivery Associate, you'll play a central role in executing the operations that make our coaching programs run - managing participant communications, tracking program data, coordinating logistics, and ensuring every touchpoint reflects the quality our clients expect.



This role (40 hours per week) is ideal for someone who thrives in fast-paced, detail-intensive environments and takes pride in polished, client-ready work. You'll work closely with our Delivery Team to support multiple active cohorts simultaneously. You should be someone who doesn't just execute tasks - you anticipate what needs to happen next, flag issues before they escalate, and look for ways to make processes better.



Your regular working hours will be aligned to US Eastern Time (e.g., 7:00 AM - 3:00 PM ET). Additionally, from May through September 2026, you will provide coverage for a series of APAC-timezone workshops that fall during normal business hours in the Philippines.



What You'll Do:



- Manage Participant Communications: Draft, personalize, and send session-related
s to program participants - including attendance follow-ups, goal reminders, session prep materials, and recaps. Tailor communications based on participant data (attendance history, goals, engagement patterns). These
s go directly to senior and executive leaders at major enterprises - every communication must be polished, professional, and on-brand.



- Run Cohort Administration: Track attendance across active cohorts, maintain accurate records, and flag patterns (e.g., repeated absences) for follow-up. Coordinate scheduling, manage cohort Slack channels, and keep internal team members aligned on upcoming sessions and deadlines. Own the operational details that keep programs running smoothly - calendar invites, session materials distribution, coach communications, and status updates.



- Support Data Collection, Analysis, and Reporting: Help build and QA survey instruments for midpoint and endpoint data collection. Review and clean program data, identifying inconsistencies or errors before they reach client-facing materials. Support the creation of midpoint and endpoint presentations that demonstrate program impact to clients.



- Contribute to Client-Facing Materials: Support the creation and formatting of presentation decks, infographics, session guides, and participant worksheets. Ensure all materials are visually consistent, error-free, and ready for client and coach audiences.



- Provide APAC-Timezone Workshop Coverage: Provide operational support for workshops scheduled during APAC business hours (May - September 2026), including logistics coordination, real-time troubleshooting, and post-session follow-up.



- Drive Process Improvement and Automation: Identify inefficiencies in delivery workflows and propose solutions. Use AI tools (Claude, ChatGPT, NotebookLM) to improve communications quality, streamline repetitive tasks, and support data analysis. Contribute to team-wide automation efforts using platforms like Make (Integromat), Slack integrations, and other tools.



- Collaborate Across the Team: Participate in daily standups, weekly cohort reviews, and team planning sessions. Log time

title: Social Media Content Creator
description:
About Saltd Studio:

Saltd Studio is a creative branding, web design, and marketing studio that works with small to medium-sized businesses. We specialize in building intentional, beautiful brands and websites for service-based and some product-based business owners, and we help market them long-term. We value great relationships with our clients and team, creative ideas and designs, high standards in quality and client deliverables, and having fun throughout it all. 



We’re looking for a Social Media Content Creator to support with social media content, video editing, and creative marketing support.



Key Responsibilities:

 -Edit short-form video content such as Instagram Reels, TikToks, and YouTube Shorts

- Create social media captions 

 -Assist with content brainstorming and marketing ideas

 -Post and schedule content across social media platforms

 -Cross-post content to additional platforms



Qualifications:

 -Strong written English skills

 -Experience editing short-form video content

 -Comfortable with Canva

- Experience staying on-brand within content with a set color palette, logos, fonts, tone of voice, etc. 

 -Experience with additional content editing tools (CapCut, Premiere, Final Cut, etc.) is a plus, but not required

 -Creative thinker who enjoys brainstorming content ideas

 -Detail-oriented and organized

 -Comfortable communicating with our team over Slack and participating in regular Zoom video calls

 -Experience writing short-form video scripts is a plus, but not required

 -Comfortable using AI tools like ChatGPT to assist with content ideation

 -Able to work independently and manage deadlines while keeping us in the loop

 -Comfortable using tools like Google Drive, Dropbox, ClickUp, Slack, etc.



Rate & Benefits:

 $650/month for 40 hours per week (starting rate)

After initial employment trial period, tea
mbers are eligible for the following benefits:

- 10 days of PTO and Sick Leave annually

- Parental leave

- An office supply allowance

- 13th-month pay

- Professional development and courses to support your work skillset

- Paid holidays



How to Respond:

 -Reply to this job posting with a link to your resume and examples of content, social media posts, or design work you have done.

 -Include the phrase “sea salt” in your response. Why? This lets us see who is actually paying attention.

title: Real Estate Listings - Customer Relationship Manager
description:
Listing Experience Manager



This person is responsible for building a relationship with our customers during the MLS Listing process. 



Requirements:

- Real Estate Experience in US markets - minimum 3 years

- Fluency with speaking and understanding english

- Working Eastern Time Zone (we are open 7 days a week, 9 am - 10 pm Eastern Time). Schedule will be hours during these times and may require one weekend day

- Computer and at least 1 extra monitors

- Reliable internet back up

- Reliable power back up



Responsibilities include:

- verifying property ownership using public records and other tools

- follow rules and requirements of MLS and state

- communicating via phone and
 to our customers with what we need to get their property listed

- setting up pre-listing inspections as needed (with a 3rd party)

- complete and detailed file documentation

- following a checklist to be sure all tasks are completed before property is listed in MLS by a listing assistant

- making welcome calls and post-listing calls to customers

- checking to see if syndication to zillow and 
 is correct (and documenting)

- checking to see if Showing Time or Broker Bay is set up correctly (and documenting)

- following a workflow so everyone can work efficiently

- multitasking across files and tasks

- taking phone calls from customers with questions



Salary:

- $5.50 per hour

- full time / long term

- 10 days per year Paid Time Off (pro-rata based on start date)

- Eligible for Performance Incentive Bonus



Background on LWF

 

Established in 2005, ListWithFreedom (LWF) is a comprehensive residential real estate platform and direct listing broker which helps sellers save thousands of dollars in the process of listing and selling their homes.

 

LWF was developed by experienced, licensed real estate professionals, with the mission to give sellers complete control over their MLS listing and enabling them to sell their homes for the maximum possible value. The company provides a full suite of tools & support needed in the home listing and selling process, including photos and descriptions, electronically signed documents, and a listing on the MLS within 24-48 hours. The entire experience and process is online.

  

In addition to listing on the MLS, homes are also showcased on all the real estate websites that buyers visit when seeking a home. This includes Zillow, Trulia, 
, 
, 
 and hundreds more. 

  

For more information, check out our company's site:   

 

******




 set out in 2005 to change the way real estate is sold. And we have done just that. We offer homeowners a way to sell their properties by listing on the Multiple Listing Service (MLS) for a low flat fee. Our customers are able to list on their own and save thousands of dollars. ListWithFreedom will list our customers’ homes in the MLS and 3rd party websites, and expose their property to thousands of agents who have ready, willing, and able buyers.



Our 6 Core Values shape everything we do at ListWithFreedom and form the basis for our decision making, process design, and strategic planning.



Trust - be reliable, loyal and dependable 

Quality - get it right, never stop improving

Passion - we love what we do 

Kindness - better to be kind than to be right

Innovation - there’s always a way

Education - fearlessly spread knowledge and ability



ListWithFreedom does not discriminate on the basis of race, creed, color, ethnicity, national origin, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender expression, age, height, weight, veteran status, military obligations, or marital status. Each individual at ListWithFreedom brings their own perspectives, work experiences, lifestyles, and cultures with them, and we believe that a more diverse team creates more innovative products, provides a better service to its customers, and helps us all grow and learn as individuals.



Take a look at what we have to offer. Visit 
 today to learn more.

title: US Payroll Tax Position
description:
Job Posting: Payroll Tax Specialist (Remote – Eastern Time Hours)



Location: Remote (Must be available to work Monday–Friday, 8:30am - 5:00pm PM EST)

Job Type: Full-Time

Department: Payroll & Compliance

Reports To: Payroll Manager / Controller



About the Role

We are seeking an experienced and detail-oriented Payroll Tax Specialist to join our growing team. In this role, you will play a critical part in ensuring timely and accurate payroll tax compliance across multiple states and jurisdictions. You will regularly interface with the IRS, state Departments of Revenue (DORs), and Departments of Labor (DOLs) to conduct tax research, respond to notices, and remit tax payments multiple times per week.

If you're highly organized, thrive under pressure, and never miss a deadline, this is the perfect opportunity for you.



Key Responsibilities

Ensure accurate and timely remittance of payroll tax payments (federal, state, and local) multiple times per week.

Interface directly with the IRS, state DoRs, and DoLs to resolve tax issues, research changes in tax laws, and respond to inquiries or audits.

Perform regular reconciliations of payroll tax liabilities and filings.

Maintain accurate records of all tax payments and communications for audit and compliance purposes.

Track and manage tax notices, resolve discrepancies, and ensure full compliance with applicable laws and filing deadlines.

Collaborate with payroll and finance teams to maintain accuracy in payroll processing and tax calculations.

Use tools such as Excel and Asana to manage tasks and track progress.

Support payroll-related projects and audits as needed.



Required Qualifications

Minimum of 2 years' experience in US payroll tax operations, with demonstrated experience interacting with tax agencies.

Strong knowledge of US federal and state payroll tax regulations.

High proficiency in Excel (formulas, pivot tables, VLOOKUP, etc.).



Experience with payroll software systems (e.g., ADP, Paychex, Paylocity, etc.).

Strong written and verbal communication skills—you’ll regularly represent the company with agencies.

Extreme attention to detail—accuracy is critical, and deadlines cannot be missed.

Self-motivated and organized, with the ability to manage priorities in a remote setting.



 Qualifications

Experience using Asana or other project/task management tools.

Multi-state payroll tax experience.

Familiarity with filing amended returns or prior period corrections.



This is a remote position, but you must be available to work Eastern Time hours from 11:00 AM to 7:00 PM, Monday through Friday.



Occasional overtime may be required during peak periods or deadlines.

title: Nurse Content Reviewer & Curriculum Assistant
description:
We are developing a new educational document for nursing students and need a sharp, academically strong nursing student or nurse to critically review and enhance our content. This role is focused on ensuring our material aligns with current nursing curriculum standards, is academically accurate, and is pedagogically sound. You will be working closely with our in-house Nurse and Graphic Designer. This is a project-based, remote contract/internship position.



Key Responsibilities

Curriculum Alignment Check: Review chapters to ensure the content, terminology, and concepts are consistent with the latest nursing curriculum (CMO/CHED standards) and current institutional teachings.



Content Relevance Review: Assess the material for academic accuracy and clarity, pointing out any sections that are confusing, outdated, or poorly explained from a student's perspective.



Restructuring Input: Offer suggestions on how topics are ordered, grouped, and presented to maximize student comprehension and retention.



Collaboration: Provide input to the Nurse and Graphic Designer regarding the effectiveness of planned educational visuals (charts, tables, diagrams) for student learning.



Proofreading: Assist with proofreading and editing for grammatical and technical errors.



What You'll Bring (Required Qualifications)

We are looking for a highly motivated student with excellent academic standing and a strong grasp of fundamental nursing principles.



Academic Status: Currently enrolled as a student in a Bachelor of Science in Nursing (BSN) program or a nurse.



Academic Excellence: Strong academic records are preferred 



Knowledge: Solid foundational knowledge in core nursing subjects (e.g., Anatomy & Physiology, Fundamentals of Nursing, Medical-Surgical Nursing).



Skills:



Excellent written and verbal communication abilities in English.



Strong critical thinking and attention to detail for identifying errors.



Proficiency with digital documents Canva & Procreate



Self-starter attitude with an ability to manage time effectively.



How to Apply

Please submit your resume/CV, a brief cover letter, and include the following:



Your current year level and university.



A brief description of one subject or topic from your studies that you feel is exceptionally well-structured and why, or one that could be greatly improved.

title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)
description:
Job Title: Sales Development Representative (SDR)

Location: Remote, Philippines

Engagement Type: Full-time contractor

Company: Sprint Labs

Client Account: Linxio



Sprint Labs is hiring a high-energy, results-driven Sales Development Representative to support one of our clients in Australia, an established provider of GPS tracking and fleet management solutions.



This is a full-time remote role for someone in the Philippines who is confident on the phone, comfortable with cold outreach, and hungry to build pipeline. You will be responsible for generating interest from prospective business customers through outbound prospecting across phone,
, and LinkedIn.



This role is not about sitting back and waiting for leads to come in. We want someone who can take ownership of the top of funnel, actively build lists, work leads with persistence, and create qualified opportunities for the sales team.



You will be engaged by Sprint Labs and work closely on the company account, helping drive new business conversations and booked demos.



What you’ll be doing



As the SDR, you will own outbound prospecting activity from start to finish.



Your day-to-day work will include:

 • Prospecting potential clients through cold calling, cold
, and LinkedIn outreach

 • Building and managing prospect lists using tools such as Apollo, Dripify, HubSpot, and other sales and marketing platforms

 • Working from lead lists provided by the business, while also sourcing and identifying your own target accounts and contacts

 • Reaching out to decision-makers and key stakeholders to introduce Linxio’s solution

 • Following up consistently across multiple channels to generate interest and move prospects forward

 • Qualifying prospects to determine fit, interest level, and next steps

 • Booking demos directly into the sales representative’s calendar where appropriate

 • Handing over warm opportunities and qualified lead details to the sales representative for further follow-up

 • Keeping CRM records accurate and up to date

 • Tracking outreach activity, response rates, leads generated, and meetings booked

 • Contributing ideas to improve prospecting strategy, messaging, targeting, and pipeline generation



What success looks like in this role



This is a performance-focused role. We are looking for someone who is proactive, commercially minded, and highly consistent with activity.



Success in this role would look like:

 • High daily outbound activity across calls,
s, and LinkedIn

 • Strong discipline around follow-up and pipeline hygiene

 • Qualified leads being generated consistently

 • Demos booked for the sales team

 • Good judgement in identifying businesses that are a fit for Linxio

 • Professional and confident communication with prospective clients



A strong SDR in this role knows how to keep momentum. Some days that means making a large volume of calls. Other days it means chasing up warm prospects, refining a list, or finding the right contact inside a company that looked cold at first.



Who we’re looking for



You’re probably a good fit if you are someone who enjoys outbound sales and doesn’t get rattled by rejection. You know that pipeline is built through consistent effort, sharp communication, and relentless follow-up.



We’d like to hear from people who have:

 • Experience in an SDR, BDR, lead generation, telemarketing, or outbound sales role

 • Confidence making a high volume of cold calls each day

 • Experience with cold
 outreach and LinkedIn prospecting

 • Familiarity with CRM and prospecting tools such as HubSpot, Apollo, Dripify, or similar platforms

 • Strong written and spoken English

 • A professional and confident phone manner

 • Good organisational skills and attention to detail

 • The ability to work independently from home and stay productive in a remote environment

 • A results-driven attitude and genuine motivation to generate leads and open opportunities



Bonus points if you have

 • Experience selling B2B software or SaaS

 • Experience selling into fleet, logistics, transport, operations, construction, field services, or related industries

 • Experience booking demos for an Account Executive or Sales Representative

 • A strong understanding of how to research accounts and identify decision-makers



Pay and benefits



This role offers:

 • Competitive full-time contractor rate

 • Performance-based bonus for every lead generated

 • Fully remote work from home arrangement

 • Opportunity to work with an established client account

 • Ongoing support, systems, and prospecting tools provided

 • A role with clear activity and performance expectations, where strong performers can stand out quickly



Important note



This is a contractor role, not an employee position. You will be engaged by Sprint Labs and assigned to work on there clients account.



How to apply



Please apply with:

 • Your resume

 • A short note introducing yourself

 • Details of your experience in outbound sales, cold calling, or lead generation

 • Any examples of tools you’ve used, such as HubSpot, Apollo, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Dripify, or similar



If you’ve worked in a role where your day involved calling prospects, following up leads, and booking meetings, we’d love to hear from you.

title: Shopify Developer
description:
Wood&Co. is hiring a Shopify Developer (full-stack / hybrid) to support the build of its ecommerce platform.



We are developing a design-led, made-to-order ecommerce experience with structured product configurations and a strong emphasis on presentation quality. This role involves working closely with the founder and project lead in an iterative, hands-on process, helping translate business logic and product structure into a functional Shopify storefront.



Key Responsibilities

     - Develop and customize a Shopify storefront based on defined requirements

     - Set up and organize product data, including attributes, variants, and metafields

     - Implement product option logic and pricing behavior based on defined rules

     - Build and refine product page layouts using custom sections or templates

     - Ensure consistent application of brand guidelines across the site

     - Support product data uploads and ongoing updates

     - Evaluate and integrate third-party apps or custom solutions where needed

     - Ensure the site functions properly across desktop, tablet, and mobile

     - Participate in working sessions and contribute to implementation decisions



Qualifications

     - Solid experience building and customizing Shopify stores (Liquid, themes, sections)

     - Comfortable working as a hybrid developer (handling both development and layout execution)



Experience with:

     - Complex product setups (multiple options, configurations)

     - Pricing adjustments based on selections or conditions

     - Metafields and structured product information

     - Managing product data via CSV or similar workflows

     - Customizing product detail pages beyond default templates



You should be able to:

     - Work with pre-defined systems and translate them into implementation

     - Think through edge cases and suggest practical solutions

     - Maintain clean structure in both code and layout

     - Apply visual guidelines with attention to spacing and hierarchy

     - Communicate clearly and work collaboratively



Engagement Details

     - Hiring ASAP

     - Engagement: full-time or near full-time equivalent

     - Flexible hours, with availability for ongoing coordination

     - Work will be structured around milestones and iterative delivery



Application Instructions

Please submit your application in a Google Drive folder (sent via link). Include the following:

     1. Your CV

     2. A 1–2 minute intro video covering: (a) Your background with Shopify; (b) A project where you handled product configuration or pricing logic; (c) How you approach more complex builds; and (d) Why this role interests you

     3. A Google Doc containing:

     - Links to Shopify stores you’ve worked on, with a brief explanation of your role in each

     - Short answers to: (a) Your experience with product variants or configuration logic; (b) Your experience working with product data (metafields, bulk uploads, etc.); and (c) Your experience customizing product pages

     - Your availability: Hours per week, time zone, and earliest start date

title: Full time AI video creator
description:
Hiring: AI Content Creation VA (Short-Form Video)



We are a social media content company that creates short-form video content for health and wellness brands on Instagram. We use AI tools to generate images, voiceovers, talking head videos, and motion clips, then edit everything together into finished Instagram Reels.



This is a long-term position, not a one-time project.



What you will be doing:



- Using AI tools to generate realistic images of characters (Nano Banana Pro)

- Generating natural sounding voiceovers (ElevenLabs)

- Creating talking head videos (HeyGen)

- Generating motion video clips (Google Veo 3)

- Editing everything together into polished short-form videos (CapCut or your preferred editing software)

- Using Claude AI to write prompts and improve your work quality



You do not need prior experience with these specific tools. We have a full 9-stage onboarding program that trains you on everything step by step. But you do need to be someone who learns fast and pays attention to detail.



What we are looking for:



- Reliable and consistent. You show up every day and communicate if something comes up. This is the number one thing we care about.

- Detail-oriented. The difference between a good video and a bad one comes down to small details.

- Coachable. You take feedback seriously and apply it to your next video.

- Has their own laptop or desktop computer with a stable internet connection.

- Has their own video editing software (CapCut works great).

- Can follow instructions carefully without needing to be told the same thing twice.



Schedule:



Monday through Saturday. Daily check-in at 9:00 AM PHT. All work for the day must be completed and submitted by 9:00 PM PHT.



Pay:



$500 per month.



Onboarding:



Before you start producing content, you will go through our 9-stage onboarding program. Onboarding is unpaid but mandatory and must be completed within 7 days. This deadline is non-negotiable. It is designed to fully prepare you so you can do the job at a high level from day one. If onboarding is not completed within 7 days we will not be moving forward.



To apply:



Do not just send me a message saying you are interested. To be considered for this position you must complete the following test assignment and include it in your application:




  



Applications without the completed assignment will not be reviewed. This is how we filter for people who actually pay attention and follow instructions.



If you have any questions about the role, include them in your message along with your completed assignment.



Looking forward to hearing from you.

title: Industrial Designer/Engineer - Hard & Soft Goods
description:
POSITION SUMMARY

We are seeking a talented and experienced Product Designer to join our design team. This role will focus on developing both hard goods (kitchenware, home décor, tableware, storage solutions) and soft goods (textiles, bedding, table linens, home accessories) for our seasonal product lines. The ideal candidate is proficient in Adobe Creative Suite, has strong textile and print design skills, and understands the product development process from concept through production.

 

KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

Design & Development:

• Create original designs for hard and soft goods across multiple home product categories

• Develop patterns, prints, and textile designs using Adobe Illustrator and Photoshop

• Design seasonal collections that align with market trends and brand direction

• Produce technical sketches, renderings, and detailed specifications for manufacturing

• Create colorways and maintain brand color standards across product lines

• Develop presentation boards and line sheets using Adobe InDesign

Product Development & Production:

• Manage products from initial concept through final production

• Create comprehensive technical specification packages including materials, construction details, and finishes

• Collaborate with overseas vendors and factories to ensure design integrity

• Review and approve prototypes, samples, and pre-production units

• Provide feedback and revisions to manufacturing partners

• Support quality control processes and address production issues

• Assist with cost analysis and value engineering when needed

Collaboration & Communication:

• Work cross-functionally with merchandising, sourcing, and sales teams

• Present design concepts and seasonal line reviews to internal stakeholders

• Research market trends, competitive products, and consumer preferences

• Attend trade shows and markets as needed

• Maintain organized design files, asset libraries, and documentation

 

REQUIRED QUALIFICATIONS

Experience:

• 3-7 years of professional product design experience in hard and soft goods

• Proven track record designing home products, textiles, or related categories

• Experience working with overseas vendors and understanding of manufacturing processes

• Portfolio demonstrating strong design skills across multiple product categories

Technical Skills:

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Illustrator

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Photoshop

• Advanced proficiency in Adobe InDesign

• Strong understanding of textile and print design

• Ability to create camera-ready artwork and production files

• Knowledge of pattern development and repeats

• Technical specification writing experience

Design Capabilities:

• Strong understanding of color theory and trend forecasting

• Excellent visual communication and presentation skills

• Ability to translate concepts into commercially viable products

• Understanding of materials including ceramics, glass, metal, wood, textiles, and finishes

• Knowledge of manufacturing processes for both hard and soft goods

Professional Skills:

• Exceptional attention to detail and organizational abilities

• Strong time management skills with ability to handle multiple projects simultaneously

• Excellent communication and collaboration skills

• Problem-solving mindset with focus on practical solutions

• Adaptable to changing priorities in a fast-paced environment

• Self-motivated with ability to work independently and as part of a team

 

PREFERRED QUALIFICATIONS

• Bachelor's degree in Product Design, Textile Design, Industrial Design, or related field

• Experience in the wholesale/import industry

• Knowledge of product safety standards and compliance requirements

• Proficiency in Adobe After Effects or Premiere

• Experience with CAD software

• Familiarity with retail market and consumer trends

• Trade show and market experience



To apply: Please submit your application through the provided link below:

title: MEP Estimator - Federal Government Contracts (SAM.gov)
description:
About the Role

ARC Electric is a California-based electrical and HVAC contractor growing fast in the federal government contracting space. We bid mechanical, electrical, and plumbing construction contracts through 
 and need an estimator who can handle all three trades under one roof.

This is not a commercial estimating job. Federal procurement has its own language, its own forms, and its own rules. You need to already know how it works. If you've never priced a Davis-Bacon job or filled out an SF-1442, keep scrolling.



What You'll Actually Be Doing

You own the estimate from the 
nt the solicitation drops to the 
nt the bid goes out the door.

Solicitation Analysis



Pull and review federal solicitations from 
 covering mechanical, electrical, and plumbing scope

Read everything: Statement of Work, drawings, specs, amendments, wage determinations, FAR and DFARS clauses

Identify go/no-go issues fast: set-aside eligibility, out-of-state licensing gaps, bonding thresholds, tight deadlines, mandatory site visits

Track every amendment and make sure the final bid reflects all changes before submission



Estimating and Pricing



Build detailed cost estimates covering all three MEP trades: mechanical (HVAC, piping, controls), electrical (power, lighting, distribution, low voltage), and plumbing (domestic water, sanitary, gas)

Break out labor, material, equipment, subcontractor costs, overhead, and bond premiums line by line

Price prevailing wage labor correctly using Davis-Bacon wage determinations pulled by county and state for every applicable trade classification: electricians, HVAC mechanics, plumbers, pipefitters

Build bid schedules and unit price breakdowns formatted exactly the way each solicitation requires

Account for mobilization, insurance, bonding, permits, and any state-specific cost factors



Proposal Development



Complete SF-1442, SF-24, SF-25, SF-25A, and any agency-specific attachments correctly and completely

Assemble Technical Volumes, qualifications packages, and past performance write-ups that actually answer what the solicitation asks for

Coordinate bid bonds with surety and insurance certificates with broker, both timed to hit the submission deadline

Submit through whatever channel the solicitation requires: 
, agency portal,
, or hard copy



Subcontractor Coordination



Identify locally licensed subs for mechanical, electrical, and plumbing work in states where our California licenses have no authority

Build complete sub bid packages with defined scope, applicable drawings and specs, prevailing wage obligations, insurance requirements, and hard internal deadlines

Vet every sub bid for licensing, insurance coverage, Davis-Bacon acknowledgment, and scope completeness

Hold subs to an internal deadline at least 5 to 7 days before the government due date, no exceptions





What You Need to Have

Non-negotiable:



3 or more years estimating all three MEP trades on federal government contracts

Direct experience reading and responding to 
 solicitations start to finish

Solid command of FAR and DFARS contract requirements as they apply to construction

Working knowledge of the Davis-Bacon Act, how to read a wage determination, and how to apply the right labor classifications across mechanical, electrical, and plumbing trades

Experience completing federal bid forms: SF-1442, SF-24, SF-25, SF-25A

Understands bonding: bid bond, payment bond, performance bond, and when each one is triggered

Ability to read construction drawings and full MEP specifications across all three disciplines

Knows the difference between a mandatory requirement and a recommendation in a solicitation, and never mixes them up



Strongly preferred:



Familiarity with UFC, NEC, NFPA, ASHRAE, and IPC standards as they apply to federal facilities construction

Experience working across multiple states and understanding contractor licensing requirements by trade

Familiarity with WAWF or IPP for post-award invoicing setup

Knowledge of small business set-aside types: total small business, SDVOSB, HUBZone, and 8(a)

Experience coordinating multi-trade subcontractor packages on federal jobs





Who You Are

You're organized, detail-obsessed, and you do not miss deadlines. Federal bids close on time whether you're ready or not, and you plan accordingly. You read the solicitation first and ask questions second. You flag problems before they become bid-day fires.

You can jump between a plumbing takeoff, a wage determination, and an SF-1442 without losing your place. You communicate clearly, work independently, and you're not the type to submit a bid with a gap in scope coverage and hope nobody notices.

title: Business Development Assistant
description:
Company: Chasm Opportunities LLC

Founder: David Madden, CEO & Founder

Location: Remote (Philippines-based candidates preferred)

Hours: Part-time, ~4 hours per week to start; long-term with growth potential

Compensation: Negotiable

Chasm Opportunities (CO) is a technology-transition consulting firm supporting ~14 early-stage startup clients in government, defense, energy, and commercial markets. The Principal works directly with each client on an ongoing, fractional-support basis, helping them identify and pursue business development opportunities. We are hiring a part-time, remote BD Assistant to support lead generation, outreach drafting, funding opportunity research, and marketing material improvement across our client portfolio.

About the work

Our clients are very early-stage technology startups commercializing products into government and commercial markets — defense, energy, advanced manufacturing, logistics, and adjacent sectors. They each have a real product or capability but limited BD infrastructure. Your job is to help CO find the right people and organizations for each client, draft the first outreach, monitor relevant funding opportunities, and identify where their marketing materials can be sharpened.

You will work directly with CO's Principal and Executive Assistant, track all activity in Monday CRM, and operate as a disciplined, organized extension of a lean team.

What you'll do

1. Lead research and identification

You will receive general search direction from the Principal (e.g., "Identify relevant POCs within Air Force Training Command who oversee simulation and training systems acquisition") and independently research and build a qualified lead list. This includes: 

• Searching government directories, LinkedIn, agency websites, acquisition portals (e.g., 
, military small business sites), and relevant industry sources.

• Identifying specific individuals: name, title, organization, program office or division,
/phone where available, and a brief rationale for why they are a relevant target.

• Flagging warm-connection opportunities (e.g., mutual contacts, prior engagement) where they exist.

• Entering all leads cleanly into Monday CRM following the established board structure and field conventions.

2. Outreach drafting, tracking, and follow-up management

You will draft outreach
s for the Principal's review and approval before anything is sent, and then maintain clean, current records of all outreach activity in Monday CRM. This includes: 

• Drafting concise, professional, tailored outreach
s — warm introductions, cold outreach to targeted prospects, and follow-up
s.

• Clearly communicating each client's value proposition in plain language, with no jargon or generic pitches.

• Logging each touchpoint 
 sent, response received, follow-up needed) against the correct contact and client account in Monday CRM.

• Providing a short biweekly status summary: what went out, what came back, and what needs attention.

3. Funding opportunity research via RSS feed monitoring

You will build and maintain a structured RSS feed monitoring system to surface relevant grant and funding opportunities for each client. This includes: 

• Developing a tailored keyword set for each client based on their technology domain, market focus, and target funding sources (e.g., SBIR/STTR, DOE, DOD, ARPA-E, commercial grants).

• Monitoring active RSS feeds from relevant agencies, databases, and publications on a regular cadence and flagging any opportunities that match a client's keywords and profile.

• Presenting matched opportunities to the Principal with a brief summary: funding source, opportunity title, relevance to the client, deadline, and a link to the full posting.

• Managing the feed library actively: adding new feeds as new clients are onboarded or new funding sources become relevant, and removing feeds that are no longer applicable as the client portfolio evolves.

• Keeping the feed and keyword library documented and current so it remains an asset that reflects the current portfolio at all times.

4. Marketing material review and improvement suggestions

Each client has some combination of a website, flyers, and/or quad charts — most are early-stage and need polish. You will: 

• Review existing materials for clarity, consistency, and effectiveness in communicating the client's capability and market fit.

• Identify specific, actionable improvements: unclear messaging, missing calls to action, misaligned audience framing, design inconsistencies, or content gaps.

• Provide written feedback in plain language that the client or CO can act on.

• You are not expected to produce final design deliverables — your role is to provide clear, thoughtful critique and recommendations.

What we're looking for

• Experience in B2B or government-facing business development, lead research, or sales support — particularly in defense or government contracting contexts.

• Strong research skills: ability to find the right person in a large government or corporate organization with minimal starting information, and to identify relevant funding opportunities from public sources.

• Excellent written English: you will be drafting outreach on behalf of a senior consultant to government and industry contacts, so professional tone and precision matter greatly.

• Demonstrated experience building and managing RSS feeds or monitoring systems for opportunity tracking, grant research, or competitive intelligence.

• Comfort working in Monday CRM (or a similar CRM); the architecture is already designed — you must be organized and disciplined about keeping records clean and current.

• Ability to give constructive, specific feedback on marketing materials.

• Self-directed and reliable in an async, remote environment.

Engagement details

• Type: Part-time, freelance

• Work style: Fully remote, primarily async with periodic check-ins with the Principal and Executive Assistant.

• Starting scope: ~4 hours per week, with expectation to grow as the role proves out

• Timeline: Long-term engagement for the right candidate

How to apply

Please provide:

1. A brief description of a lead research project you've completed — what the target audience was, how you found leads, and what tools you used.

2. A short sample or description of an outreach
 you drafted for an industry contact on behalf of a technology company, and how you tracked and managed follow-up.

3. Your experience monitoring RSS feeds, grant databases, or opportunity pipelines — what tools you used, how you organized the results, and how you communicated matches to your team or client.

4. Any additional information you want to share to show how your capabilities align with this job posting.

5. Your currently hourly rate and availability.

description:
BICTON VETERINARY CLINIC

Bicton, Western Australia





NOW HIRING

???? Ready to Help a Vet Clinic Shine Online?

Full-Time | Remote | Philippines-Based



About Us

Bicton Veterinary Clinic is a family-owned small animal practice based in Bicton, Western Australia. We are passionate about providing exceptional care for pets and their families — dogs, cats, rabbits, guinea pigs, chickens, and more. Our clinic is built on a foundation of compassion, education, and genuine love for animals.



We are a growing practice and we're looking for a talented, passionate, and experienced Virtual Assistant to join our team and help us share our story, educate pet owners, and grow our online presence.



The Role

You will work closely with Dr Kay McIntosh (Principal Veterinarian and Clinic Owner) to create content that is warm, professional, and genuinely helpful to the pet-owning community.



Key Responsibilities

Social Media 
 & Instagram)

Monthly Reporting

What We're Looking For

 & Instagram scheduling)

eting

etings

About You

description:

title: SOCIAL MEDIA VA – Instagram Reels Editor & Automation Specialist
description:
SOCIAL MEDIA VA – Instagram Reels Editor & Automation Specialist

Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote

---

ABOUT THE ACCOUNT

We run an Instagram account (22K followers) supporting couples through the season of early parenthood — the relationship strain, the identity shifts, the beautiful hard work of staying connected while raising babies. The content is warm, psychologically grounded, and genuinely helpful. Our audience is engaged and growing.



The face of the account is transitioning to a licensed psychologist and couples therapist. You'll be helping bring her voice and expertise to life on Instagram.

---

WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING

Video Editing (this is the core of the role)

• Receive raw talking-head footage filmed on an iPhone

• Edit into polished Instagram Reels (cuts, captions, music, pacing)

• Our style is clean, warm, and professional — not trendy or overly produced

• Deliver 2-4 edited Reels per week



Posting & Scheduling

• Post content to Instagram on a set schedule

• Write or finalize captions using provided scripts and brand voice

• Add relevant hashtags



Carousel Design

• Design 1–2 carousels per week in Canva using our existing templates

• Content and copy will be provided — you bring the visual execution



Automation Management

• Maintain and monitor our ManyChat comment-trigger flows

• Manage our Flodesk or Kit
 sequences — tagging, list hygiene, basic troubleshooting

• Flag anything that needs attention



Community

• Monitor comments and DMs

• Respond to straightforward comments using provided guidelines

• Flag comments that need a personal response from the psychologist



---

WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR

• Proven Instagram Reels editing experience — please include a portfolio or examples

• Comfortable with Canva, ManyChat, and Kit/Flodesk (or very willing to learn)

• Excellent written English — your caption writing will represent a licensed professional

• Reliable, proactive, and detail-oriented

• Someone who genuinely cares about the mission — this content helps real couples who are new parents

• Available for a short weekly check-in via voice or video



---

WHAT THIS IS NOT

This is not a high-volume, post-10-times-a-week account. This is a focused, quality-first account where every piece of content matters. We're looking for someone who takes pride in their work and wants to grow with us long-term.



---



HOURS & PAY

• Approximately 8–10 hours per week to start

• Long-term position with room to grow as the account and business expand

• Please include your hourly rate when you apply

---

HOW TO APPLY

Please send:

1. A short introduction (3–5 sentences) about your experience with Instagram content

2. 2–3 examples of Reels you have edited

3. Your familiarity with ManyChat and Kit (honest is fine — we can train the right person)

4. Your availability and hourly rate



Applications without Reels examples will not be reviewed. We will respond to every serious application within 3 business days. 



We look forward to talking with you! 

-Sarah & Tucker
