title: Insurance Claims Operations Specialist (Contract) — Product Testing
description:
We're building AI tools for insurance claims teams. We need someone who's lived this work to help us test and refine the product.



You're a fit if you've:



Worked in a BPO or shared services center handling insurance claims operations for a US or European insurer, MGA, or TPA. You've personally touched first notice of loss (FNOL) intake, claims adjudication, policy servicing, endorsements, audits, renewals, or submission processing. You know what breaks in the real workflow: the missing documentation, the edge-case escalations, the manual data entry across back-office systems, and the quality gaps that slip through.



What you'd do:



Test our product against real-world insurance claims scenarios and integrations. Flag edge features we're missing. Pressure test the system — especially around document processing, data extraction, and business logic rules. Help with product design. Build demos with real use cases and data.



Requirements:



- 3+ years hands-on insurance claims or policy operations in a BPO or shared services setting for a US or European insurance carrier, MGA, or TPA.

- Direct experience with claims management systems, document intake workflows, and back-office processing tools.

- Familiarity with FNOL handling, claims file preparation, or policy servicing workflows.

- Strong English communication.

- Comfortable giving blunt, specific feedback.



Bonus if you have experience with:

- AI-assisted document processing or automation tools in insurance.

- Quality assurance or human-in-the-loop verification processes.

- Working with APIs or system integrations in an insurance context.



How to apply:



Feel free to message me directly on WhatsApp at 
for a fast reply. Please include your resume or LinkedIn, your OnlineJobs.ph profile link, and a short note about your past insurance claims experience and why you think you'd be a good fit for this role.

title: Sales & Operations VA
description:
About Gutter Guru

Gutter Guru is a growing commercial gutter cleaning company serving property managers, HOAs, and commercial clients across the country. We connect customers with a trusted network of local subcontractors and pride ourselves on reliable service, clear communication, and professional results. As we scale, we're looking for a detail-oriented tea
mber to support our sales and operations pipeline.



Role Overview

The Sales & Operations Coordinator plays a critical behind-the-scenes role in keeping Gutter Guru's growth engine running. You'll own our outbound lead generation, daily
 outreach, contact data management, and financial tracking — ensuring our pipeline stays full and our books stay clean. This is a high-accountability role for someone who is organized, persistent, and comfortable working across multiple tools and workflows simultaneously.



Key Responsibilities



Lead Generation

- Research and identify potential leads using LinkedIn and Apollo based on target customer criteria

- Collect key contact information including name, company, and
 address

- Add and maintain leads in the designated Google Sheets folder, ensuring all records are accurate, complete, and properly formatted for outreach campaigns

- Keep lead lists clean and organized for use in YAMM mail merge campaigns



Daily
 Outreach (YAMM)

- Execute daily outbound
 campaigns using YAMM (Yet Another Mail Merge) via Gmail — approximately 50–60
s per sending account per day

- Set up correct
 templates and verify merge fields are accurate before each send

- Review YAMM reports after each campaign and record key metrics 
s sent, opens, replies, etc.) in the tracking sheet

- Maintain organized documentation of all outreach results for reporting and performance review



Phone Number Research

- Work through existing contact lists to locate and add missing phone numbers

- Source numbers by reviewing
 conversations, signatures, and other available records

- Update Pipedrive CRM with all discovered contact information



Subcontractor Payments

- Process payments to subcontractors and track payment schedules

- Confirm subcontractors are paid accurately and on time

- Maintain organized payment records for internal reporting



Accounts Receivable Management

- Monitor outstanding customer invoices and follow up on pending or overdue balances

- Communicate professionally with customers regarding payment status

- Record received payments in both the CRM and QuickBooks to keep financial records up to date



What We're Looking For

- Highly organized with strong attention to detail — data accuracy is non-negotiable

- Comfortable working with tools like Google Sheets, LinkedIn, Apollo, YAMM, Pipedrive, and QuickBooks

- Self-starter who can manage daily workflows independently without heavy oversight

- Clear communicator, both written and verbal

- Prior experience in lead generation, sales support, or administrative operations is a plus



Why Gutter Guru

- Flexible remote work environment

- Clear processes and workflows — you'll know exactly what success looks like

- A growing company where your contributions have a direct impact

- Collaborative, no-nonsense team culture



Please apply using the link below:

title: Senior Lending Intelligence & Bank Relationship Specialist (Philippines Only – Remote)
description:
READ FIRST – Not a Basic VA Role



We are hiring someone in the Philippines with real lending experience and real banking connections.



This role is for someone who has:

 • Worked inside a bank, credit union, lending company, or broker office (USA)

 • Built relationships with branch managers, relationship managers, or business banking reps

 • Seen high-limit approvals happen firsthand

 • Wants long-term stability, growth, and performance-based income



If you have experience working with banks like Chase, Fifth Third, or similar U.S. institutions — especially handling business credit cards or business lines of credit — this opportunity is for you.



?



What We Are Looking For



We want someone who:

 • Has access to or relationships with branch managers or business banking representatives

 • Understands how approvals are influenced for:

 • $50K+ business credit cards

 • $75K–$100K business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured funding

 • Has firsthand knowledge of approval behavior (not theory)



Examples of the types of approvals we are targeting:

 • $50,000+ business credit cards

 • $100,000 business lines of credit

 • High-limit unsecured credit through relationship banking



If you have worked around these approvals, we want to speak with you.

Compensation Structure



This is not just a fixed salary role.



You will receive:

 • Competitive base pay

 • Commissions when clients get approved

 • Large bonuses when clients secure high funding amounts

 • Long-term growth opportunity



This position is designed for someone who wants a professional home — a place to grow, be valued, and build something long-term.



If you perform well and help drive approvals, your income grows with it.



Responsibilities

 • Document real lender approval patterns based on your experience

 • Help identify which banks are currently approving higher limits

 • Leverage relationships with bank reps or branch managers when appropriate

 • Track approval tendencies by:

 • Credit score

 • Income

 • Business revenue

 • Bank deposits

 • Assist in structuring borrower profiles to increase approval odds

 • Build and maintain an internal lender intelligence database



Required Background (Must Have At Least One)

 • Former Bank Loan Processor

 • Former Loan Underwriter

 • Business Banking Assistant

 • Relationship Manager Support Staff

 • Lending Operations Staff

 • Broker Submission Manager



We are not hiring entry-level virtual assistants for this role.



Major Advantage (Priority Consideration)

You will receive priority if you:

 • Have direct contact with business banking reps

 • Have access to branch managers

 • Previously assisted with high-limit approvals

 • Worked inside U.S.-based banks or credit unions

 • Can explain how business lines of credit are actually approved



Screening Questions (Required – Be Specific)

 1. Have you worked directly with branch managers or relationship managers? Explain your role.

 2. What is the highest business credit card limit you personally saw approved?

 3. What borrower profile typically qualifies for $50K+ business credit cards?

 4. What does a borrower need to qualify for a $75K–$100K line of credit?

 5. Do you currently maintain any banking contacts?



Generic answers will not be considered.

How to Apply



Submit:

 • Your resume

 • Answers to all screening questions

 • Your WhatsApp number

 • Your
 address



Applications missing any of the above will not be reviewed.

Final Note



We are building a serious funding operation. This role is for experienced professionals who understand how approvals truly work and want to grow with a long-term team.



If you have real insider knowledge and real banking relationships, this opportunity can be highly rewarding.

title: Customer Success & Sales Support Manager
description:
Remote | Full-Time | Must work US Pacific Time hours

Compensation: $1,500–$2,500 USD/month to start, depending on fit and experience, plus performance bonuses and growth upside



About Us



We’re a fast-growing founder-led wellness brand based in Las Vegas. We’ve built strong traction, loyal customers, and a product people genuinely love.



Now we’re hiring a sharp, highly organized, customer-facing operator to help us drive more revenue, improve retention, and create more opportunities from behind the scenes.



This is not a passive admin role. You will play a direct part in helping the business grow.



The Role



You’ll sit at the intersection of customer success, sales support, outreach, and CRM ownership.



Our local team is out in the market selling, building relationships, and creating 
ntum. Your job is to back that up online by making sure leads are followed up with, customers are taken care of, opportunities keep moving, and nothing slips through the cracks.



You will help create growth through:

 • lead follow-up

 • customer support

 • onboarding

 • partner and affiliate outreach

 • CRM management

 • follow-through and pipeline support



You are not just here to “assist.”

You are here to help turn attention into revenue, customers into long-term fans, and conversations into real opportunities.



How Performance Is Measured



You will be judged on 3 things:



1. More Revenue

How well you help move leads, follow-ups, and opportunities toward real sales.



2. Better Retention & Customer Experience

How well you create a smooth customer journey, solve issues quickly, and keep customers engaged and happy.



3. More Opportunities & Cleaner Pipeline

How well you help generate opportunities through outreach and follow-through while keeping the CRM organized and actionable.



Core KPIs may include:

 • follow-up speed and consistency

 • opportunities created

 • meetings booked

 • revenue influenced

 • onboarding quality

 • retention / repeat orders

 • CRM accuracy and pipeline hygiene



What You’ll Do

 • Follow up with warm leads, prospects, and customers

 • Manage customer communication across text,
, phone, and CRM

 • Support onboarding and customer success

 • Reach out to affiliates, partners, and collaboration targets online

 • Keep the CRM, notes, and follow-up tasks updated

 • Support post-meeting follow-up and coordination

 • Help improve templates, workflows, automations, and internal organization

 • Make sure opportunities keep moving and nothing gets dropped



Who You Are

 • Strong spoken and written English

 • Warm, polished, and professional in communication

 • Highly organized and detail-oriented

 • Strong with follow-up and naturally proactive

 • Comfortable with customer service, sales support, and outreach

 • Confident using CRM systems like GoHighLevel, Close, HubSpot, or similar

 • Comfortable using AI tools to move faster and work smarter

 • Able to manage multiple moving parts without losing track

 • Available full-time during US Pacific Time business hours



Strong Plus If You Have

 • Experience in customer success, executive support, account management, sales support, or business development

 • Experience with lead follow-up and pipeline management

 • Experience with affiliate outreach, online partnerships, or social media outreach

 • Experience in wellness, hospitality, consumer brands, or relationship-driven businesses

 • Experience building workflows, SOPs, automations, or better systems



Important — Read Before Applying



Please do not apply unless you can follow instructions exactly.



This role requires strong communication, attention to detail, follow-through, and customer-facing professionalism. The application process is part of the evaluation.



If you do not follow the instructions below exactly, your application will be dismissed without review.



This includes:

 • missing the Loom video

 • going over the time limit

 • skipping any required question

 • ignoring the exact submission format

 • unclear spoken English for a customer-facing role

 • lack of availability during US Pacific Time business hours



This is a customer-facing role. You must have clear, professional spoken English and be comfortable on calls, voice notes, and video.



How to Apply



Send one complete application with these 3 items:



1. A Loom video (maximum 2 minutes)



Start by saying:



“My name is [Your Name], I’m in [Your City], and today is [Date] at [Time].”



Then answer these 2 questions:

 • Tell me about a time you helped create revenue or opportunity through follow-up, outreach, customer communication, or account management. What did you do, and what was the result?

 • This role involves customer success, lead follow-up, outreach, CRM ownership, and sales support. How would you structure your first 30 days to create 
ntum and make sure nothing slips through the cracks?



2. A short paragraph

Tell us why you are a strong fit for this role.



3. One sentence only

Complete this sentence exactly:



“The KPI I’d be most excited to own in this role is ______.”



Only complete applications will be reviewed.



What Happens Next



If your application shows strong communication, ownership, organization, and follow-through, the next step will be a Zoom interview and a short paid test project.



We move fast and are looking for someone who can do the same.

title: Chief Marketing Officer
description:
About Us



We are a US-based event ticket marketplace on a mission to create a more efficient and seamless selling experience.



As we continue to grow, we’re looking for a Chief Marketing Officer who can take full ownership of our marketing function, bring structure to the team, and drive measurable growth across the business.



This is a great opportunity for a senior marketing leader who enjoys building strategy, leading teams, improving performance, and making a real impact in a fast-moving company.



Why This Role Matters



Right now, we need someone who can step in and become the clear owner of marketing.



We’re looking for a leader who can set the direction, align the team, improve accountability, and ensure our marketing efforts are tied to real business outcomes. You’ll play a key role in helping the company scale by turning marketing into a more focused, data-driven, and performance-oriented function.



What You’ll Be Doing



As our Chief Marketing Officer, you will lead marketing end to end, from high-level strategy to day-to-day direction.



Your responsibilities will include:



Marketing Strategy & Leadership

• Own and lead the overall marketing strategy for the business

• Turn company goals into a clear and actionable marketing roadmap

• Identify the highest-impact growth opportunities across channels

• Set priorities, timelines, and budgets for marketing initiatives

• Ensure the marketing team is aligned, productive, and focused on what matters most



Team Management & Direction

• Lead and manage the existing marketing team

• Provide clear direction, structure, and accountability

• Help the team move beyond just execution by creating better focus and strategic clarity

• Identify gaps in the team and recommend or hire additional support such as freelancers, agencies, or channel specialists when needed



Growth & Demand Generation

• Oversee multi-channel marketing efforts including:

• SEO

• Paid acquisition

• Outbound growth

• Content

• Other performance-driven channels

• Improve lead generation, customer acquisition, and conversion performance

• Ensure all channels work together within one cohesive growth strategy

• Review current funnels, campaigns, and processes to improve underperforming areas



Performance, Metrics & Accountability

• Define KPIs, dashboards, and reporting systems for the marketing function

• Track ROI and ensure marketing spend is tied to measurable outcomes

• Run regular performance reviews and team check-ins

• Build a culture of testing, learning, and data-backed decision-making

• Improve visibility, organization, and accountability across the department



Cross-Functional Collaboration

• Work closely with leadership to align marketing with business goals

• Collaborate with sales and other teams to strengthen pipeline generation and messaging

• Help refine positioning, go-to-market priorities, and channel strategy based on market feedback and performance data



Who We’re Looking For



You may be a strong fit for this role if you are:

• A strategic marketing leader who also knows how to execute

• Comfortable taking ownership with minimal supervision

• Strong at leading teams, setting priorities, and building structure

• Deeply performance-driven and confident using data to guide decisions

• Experienced in managing multiple channels and tying marketing activity back to growth



Requirements



• 7+ years of experience in marketing

• Significant experience in a senior or leadership-level marketing role

• Proven success leading multi-channel marketing strategies and teams

• Strong experience in performance marketing, growth, paid ads, SEO, and demand generation

• Experience building structure, accountability, and reporting into marketing operations

• Strong analytical mindset and ability to measure what’s working

• Excellent communication and leadership skills

• Comfortable working in a fast-paced, evolving environment

• Able to operate independently and drive progress without constant oversight



Nice to Have



• Experience in marketplaces, e-commerce, ticketing, consumer internet, or transactional platforms

• Experience managing internal teams alongside agencies, freelancers, or specialists

• Background in scaling marketing functions for high-growth companies

• Familiarity with outbound or lifecycle-driven growth strategies



What Success Looks Like



In this role, success means:

• Marketing has a clear owner and strategic direction

• The team is focused, well-managed, and accountable

• SEO, paid, outbound, and content efforts are aligned and performance-driven

• Marketing spend is carefully tracked and tied to results

• Leadership has visibility into KPIs, progress, and next steps

• Marketing moves forward effectively without needing constant founder oversight



Why Join Us



• Work with a growing US-based company

• Take ownership of a critical leadership function

• Help shape the future of the business through smart, performance-driven marketing

• Lead a team and make a visible impact on growth



How to Apply



To apply, please send the following:

• Your updated resume

• Your portfolio or relevant examples of past marketing work, campaigns, wins, or case studies



Please also include a short message telling us about your experience leading marketing teams and driving measurable business growth across multiple channels.

title: Virtual assistant- Training  Academy Builder
description:
We are building an internal caregiver training program (“Direct Care Academy”) and are looking for a Virtual Assistant to help build, organize, and maintain the training platform.



You will work directly with the owner, who will provide the content direction. Your role is to turn that content into structured, professional training modules.



This is a long-term role with growth potential.



?



What You’ll Be Doing

 • Build training modules inside a platform (Thinkific, TalentLMS, etc.)

 • Take outlines, notes, or recordings and turn them into structured lessons

 • Format content into:

 • Lessons

 • Checklists

 • Quizzes

 • Organize modules into a clear, easy-to-follow training flow

 • Update and improve training materials over time

 • Help maintain consistency and quality across the academy



?



What This Role Is NOT

 • You are not expected to create medical content

 • You are not responsible for clinical decisions



???? You are responsible for organization, structure, and execution



?



Ideal Candidate

 • Very organized and detail-oriented

 • Strong written English

 • Able to follow direction and also think logically

 • Comfortable working with online tools and platforms

 • Reliable and consistent



?



Huge Plus (but not required)

 • Experience building online courses

 • Experience with LMS platforms

 • Experience organizing training content



?



Pay

 • $4–$8/hour (based on experience)

 • Part-time, long-term opportunity

 • Opportunity to grow into a larger role as the company expands



?



Why This Role Matters



You will help build a real training system that directly impacts the quality of care for seniors.



This is not just data entry — you are helping build something meaningful.



?



To Apply



Please include:

 1. A short introduction

 2. Any experience organizing content or building systems

 3. Example of similar work (if available)

 4. Answer this question:

???? “If I gave you a rough outline, how would you turn it into a training module?”

title: Part-Time Digital Advertising Specialist
description:
Role Overview:

We are seeking a hands-on Digital Advertising Specialist to set up, manage, and optimize paid ad campaigns aimed at generating both residential and commercial leads in NSW for electrical and solar services. You will focus on platform-specific strategies to capture high-quality inquiries online under strategic guidance from senior marketing leadership.

Key Responsibilities:

• Plan, execute, and optimize geo-targeted Meta and Google Ads campaigns targeting NSW residential customers using local intent keywords

• Develop and manage LinkedIn Ads campaigns targeting commercial clients based on industry, company size, and decision-maker roles

• Test and manage leads generation activities on Australian lead marketplaces such as ServiceSeeking and Hipages

• Support and coordinate with Google My Business and local SEO efforts to amplify ad performance

• Collaborate with the marketing lead and VA estimator to ensure smooth lead flow and campaign alignment

• Provide detailed weekly reports with performance insights and optimization recommendations

• Prepare for campaign launch within 4 weeks, progressively increasing lead volume and quality

Requirements:

• Demonstrable experience managing successful paid ad campaigns on Meta, Google, and LinkedIn

• Knowledge of lead generation strategies across residential and commercial sectors

• Ability to work independently in a remote environment and meet deadlines

• Experience with Australian online lead marketplaces is a plus

• Strong analytical, communication, and reporting skills

• Availability approximately 20 hours per week with flexibility

Compensation:

Competitive hourly rate and potential bonuses linked to lead generation performance.

How to Apply:

Submit your resume, portfolio of past campaign results, and a brief outline of your approach to online lead generation for both residential and commercial clients.

title: Personal Assistant to CEO / Executive
description:
Job Title: Personal Assistant to CEO / Executive



Location: Remote / Flexible (with ability to work U.S. hours)



Job Type: Part- time grow into Full-time



About Us:

We are a fast-paced, high-growth business seeking a proactive, detail-oriented, and highly organized Personal Assistant to support the CEO. This role is critical for keeping operations smooth, freeing up the executive’s time, and ensuring that business and personal priorities are handled efficiently.



Role Overview:

We are looking for a top-tier Personal Assistant who can anticipate needs, communicate effectively, and manage complex schedules. This person will be the right-hand support for the CEO, handling both business and personal tasks with professionalism, discretion, and exceptional attention to detail.



Key Responsibilities:

 • Manage and organize executive’s calendar, including scheduling appointments, meetings, and personal commitments

 • Prepare, draft, and edit professional and executive-level
s and correspondence

 • Make outbound calls, follow up with clients, vendors, or stakeholders (must have own dialer)

 • Coordinate travel arrangements, lodging, and itineraries

 • Conduct research and prepare briefing materials for meetings

 • Track tasks, deadlines, and follow-ups to ensure nothing falls through the cracks

 • Handle confidential and sensitive information with discretion

 • Anticipate needs and provide solutions proactively to free the executive’s time

 • Assist with personal tasks as needed, including errands, appointments, and household coordination

 • Collaborate with other tea
mbers to support business operations seamlessly



Skills & Qualifications:

 • Exceptional communication skills (written and verbal)

 • Highly organized with outstanding attention to detail

 • Strong problem-solving skills and ability to think outside the box

 • Ability to manage multiple priorities and deadlines efficiently

 • Executive-level
 and correspondence writing skills

 • Professional demeanor and discretion when handling sensitive information

 • Tech-savvy with familiarity in calendars,
 management, spreadsheets, and virtual collaboration tools

 • Must have own dialer for outbound calls

 • Ability to work independently with minimal supervision

 • Proactive, anticipates needs, and takes initiative



Ideal Candidate:

 • Someone who can streamline processes, take ownership of tasks, and significantly reduce the executive’s workload

 • A reliable and resourceful individual who thrives in a fast-paced environment

 • Someone who sees themselves as an extension of the executive and business



Compensation:

 • Competitive salary based on experience

 • Opportunity for bonuses tied to performance and results



How to Apply:

Please submit your resume and a cover letter detailing your experience supporting executives, your communication skills, and examples of how you’ve gone above and beyond in previous roles.

title: Creative Performance Strategist
description:
We’re looking for a mid-to-senior Creative Performance Strategist to own and scale performance creative across paid social and video channels. This is a fully remote role aligned with U.S. business hours (Pacific Time Zone), where you’ll operate as a core member of our growth team, driving creative strategy that directly impacts revenue.



This role sits at the intersection of creative thinking, data, and performance marketing. You won’t just launch ads—you’ll design frameworks, hooks, and messaging that consistently produce scalable direct response results. You’ll collaborate closely with creators, editors, and media buyers to develop, test, and optimize creative that drives CAC efficiency, CTR, ROAS, and overall revenue growth.



What You’ll Own

• Lead creative strategy for paid acquisition across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, and emerging channels

• Develop performance-driven hooks, angles, messaging frameworks, and concepts rooted in data and social commerce insights

• Build and manage a structured creative testing system with weekly roadmaps, clear hypotheses, and scaling logic

• Analyze performance metrics (CTR, hook rate, CPA, ROAS) to inform creative direction

• Break down creative performance at the hook, first 3 seconds, body, and CTA to identify optimization opportunities

• Research competitor, creator, and platform trends to identify winning formats and whitespace opportunities

• Write actionable creative briefs for editors and creators and guide production to ensure content converts

• Partner with media buying to align creative strategy with account structure, bids, and scaling decisions

• Systemize learnings through naming conventions, testing logs, and performance frameworks for compounding insights



What We’re Looking For

• 4–6 years of experience in creative strategy, performance marketing, or growth marketing

• Proven track record developing direct response creative for TikTok and Meta

• Deep understanding of creator-style content and social commerce

• Strong analytical skills and ability to translate data into actionable creative insights

• Experience working with creators, editors, and media buyers

• Ability to build and execute structured creative testing frameworks

• Bonus: Experience in beauty, skincare, or lifestyle DTC brands, TikTok Shop, or scaling paid social creative at meaningful spend



Why This Role

This is an opportunity to help build a best-in-class performance creative engine from anywhere in the Philippines. You’ll have real ownership and autonomy to create repeatable creative frameworks that drive scalable, profitable growth.







If you're interested, please send a link or copy of your resume.

title: Virtual Assistant | Coding Experience Needed | Dance Academy - Salsa/Bachata
description:
Full-time, long-term opportunity.



No virtual assistant experience needed.



Looking for tech-savvy people with coding experience.



Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN.



ABOUT US

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are always expanding.



Busy times!



The culture here is FUN and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of all the time.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.



YOUR FOCUS:

"Virtual Assistant"



This role has much a wider variety of tasks than working in a large corporation, which makes it more challenging but also more fun.



Some examples:

• Automating procedures (with or without A.I.)

• Website updates

• CRM development

• App updates (built on React Native - experience not required)

• Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports,

• Research

• Etc.



Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique.



Although you'll begin by doing what is asked, over time (and the sooner the better), you'll need to pro-actively and independently handle tasks/projects without being told and recommend new projects based on opportunities you see. For a smart, motivated person, this role will be more stimulating than a traditional virtual assistant role.





SCHEDULE

9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday 





GROWTH:

Payment increases over time.



If you are outstanding, long-term there may also be the opportunity to be promoted into a leadership role





TRAINING:

You'll receive basic training but many things you'll need to figure out on the fly. You must be a quick learner with a "can do" attitude.





COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is very different from a large corporation. Some of the differences are:



• More creativity: you'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact: your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback: your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! We want everyone here thinking as if they were the business owner.





ABOUT YOU:

• Excellent written English (show this in your application!)

• Coding experience

• Technical - great with computers

• Good listener - only needs to be told once

• Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and tea
mbers)

• Smart, quick learner

• Fastidious - attention to detail

• Decent at basic math

• Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute

• Meticulous, organized, methodical.

• Reliable! Always shows up and focuses.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements.

• Self-starter

• Independent decision maker

• Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly

• Comfortable with excel

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata!



APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:



1. A brief intro about yourself



2. Can you work the hours requested?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit)



5. What coding education or experience do you have? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, React Native, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?)



6. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!



Danny







---------

title: Klaviyo Email Implementor (Full time/ Remote)
description:
About Us:

We’re a fast-growing
 marketing agency that helps ecommerce brands turn their
 lists into revenue machines using Klaviyo. Our team includes expert strategists, designers, and implementors across Europe and Asia—all working together to deliver high-performing campaigns and flows.



We’re looking for a Full-Time Klaviyo Implementor to join our team. If you're detail oriented, organized, and experienced in Klaviyo, we want to hear from you.



What You’ll Do:

Turn Figma designs into Klaviyo
 drafts (campaigns & flows).



Use Klaviyo’s drag-and-drop editor to build
s with text, images, and CTAs that exactly match design files.



Format
s for perfect rendering across desktop, mobile, and dark mode.



Collaborate with our account managers (EU) and designers (Asia) asynchronously via ClickUp and Slack.



Work with a variety of ecommerce brands across industries.



QA your own work to catch any formatting, rendering, or logic issues before handoff.



What We’re Looking For:

1+ years of experience in Klaviyo implementation (campaigns & flows).



Strong understanding of
 formatting.



Excellent communication and organizational skills—must be comfortable working async with an international team.



High attention to detail—you catch alignment issues, spacing, font mismatches, and padding errors without being told.



Experience using ClickUp, Slack, Figma (basic use not design), and Google Docs.



Ability to manage your time and hit deadlines independently.



Details:

Position Type: Full-Time



Location: Fully Remote



Time Zones: Flexible (but some overlap with EU/Asia preferred)



Start Date: ASAP



How to Apply:

Please click the link below to apply and record your responses.

title: Meta Media Buyer (A-Player Only) – DTC Health Brand (DE Market)
description:
Meta Media Buyer (A-Player Only) – DTC Health Brand (DE Market)



About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC health brand operating at a high-performance level in the German market. We move fast, we value excellence, and we only work with people who can deliver top-tier output consistently. If you’re an A-player who has already proven yourself in high-growth performance marketing environments, this is where you’ll feel at home.



Role Overview

We’re looking for an exceptional Meta Media Buyer who understands what world-class performance marketing looks like. Someone who can manage both whitelisting and brand-page buying with precision, maintain a clean structure, scale budgets efficiently, and make fast, data-driven decisions.



You should know how to analyze what works, what doesn’t, and why — and communicate this clearly. We want someone who doesn’t just push buttons, but contributes insights, strategic thinking, and creative feedback that moves performance forward.



What You’ll Do



Manage, structure, and scale Meta Ads campaigns (brand page & whitelisting) for the German market



Maintain clean and logical account structures that allow fast scaling and clear overview



Optimize campaigns daily based on KPIs, real-time results, and creative performance



Identify winners early and kill losers fast — with clear reasoning behind each decision



Work closely with our creative team to provide feedback on what worked, what didn’t, and what we should test next



Ensure fast adaptation to performance swings, product pushes, and new campaign angles



Contribute ideas — not just execution — and push the performance standards forward



What We’re Looking For



Proven experience managing Meta Ads for successful DTC brands (please share examples)



Strong track record scaling budgets profitably while maintaining efficiency



Deep understanding of Meta’s performance mechanics, creative testing, and signal quality



Ability to think structurally, act quickly, and maintain a clean, high-level overview at all times

title: Elite Web Designer - Futuristic, Animation-Heavy Landing Pages (GSAP, Three.js, WebGL)
description:
We are building a landing page for an AI-powered operator agent platform, and we need someone who builds websites that make people stop scrolling and say "what the hell was that."



This is NOT a typical landing page job. We are looking for someone who creates web experiences that feel like they belong in a sci-fi movie. Think: wild kinetic animations, 3D elements, particle effects, smooth scroll-driven storytelling, glassmorphism, interactive cursors, fluid transitions, and layouts that nobody has seen before.



WHAT WE NEED:

- A single landing page that looks and feels absolutely futuristic and unlike anything 99% of people have ever encountered on the web

- Heavy use of animation libraries (GSAP, Framer Motion, Lenis, etc.)

- 3D elements or WebGL/Three.js integration where it makes sense

- Scroll-triggered animations and micro-interactions everywhere

- Dark, sleek, high-tech aesthetic with creative typography

- Fully responsive and performant despite the heavy visuals

- Clean code that actually works in production



HOW TO APPLY (read carefully, we filter out copy-paste applications):



1. THE VERY FIRST THING in your response must be links to 2-3 live websites YOU personally built that showcase extreme animation and visual creativity. This is the #1 thing we are evaluating. If your portfolio is standard business websites, this is not the right fit. No links = instant skip.



2. Put your favorite color in the subject line of your application. This tells us you actually read the post and are not blasting generic responses.



3. Brief description of the tools/libraries you used on those portfolio projects.



4. Your approach to balancing wild visuals with performance.



Applications that do not follow these steps will not be reviewed.



IDEAL SKILLS:

- GSAP (GreenSock) advanced timeline animations

- Three.js / WebGL / Spline / Rive

- Framer Motion or other React animation libraries

- Lenis or Locomotive Scroll for smooth scrolling

- CSS animations and custom shaders

- Figma to code

- Next.js or modern React frameworks



This is a paid project with potential for ongoing work if the result blows our minds. We want to see your most creative, boundary-pushing work. Show us what you can do when there are no boring constraints.



Budget: Project-based, negotiable depending on skill level and portfolio quality.

title: STR Operations Assistant
description:
Operations Assistant: Elevate Vacation Homes | U.S.-Based (San Diego, CA)



Read this carefully before applying.



We are a small but growing vacation rental company based in U.S. (San Diego, CA) managing 40+ properties, with 90% located in San Diego, California.

Our team is lean by design:

- 1 CEO

- 1 COO

- 1 CFO

- 2 Operations Assistants



We are now hiring one more Operations Assistant — and this is an important role. We are not hiring in volume. We are hiring one person we can grow with as we scale to 80–100 properties. If you perform well and stay with us, this role will naturally grow into a higher position when we expand.



Important Context (Read This Carefully)

We have been hiring and letting people go over the last 6 months. Not because of pay. Not because of workload. But because we are very selective and have not yet found the right long-term fit.



This role requires:

- Strong communication

- Good judgment

- Ownership

- Reliability under pressure



If you’re confident in your ability, this is a rare opportunity to join early and grow with the company. If you’re unsure, this is not the role for you. This Role Is For One Type of Person Only



You are:

- Fluent in spoken and written English

- Comfortable speaking on the phone with:

- Guests

- Vendors

- Homeowners

- Calm, logical, and clear under pressure

- Able to manage multiple issues at once

- A strong problem solver

- Someone who finishes what they start



You are not:

- A task-only VA

- Someone who avoids calls

- Someone who needs constant direction

- Someone who panics under stress

- Someone who relies on AI to communicate



Communication Expectations (Very Important)

You should expect:

- 5–20 phone calls per day



Daily coordination with:

- Cleaning teams

- Maintenance vendors

- Internal staff



If you are not confident speaking English on calls, do not apply.



What You’ll Actually Be Doing: This is not a customer service role.

Approximate breakdown:

- 10% Guest communication

- 5% Cleaning reminders

- 5% Ordering supplies

- 80% Operations, coordination, and problem-solving



You will function as:

- A project manager

- A communicator between teams

- A problem-solver when things go wrong

- A key operations support role



Work Environment

- Small, fast-moving startup

- High accountability

- Clear expectations

- Real responsibility

- Direct communication with leadership

- Opportunity to grow as the company scales



Compensation & Benefits

- Up to $8.00 USD/hour (based on performance)

- 10 days paid time off per year

- 2 days off per week

- Long-term role with growth potential

- Promotion opportunity as we scale to 80–100 properties



Final Note: We are not looking to hire quickly. We are looking to hire correctly. If you believe your experience, communication skills, and work ethic make you a strong fit — apply. If you are unsure, this role is not for you.



How to Apply



If you believe you are a strong fit and meet all of the requirements above, apply using the link below.





Important:

Applications that are dis-honest, incomplete, generic, or clearly copy-pasted will be ignored. We are only moving forward with candidates who demonstrate strong communication, attention to detail, and professionalism. If you’re confident in your abilities and want to grow with a serious team — apply now.

title: Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Specialist)
description:
Part-Time | Remote | £6 per hour



About the Role

We are recruiting on behalf of a growing UK-based accountancy firm, an 8-figure firm, seeking a detail-oriented and highly accurate Bookkeeper (QuickBooks Specialist) to support their client portfolio.



This is a key role responsible for maintaining clean, compliant, and up-to-date financial records across multiple clients. You will work closely with the Director to ensure bookkeeping is completed to a high standard, deadlines are met, and all records are fully prepared for accountant review.



Note: This is not basic data entry — this role requires ownership of bookkeeping, accuracy, and workflow.



Working Hours

10:00am – 3:00pm UK Time (Tuesday & Thursday)

5:00pm – 10:00pm Philippines Time



Key Responsibilities



Bookkeeping & QuickBooks Management

Maintain accurate, up-to-date records in QuickBooks Online

Post and allocate bank transactions

Manage purchase invoices and expenses

Post sales invoices and allocate receipts

Maintain clean and accurate ledgers (debtors, creditors, nominal)

Perform bank, credit card, and balance sheet reconciliations

Prepare VAT returns and support submissions

Process journal entries (within competence)

Ensure all records are fully supported and audit-ready



Deadlines & Workflow Management

Manage VAT, month-end, and reporting deadlines

Start work early and avoid last-minute deadlines

Request missing information proactively

Keep all work progressing without backlog



Client Communication

Respond to client queries within 1 working day

Communicate clearly and professionally

Keep communication simple and commercially aware

Escalate anything outside your level of expertise



Data Accuracy & Cleanliness

Maintain clean ledgers with no duplication or miscoding

Ensure all accounts are fully reconciled

Clear suspense accounts promptly

Monitor aged debtors and creditors

Regularly review bank feeds and financial data



Escalation & Awareness

Identify and flag unusual transactions

Highlight compliance risks or inconsistencies

Raise cash flow concerns where relevant

Escalate anything unclear or outside your scope



Reporting

Provide weekly updates on:



Work completed

Work in progress

Missing information

Risks or issues



Essential Skills & Experience

Strong experience using QuickBooks Online (non-negotiable)

Proven experience in bookkeeping or accountancy support

Strong understanding of reconciliations, VAT, and ledgers

High level of accuracy and attention to detail

Strong English communication skills

Able to manage workload independently

Organised and process-driven



What We’re Looking For

We want someone who:



Takes full ownership of their work

Keeps financial records clean, accurate, and review-ready

Works proactively (not reactively)

Manages deadlines without being chased

Communicates clearly with both clients and internal team

Spots issues early and raises them



What This Role Isn’t

Not basic data entry

Not leaving reconciliations unfinished

Not allowing backlog to build

Not ignoring errors or inconsistencies



How to Apply:

Use “Vixa Hire” in the subject line of your application.

Send your resume and cover letter.

Include your internet speed test result and a screenshot of your laptop specs.



If you’re a detail-driven QuickBooks specialist who takes pride in clean, accurate bookkeeping, this is a great opportunity to take ownership within a growing UK accountancy firm.

title: Hospice QA Coordinator (Home Health)
description:
DO NOT APPLY if you do not meet the qualifications listed below



Position Summary



We are seeking a detail-oriented and service-driven Virtual Hospice Quality Assurance (QA)  to provide after-hours, evening, and weekend support for hospice operations.



This role is primarily responsible for quality assurance, compliance monitoring, and documentation accuracy, while also supporting intake coordination, patient call management, scheduling follow-ups, and EMR documentation.



The ideal candidate has prior hospice or home health experience, strong knowledge of documentation compliance standards, excellent English communication skills, and the ability to remain calm and professional in time-sensitive or sensitive patient situations.



Key Responsibilities

Hospice Quality Assurance (Primary Focus)



• Review and audit patient charts to ensure compliance with hospice regulations and company standards

• Track and follow up on missing, incomplete, or non-compliant documentation

• Ensure timely upload of physician orders, certifications, and required hospice documentation

• Maintain organized QA logs, audit trackers, and electronic records

• Support compliance readiness for internal reviews and external audits

• Flag documentation discrepancies and escalate issues to appropriate leadership



Intake & Documentation Support



• Assist with hospice intake processing and referral coordination

• Upload and track physician orders, certifications, and care plans in EMR

• Monitor and manage endorsement and handoff reports

• Ensure all documentation is complete, accurate, and filed timely



Scheduling & Care Coordination



• Schedule and confirm follow-up visits for hospice patients

• Coordinate with field clinicians, intake teams, and office staff

• Assist in care coordination and communication workflows

• Escalate urgent clinical or operational concerns as needed



Patient & Call Support



• Answer and triage incoming patient, family, and caregiver calls

• Provide compassionate, professional customer service aligned with hospice care standards

• Accurately document all interactions in EMR

• Route concerns promptly and appropriately



Qualifications & Requirements

Required



• Prior healthcare experience (hospice or home health strongly preferred)

• Experience with medical documentation review, QA, or compliance tracking

• Strong English communication skills (spoken and written)

• High attention to detail and strong organizational skills

• Strong computer proficiency (Microsoft Office, spreadsheets, EMR systems)

• Ability to work independently in a remote, fast-paced environment

• Ability to work after-hours, evenings, and weekends (U.S. Pacific Time)

• Reliable high-speed internet and professional remote workspace



Preferred



• Direct Hospice QA or compliance experience

• Experience with Home Health/Hospice EMR systems (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)

• Clinical background (RN, LVN, Medical Assistant, or allied health)

• Familiarity with hospice regulations and documentation standards



How to Apply



Please submit a short cover letter highlighting your relevant experience and include your answers to the questions below:



Describe your experience in hospice or home health, including your role, duration, and responsibilities.



Do you have experience with quality assurance, chart audits, or compliance tracking? Please explain.



How many years of experience do you have in Hospice or Home Health?



What EMR systems have you used (e.g., Kinnser/WellSky, Axxess, Hospice MD, Homecare Homebase)?



Describe your experience reviewing or managing medical documentation (orders, certifications, care plans, etc.).

title: Short-Form Video Editor (Part-Time ? Full-Time)
description:
We're looking for a reliable short-form video editor to join our team on a part-time basis, with a clear path to full-time as volume increases. You'll be editing vertical (9:16) videos for Instagram Reels, TikTok, and YouTube Shorts.

This is a straightforward editing role — all assets will be provided to you. You are assembling, not creating from scratch.



What You'll Be Doing



Editing short-form vertical videos (30–90 seconds) from pre-recorded A-roll (talking head footage) and pre-made B-roll (AI-generated images and video clips)

Cleaning up A-roll: trimming dead air, removing filler words, tightening pacing

Cutting B-roll into the timeline to match the script and visual flow

Adding smooth transitions between A-roll and B-roll

Adding animated captions/subtitles (style reference will be provided)

Adding background music and sound effects where appropriate

Color correcting A-roll for a clean, consistent look

Exporting final videos optimized for each platform



What We Provide



Finished A-roll footage (talking head)

All B-roll assets (AI-generated images and short video clips)

Scripts so you know what's being said and when B-roll should appear

Reference/example videos showing the exact style and pacing we want

Music and sound effect libraries or direction on sourcing



What We're Looking For



Proven experience editing short-form vertical content (show us your work)

Proficiency in CapCut, Premiere Pro, or DaVinci Resolve

Ability to add clean, on-brand animated captions (CapCut auto-captions or similar)

Good sense of pacing and timing — you understand how short-form content flows

Strong attention to detail

Reliable communication and consistent turnaround times

Comfortable receiving feedback and iterating quickly



Nice to Have



Experience editing content in the AI, tech, or creator education space

Familiarity with trending short-form editing styles on TikTok and Instagram

Basic color correction skills

Experience with audio cleanup (noise removal, volume leveling)



Details



Part-time to start (3–5 videos per week), with a path to full-time based on performance and volume

Compensation is per-video and will be discussed after the test edit

Long-term communication and workflow will be managed through Slack



How to Apply



Send your portfolio or links to short-form videos you've edited. We'll select a few candidates for a paid test edit using our actual assets and reference videos before making a final decision.

title: SUNO, DistroKId, Book & Music uploads and Marketing
description: I would like a born again Christian who truly has an authentic walk with the Lord help with marketing my music and books. I have about 10 songs now that I made with the help of Suno DistroKId, and three books in the works (One is ready to upload and self publish). I need someone who is already experienced  with the various platforms to maximize the impact.

title: Personal Executive Assistant
description:
***READ FULL JOB POST BEFORE APPLYING. *** Please don't waste your time or mine. Thanks :)



Flexible schedule. Long-term opportunity.



Looking for:

- Outstanding English

- Strong problem-solving skills

- Proactive behavior 

- Great on the phone



ABOUT ME

Hi! My name is Danny. 



I built the largest salsa and bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and have a very ambitious business path ahead. 



On this journey I'm looking for a super strong, reliable, capable "right-hand person," to be my trusted executive assistant. 



I've hired approximately 100 people internationally in the past decade, so I have plenty of experience working with people abroad. Looking for someone great!





SCHEDULE



Flexible! Time of day you work is usually very flexible but there are a couple of guidelines:

- Speed matters. Turnaround times should be maximum 24 hours. Same day is better. When possible, right away is even better. 

- Requests may come 7 days per week. I will always aim to be relaxed with timelines when possible, but some things may be time sensitive

- Occasionally you'll be on the phone, which will require being available during business hours PST (Los Angeles time)



Estimating 10-30 hours per week for now, fluctuating randomly, so keeping another job at the same time, which also has flexible hours, would likely be a good idea.



Integrity matters - don't do work for me while you're on the clock for your other employer. Make sure you can provide clear separation for them. 



EXAMPLES OF ACTIVITIES:



Most activities will be personal in nature. This is different from a role in the company. 



- Research

- Online shopping

- Booking flights/hotels

- Calling businesses for various things

- Appointment scheduling

- Miscellaneous wide variety of projects





ABOUT YOU

• Perfect written English

• Strong problem-solving skills

• Proactive behavior 

• Great on the phone

• Experience as an executive assistant

• Quick learner

• PRO-ACTIVE. Always looking for ways to improve.

• Meticulous, organized, methodical. Almost never misses a detail.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Not afraid to share your opinion - I NEED to hear your opinion on the approaches that we take so that we can improve.

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Strong communicator

• Makes decisions independently

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet



APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:

1. What is your experience as an executive assistant?



2. Are you happy to be on the phone when needed?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application the answers to the assessment in the link above: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit) 4. Highest level of formal education



6. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!









——————————————

Search: virtual assistant , va , virtual assistance , executive assistant , ea , executive assistance

title: Virtual Assistant | Coding Experience Needed | Dance Academy - Salsa/Bachata
description:
Full-time, long-term opportunity.



No virtual assistant experience needed.



Looking for tech-savvy people with coding experience.



Environment here is CREATIVE and FUN.



ABOUT US

We are the largest salsa & bachata dance academy in Los Angeles and are always expanding.



Busy times!



The culture here is FUN and friendly. Our goal is to make every student feel welcome and completely taken care of all the time.



Dancing changes lives - we are on a mission to deliver the best salsa/bachata educational experience on Earth.



The company is MaS Dance Academy.



YOUR FOCUS:

"Virtual Assistant"



This role has much a wider variety of tasks than working in a large corporation, which makes it more challenging but also more fun.



Some examples:

• Automating procedures (with or without A.I.)

• Website updates

• CRM development

• App updates (built on React Native - experience not required)

• Creating beautiful, concise, clean reports,

• Research

• Etc.



Our culture is fast-paced and every day is unique.



Although you'll begin by doing what is asked, over time (and the sooner the better), you'll need to pro-actively and independently handle tasks/projects without being told and recommend new projects based on opportunities you see. For a smart, motivated person, this role will be more stimulating than a traditional virtual assistant role.





SCHEDULE

9:00am - 6:00 PM PST (Los Angeles time) Monday - Friday





GROWTH:

Payment increases over time.



If you are outstanding, long-term there may also be the opportunity to be promoted into a leadership role





TRAINING:

You'll receive basic training but many things you'll need to figure out on the fly. You must be a quick learner with a "can do" attitude.





COMPANY CULTURE

Working in a small business like ours is very different from a large corporation. Some of the differences are:



• More creativity: you'll handle a wide variety of tasks and projects. This is more challenging than just following strict templates, but also more stimulating and exciting.



• Impact: your actions will have a big impact on the business, which you will clearly see



• Feedback: your feedback on what we are doing well, and what could be better, is not only valued, but is mandatory! We want everyone here thinking as if they were the business owner.





ABOUT YOU:

• Excellent written English (show this in your application!)

• Coding experience

• Technical - great with computers

• Good listener - only needs to be told once

• Strong communicator (you must OVERcommunicate with management and tea
mbers)

• Smart, quick learner

• Fastidious - attention to detail

• Decent at basic math

• Pro-active - anticipates what may be helpful and goes above and beyond to contribute

• Meticulous, organized, methodical.

• Reliable! Always shows up and focuses.

• Critical, creative thinker. Not robotic. Always looking for better ways to do things. Always considering all the angles of a task.

• Willing to share your opinion - we NEED to hear your opinions

• Able to ask clarifying questions in order to get tasks right the first time

• Always eager to improve yourself and the company’s systems. Habitually thinks strategically and takes action for improvements.

• Self-starter

• Independent decision maker

• Flexible - can quickly adjust on the fly

• Comfortable with excel

• Fast computer

• Fast, dependable Internet

• Bonus if you have experience or interest in salsa or bachata!



APPLY NOW. FORMAT YOUR APPLICATION AS A NUMBERED LIST WITH THE FOLLOWING:



1. A brief intro about yourself



2. Can you work the hours requested?



3. Complete this form: 
/
. Write in the subject line of your application: 1. Grammar score 2. Typing WPM 3. Numbers assessment answer (regarding achieving $2,000 profit)



5. What coding education or experience do you have? (Javascript, HTML, CSS, React Native, Zoho CRM , Zoho Deluge, or anything else?)



6. These positions are competitive, often with hundreds of applicants. What is your competitive requested monthly payment for this full-time position?





(Don't
 me off the platform or message on social media - your application will be disqualified. Don't worry, I personally check every application here)



Looking forward to meeting you!



Danny

title: World-class DTC Video Editor (ONLY A-PLAYERS)
description:
We're looking for an exceptional video editor who doesn't just cut footage—you understand the psychology of direct-to-consumer marketing and what makes customers click "Buy Now."



This isn't a position for generalists. We need someone who lives and breathes ecommerce video, understands the nuances of VSLs (Video Sales Letters), testimonials, and ad creatives that convert cold traffic into paying customers.



What Makes You Perfect for This Role:



You have a proven track record editing high-converting video content for DTC brands, particularly in health supplements or similar direct response niches. You understand that every frame, transition, and text overlay serves a strategic purpose—building trust, creating urgency, and driving action.



You know the difference between content that looks pretty and content that sells. You've studied winning ad creatives, you understand hooks that stop the scroll, and you can craft testimonial sequences that feel authentic while hitting every psychological trigger.



You're experienced with the full spectrum of DTC video content:
/Instagram ads, YouTube pre-rolls, VSLs, advertorials, UGC-style content, and product demos. You understand pacing, music selection, subtitle styling, and the specific editing techniques that work for different platforms and audiences.



Your Experience Includes:



3+ years editing for DTC ecommerce brands (health/wellness/supplements is a major plus)

Deep portfolio of video ads that have generated significant revenue

Expertise in creating video content for audiences 50+ (understanding their viewing preferences and pain points)

Mastery of direct response video techniques: pattern interrupts, benefit stacking, social proof integration, scarcity/urgency elements

Understanding of the customer journey and how video fits into different funnel stages

Experience collaborating with copywriters and marketers to bring scripts to life



Technical Requirements:



Strong skills in After Effects for motion graphics and text animations

Ability to color grade, audio mix, and deliver broadcast-quality final products

Fast turnaround times without sacrificing quality

Experience with both short-form (15-60 second ads) and long-form (3-15 minute VSLs) content



What We're Looking For:



Someone who asks "Will this increase conversions?" not just "Does this look good?"

A student of direct response marketing who constantly analyzes what's working in the market

Excellent communication skills and ability to implement feedback quickly

Reliability and consistency—we need someone who delivers on time, every time

Proactive mindset: you spot opportunities to improve content and suggest creative solutions



Compensation & Details:



Salary: $700 - $1,000/month (negotiable based on experience and results)

Type: Full-time, remote

This is a long-term opportunity with growth potential as we scale



To Apply:

Send your portfolio showcasing your best DTC video work—specifically videos that drove measurable results. Include any data on performance (ROAS, CTR, conversion rates) if available. Tell us about the most successful video campaign you've edited and why it worked.



Note: Only apply if you're genuinely at the top of your game in DTC video editing. We're building a world-class marketing team and only want A-players who are obsessed with creating content that converts.

title: Content Strategist, Scriptwriter & Video Editor
description:
We’re looking for a highly creative, organized, and trend-aware content specialist to help grow our agency brand through consistent, high-performing video content across Instagram, TikTok, and YouTube.



This role combines content strategy, scriptwriting, editing, and publishing. You will be responsible for developing video concepts, writing engaging scripts for approval, and turning recorded footage into polished content optimized for each platform.



APPLY HERE: 



Important: You will not be responsible for recording or filming — all on-camera footage will be recorded by our founder.



Responsibilities

Content Strategy & Ideation

- Develop a short-form content strategy aligned with agency growth goals

- Generate weekly video ideas based on trends, audience psychology, and performance data

- Conduct competitor and niche research to identify content opportunities

- Maintain a content calendar and ensure consistent output



Scriptwriting & Creative Development

- Write compelling video scripts for founder approval

- Use proven frameworks (hooks, story, CTA) and AI tools where helpful

- Ensure scripts match brand voice and resonate with our target audience

- Iterate quickly based on feedback and performance



Short-Form Video Editing & Optimization

- Edit videos for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts

- Add captions, motion graphics, sound effects, pacing, and pattern interrupts

- Optimize for retention, watch time, and engagement

- Stay current with platform trends and algorithm changes



Publishing & Repurposing

- Upload and schedule content across IG, TikTok, and YouTube

- Write captions, format descriptions, and apply best practices for reach

- Repurpose long-form content into short-form clips when needed



Paid Ad Editing (Occasional)

- Create short-form video variations for Meta ads

- Produce multiple hook/cutdown versions for testing



? Requirements

- 2+ years experience in short-form content creation and video editing

- Strong proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or similar tools

- Proven ability to write scripts that drive engagement and retention

- Deep understanding of TikTok/IG/Shorts culture and trends

- Strong storytelling instincts and direct-response awareness

- Organized, proactive, and able to manage multiple weekly deliverables

- Portfolio showcasing relevant short-form work is required



Bonus Points

- Experience working with ecommerce, marketing, or agency brands

- Familiarity with performance-based creative testing

- Knowledge of YouTube SEO and long-form optimization



APPLY HERE:

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The "Right Hand" to CEO) – High Responsibility
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: E-commerce Communication Manager (Content, Catalogs & Growth)
description:
We are looking for a creative and detail-oriented Communication Manager to bridge the gap between our products and our customers. Your mission is to take the product information from our sourcing team and transform it into professional catalogs, high-converting website content, and clear brand communication.



You will report to the Operations Manager and ensure that our brand looks premium and professional across all platforms.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Content Creation: Write compelling product descriptions that sell. No generic text – we need benefits-driven copy.



Catalog Management: Design and update professional B2B/B2C catalogs (using Canva, Adobe, or similar tools).



E-commerce Development: Manage and update website content (Shopify, WooCommerce, or similar), ensuring all listings are optimized and visually appealing.



Asset Coordination: Work with the Sourcing Specialist to get high-quality product photos and videos. If the quality is low, you must provide feedback and creative direction.



Brand Voice: Ensure all communications 
s, newsletters, website) are consistent and professional.



Required Qualifications:



Excellent English: Near-native written English is a must. You should be able to write persuasively.



Design Skills: Experience with Canva is mandatory. Experience with Adobe Suite (Photoshop/InDesign) is a huge plus.



E-commerce Experience: You have previously managed product listings and website content.



Visual Eye: You can tell the difference between a "good" and a "great" product photo.



Organization: Ability to manage multiple product lines and deadlines simultaneously.



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, full-time career opportunity.



A chance to shape the visual identity of a growing brand.



Supportive management and a clear workflow.



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Creative Communicator for Aromika".



Include a link to your Portfolio (Catalogs you have designed or Websites you have managed). Applications without a portfolio will not be considered.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your process: How do you turn a raw product photo and a list of features into a professional catalog page?



Tell us which e-commerce platform (Shopify, Magento, etc.) you are most comfortable with.
