title: Strategic Alibaba Sourcing & Procurement Specialist
description:
We are looking for an experienced Sourcing & Procurement Specialist to handle our supply chain operations on Alibaba. Your main goal is to find the best manufacturers, negotiate the best possible terms, and ensure that every product that leaves China meets our high-quality standards.



You will report directly to our Operations Manager and work closely with the CEO.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Supplier Vetting: Identify and verify manufacturers on Alibaba (avoiding trading companies/middlemen).



Negotiation: Negotiate pricing, MOQs (Minimum Order Quantities), and payment terms (aiming for 30/70 splits via Trade Assurance).



Sample Management: Coordinate sample production and shipping to ensure they meet specifications.



Quality Control: Arrange third-party inspections and ensure all production issues are fixed before final payment.



Logistics Coordination: Work with freight forwarders to ensure timely delivery and correct documentation.



Required Qualifications:



Min 2-3 years of experience specifically in Alibaba sourcing for international markets.



Expertise in Trade Assurance, Incoterms (EXW, FOB, DDP), and factory audits.



Deep understanding of Quality Control (QC) processes.



Strong negotiation skills – you must be comfortable pushing back on suppliers to get better deals.



Highly organized with a "never trust, always verify" mindset.



Why Work With Us?



Stable, long-term full-time role.



Professional growth within a scaling e-commerce business.



Clear management structure (you will have a dedicated Operations Manager to support you).



HOW TO APPLY:



Change the subject line of your application to: "Master Sourcing Agent for Aromika".



List 3 specific "Red Flags" you look for when checking a new supplier's Alibaba profile.



Explain your process for handling a situation where a batch of 500 units has a 10?fect rate during inspection.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) explaining your biggest sourcing "win" (how you saved money or improved quality).

title: Operations Manager & HR Partner (The
description:
I am looking for a high-level Operations Manager / HR Partner in the Philippines to take full ownership of my business results. I am not looking for a Virtual Assistant who waits for instructions. I need a leader who brings solutions, manages the team, and ensures that every hire adds value to the company.



You will be the bridge between my vision and the team's execution. Your goal is to free up my time so I can focus on big-picture growth while you handle the day-to-day operations and team performance.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Team Leadership & HR: Recruit, onboard, and manage a team (including Sourcing and Communications managers). You will track their KPIs and ensure they are productive.



Operations & Supply Chain: Oversee the Alibaba sourcing process. Ensure quality control, negotiate better terms with suppliers, and manage procurement timelines.



Project Management: Drive the development of e-commerce projects, website content updates, and the creation of professional product catalogs.



Strategic Reporting: Provide weekly reports on business performance, team efficiency, and project status.



Required Qualifications:



Proven experience as an Operations Manager, Project Manager, or Team Lead.



Deep understanding of Alibaba sourcing and supply chain management.



Experience in E-commerce (website content management, catalog creation, digital sales flow).



Expert level in project management tools (Asana, ClickUp, or Trello).



Ability to make decisions independently and "manage up" (tell me what needs to be done, don't just ask).



Excellent English communication skills (written and verbal).



Why Work With Us?



Long-term, stable full-time position.



Performance-based bonuses (We reward results, not just hours).



Direct communication with the CEO.



Opportunity to help build and scale a business from the ground up.





HOW TO APPLY (Follow these instructions strictly):



Change the subject line of your application to: "I am the Leader you need for Aromika.



Briefly describe a situation where you managed a team and solved a major problem without the owner’s help.



Include a link to your Loom video (max 2 minutes) introducing yourself and explaining why you are an "A-Player" Manager, not just a VA.

title: Business Development Manager / Operations Architect (KPI & Team Building)
description:
Job Title: Business Development & Operations Architect (KPIs + Hiring + Systems)

The Mission:

We are a growing company with a clear vision, but we need a System Builder to create the internal engine. I am looking for a right-hand person who doesn’t just "manage" tasks but designs the organizational structure, sets the metrics for success, and hires the talent to execute it.



Your Core Responsibilities:



Organizational Design: Audit our current workflow and build a scalable team hierarchy.



KPI Management: Define, implement, and track Key Performance Indicators (KPIs) for every department to ensure accountability.



Talent Acquisition: Identify gaps in our team, write job descriptions, and lead the recruitment process to hire A-players.



SOP Creation: Build a library of Standard Operating Procedures so the business can run without constant supervision.



Who You Are:



You have a proven track record of building company structures or scaling departments.



You are data-driven—you believe that if it’s not measured, it’s not managed.



You are an expert recruiter who can spot talent and culture-fit from a mile away.



You have high-level English skills and a "builder" mentality (you find solutions, not excuses).



?? PRE-INTERVIEW TEST (Follow these steps or your application will be ignored):

To ensure you have the attention to detail required for this role, please follow these instructions exactly:



Subject Line: Change your application subject to: "SYSTEM ARCHITECT - [Your Years of Management Experience]" (e.g., SYSTEM ARCHITECT - 5 Years).



The Question: In your cover letter, answer this: "If a department is underperforming, what are the first 3 metrics (KPIs) you would check to find the root cause?"



The Video: Record a 60-90 second Loom video introducing yourself and describing one specific team or system you built from scratch. (Paste the link in your application).



Tools: List the top 3 software tools you use to manage team performance and tasks.



Why Join Us?



Full-time, long-term remote position.



High level of autonomy—you design the systems.



Competitive salary based on experience and results.

title: Real Estate Lead Generation Specialist
description:

Job Title: Real Estate Lead Generation Specialist – Social Media Outreach

Type: Full-Time

Hours: 40 hrs/week

Location: Remote

Time Zone: EST

Start Date: Immediate (within 1 week)



About Us



We are a fast-growing U.S.-based real estate investment company focused exclusively on acquiring and expanding our portfolio of investment properties.



Our main goal is to connect with property owners and sellers who have off-market properties for sale.



What You’ll Be Doing (Daily)

Core Responsibilities:

? Join 30+
 and

, LinkedIn, Instagram, TikTok).

title: Real Estate Data Research VA
description:
Please review this job post completely before applying.



Job Title: Real Estate Research & Data Analyst (Virtual Assistant)

Type: Full-Time, Long-Term

Hours: 40 hrs/week (EST)

Location: Remote

Start Date: Immediate (within 7 days)



About the Role



We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company actively acquiring off-market properties. We are looking for a Data Research Specialist to support our acquisitions team by cleaning, organizing, and preparing property data.



This is not a cold calling, marketing, or underwriting role. You will be working with data only — following instructions to identify qualified leads, maintain clean records, and provide accurate updates inside our systems.



If you’re detail-oriented, comfortable with large datasets, and confident in Excel and CRM work, this is a great long-term role for you.



What You’ll Do



? Organize and clean property records inside our CRM (REISift)

? Review and filter property data based on criteria we provide

? Upload/download lists from sources such as Zillow, PropStream, PropWire, and MLS (Jacksonville, FL)

? Use Excel/Google Sheets to clean and format bulk data sets

? Convert property reports from PDF to Excel using Tabula

? Flag qualified leads for the acquisitions team according to instructions

? Maintain accurate, consistent records and prepare weekly summaries of work completed



Must-Have Skills



? 2+ years working in real estate data research, list management, or related role

? Strong working knowledge of Zillow, MLS, REISift, PropStream, and PropWire

? Advanced Excel/Google Sheets skills (downloading, uploading, cleaning datasets, using formulas)

? Experience with PDF-to-Excel conversion tools (Tabula or similar)

? Detail-oriented and consistent — accuracy in data cleaning is critical

? Reliable computer and high-speed internet setup for daily full-time work

? Good written English for reporting and notes



Bonus Points



? Experience supporting U.S. real estate investment teams

? Familiarity with skip tracing workflows

? CRM experience (REISift preferred)

? Ability to handle large data sets without errors



Why Work With Us



? Stable, long-term role with consistent hours

? Professional U.S. real estate investment team

? Clear systems and instructions to follow

? Opportunity to grow into higher-level roles as the company expands



How to Apply (Read Carefully)



We do not accept direct applications on OnlineJobs.ph.



Apply only using this link:


/1uMRkxneOR1Kn0C3UdI9_6A1avdy



Only applications submitted via the above form will be reviewed.

title: Video Editor Long Form and Short Form
description:
YouTube Video Editor (Long-Form + Shorts)



We are hiring a motivated video editor to join our growing YouTube channels and Social Media.



This role is ideal for someone young, hungry, and excited to build a career in the creator industry.



You will edit:



• YouTube vlog videos

• educational content

• entertaining content

• YouTube Shorts / TikTok style clips

• Clipping Long form into short form

• Video Podcast







Our editing style is fast-paced, energetic, and engaging.



We love:



• high energy music

• creative transitions

• funny 
nts

• emotional storytelling

• strong pacing



We are not looking for slow cinematic edits.



Pay Structure:

Long-form YouTube video (8–15 min)

$30 per video



Short-form video (YouTube Shorts)

$5 per video



Quarterly performance bonuses!



Flexible schedule. Work from anywhere.







Requirements:



You must:



• be fluent in English

• understand YouTube pacing

• edit in CapCut, Adobe Premiere, or DaVinci Resolve

• know basic color grading and audio leveling

• be able to work with 4K footage



Bonus Skills



• 
 editing

• captions

• motion graphics

• YouTube storytelling



We Are Looking For Someone Who



• is motivated and competitive

• wants to improve their editing skills

• takes initiative

• communicates clearly

• wants to grow with a YouTube channel



Typical Weekly Output

You may edit:



• 2–3 long-form YouTube videos per week

• 10–15 YouTube Shorts

Volume will vary depending on filming schedule.

Flexible hours — work anytime.



Our Workflow

We typically use:

• Google Drive for footage

• shared folders for projects

• CapCut / Premiere / DaVinci

• 4K footage



You will receive:

• raw footage

• music suggestions

• editing notes when needed





Growth Opportunities

As the channel grows, editors may have opportunities to:

• edit more videos

• receive higher rates

• help shape the creative direction

• become a lead editor

We value people who want to grow with the channel.





Application Process



Fill out this google form: 
/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSfXRjBdqEdXPQScyYF08MR8Oeli12YuSqrgNRMDtD-WhIKWjg/viewform?usp=header and in the last box be sure to include your favorite food.



Qualified applicants will complete a paid test edit

title: Buyer Relations VA (BR-VA) | Remote | $1,500/mo + Commission
description:
INS Home Buyers — Buyer Relations VA (BR-VA) | Remote | $1,500/mo + Commission*



*About the Role*

INS Home Buyers is a fast-growing real estate investment company specializing in cash deals and novations. We're looking for a sharp, experienced Buyer Relations VA to be the dedicated point of contact between our buyers and our dispo team. This is a relationship-driven role — you'll be the person keeping deals moving, buyers informed, and our pipeline clean.



*What You'll Be Doing*

•? ?Check in with assigned buyers 1–2x per week to ensure deals in the pipeline are on track and buyers are satisfied

•? ?Act as the bridge between buyers and the dispo owner — flag any issues, escalate when needed, and ensure nothing falls through the cracks

•? ?Conduct outbound calls for active cash deals — building rapport, qualifying interest, and moving deals forward

•? ?Maintain organized, up-to-date records of buyer interactions and deal status

•? ?Support the dispo team across both cash and novation deal types

•? ?Communicate proactively — you don't wait for problems to come to you



*What We're Looking For*

•? ?Proven experience as a VA or sales representative in real estate — wholesaling experience is a strong plus

•? ?Familiarity with cash deals and/or novation deal structures

•? ?Excellent spoken and written English — confident on the phone and professional over text/email

•? ?Strong relationship management skills — buyers should feel like they have a dedicated point of contact, not just a random caller

•? ?Highly organized, self-managed, and accountable — this is a remote role with real responsibility

•? ?CRM experience and ability to keep detailed notes on every buyer interaction

•? ?Commission-motivated — you want to earn more by performing better



*Schedule*

Monday-Saturday | Days off: Sunday



*Compensation*

$1,500/month base + performance-based commission





To Apply:

 

Subject: Buyer Relations VA



To be considered, please submit:



- a short voice or video introduction (1–2 min),

- your resume, and a brief summary of your real estate VA experience.



Applications without a voice/video intro will not be reviewed. We move fast — qualified candidates will be contacted within 48 hours.

title: Commercial Lines Virtual Assistant (COIs & ACORD Processing)
description:
We are seeking an experienced Commercial Lines Virtual Assistant to support our Property & Casualty team with back-end policy servicing and processing. This role focuses on Certificates of Insurance (COIs), ACORD forms (125, 126, 130, 131, 140, 147, 160), supplemental applications, and carrier documentation. There is no client-facing phone support.



The ideal candidate is detail-oriented, highly organized, and experienced in commercial lines processing within an independent agency.



Position Details

Job Type: Full-Time

Hours: 40 per week

Pay: Bi-weekly

Time Off: 10 PTO days per year



Qualifications

Experience in Commercial Lines insurance processing within an independent agency

Knowledge of ACORD forms and supplemental applications

Experience issuing and reviewing Certificates of Insurance (COIs)

Detail-oriented with strong written communication skills

Proficient in agency management systems (Applied, AMS360, EPIC, etc.)

Able to manage high-volume workloads efficiently

Self-motivated and comfortable working independently in a remote environment



How to Apply



Experience Required – Only Apply If Qualified



Candidates must have relevant commercial lines experience to be considered. Do not apply if you lack experience.



When submitting your resume, please write “Amazing” in the subject line.



Thank you so much!

title: A/B Testing Specialist
description:
We’re looking for an experienced A/B Testing & Conversion Rate Optimization (CRO) Specialist to help us scale our e-commerce brands through data-driven experimentation.



You’ll be responsible for planning, executing, and analyzing A/B tests across landing pages, product pages, offers, creatives, and funnels — turning insights into clear, actionable improvements.



Experience in the beauty or skincare niche is a strong bonus.



What You’ll Do

Design and run A/B and multivariate tests across:

Product pages (PDPs)

Landing pages

Funnels & checkout flows

Offers, pricing, and bundles

Copy, layouts, and UX elements

Develop clear test hypotheses based on data, user behavior, and psychology

Analyze results and translate data into clear recommendations

Prioritize tests based on potential impact and effort

Collaborate with design, marketing, and content teams

Continuously improve conversion rates, AOV, and revenue



What We’re Looking For:

Proven experience running high-volume A/B tests for e-commerce brands

Strong understanding of CRO, user behavior, and conversion psychology

Hands-on experience with A/B testing and analytics tools (e.g. GA4, Hotjar, VWO, Convert, Optimizely, or similar)

Ability to explain results clearly — not just the numbers, but the why

Detail-oriented, structured, and highly analytical

Self-driven and comfortable owning experiments end-to-end



Nice to Have (Bonus):

Experience in beauty, skincare, or wellness e-commerce

Experience using Intelligems (pricing tests, offers, bundles, subscriptions)

Familiarity with Shopify ecosystems

Experience optimizing for Meta Ads / TikTok traffic

Understanding of subscription models and bundles

Experience working with UGC-driven funnels



Please send us your portfolio link when you apply.



Thanks!

title: Online Sales Assistant
description:
Online Sales Chat Representative – Full Time | Age $3/ph Base Salary + 3% Commission Pay with The Best Additional Performance Incentives/Bonuses [ ONLY APPLY IF YOUR AGED BETWEEN 18 - 24 ]



Are you a young, driven, fast learner with strong English skills eager to and a natural talent for building relationships? Do you enjoy working in sales and helping people make confident buying decisions? If so, we want you on our team!

We’re hiring Online Sales Chat Representatives to engage with customers through live chat, build rapport, and close sales using our proven (and easy-to-learn) system. You’ll be trained to recognize key buyer behaviors that help us close sales faster and more efficiently.



What You Get:



- Guaranteed $3% per hour base salary with 3% Commission triggered on all sales you make – No cap on earnings. The more you sell, the more you earn.

- Performance-Based Bonuses – Meaning extra rewards and top tier earnings available for you high achievers!

- Full-Time, Long-Term Role – Secure consistent work organised with our SMART SHIFT SETUP that allow you to experience BIG EARNINGS while enjoying your quality TIME OFF.

- On the Job Training – We teach you our unique, high-converting sales system.

- Supportive Team – You’ll never feel like just a number. We invest in your success.



What We’re Looking For



We’re not just hiring chat agents. We’re looking for quick learners who can master our system and spot patterns in customer behavior to close more deals. You’ll need:

- Excellent written English and strong grammar and quick type speed.

- High emotional intelligence and ability to build trust fast.

Your Daily Tasks:

title: Accountant
description:
About Us

We are a growing U.S.-based structural engineering company that has built our success on the incredible talent we've found here on OnlineJobs.ph. We currently have four amazing full-time Filipino tea
mbers who have been with us long-term, and we're looking to add a strategic accounting leader to become our fifth core tea
mber.



We don't recruit anywhere else—this platform has consistently delivered exceptional professionals who’ve become integral to our company culture. We value loyalty, growth, and treating our team like family.



The Opportunity

This isn't just a bookkeeping job. We're looking for an experienced accountant who can architect and run our entire accounting function from scratch, then potentially grow into a leadership role managing bookkeepers and accountants for multiple small businesses in our network.



Phase 1 (Months 1-6): Build the foundation

Phase 2 (6+ months): Scale into an Accounting Department Manager role with direct reports



What You’ll Do

Immediate Priorities:



Set up and manage our complete accounting system (QuickBooks Online/Xero) from the ground up

Handle full-cycle bookkeeping: AP/AR, payroll (4 Filipino employees + 1 U.S.), reconciliations, and month/year-end close

Ensure U.S. tax compliance and work with our U.S. CPA for annual filings

Create financial reports, cash flow projections, and job costing specific to engineering projects

Implement efficient processes, automation, and internal controls

Growth Track (6+ months):



Hire, train, and manage a team of bookkeepers/accountants

Potentially manage accounting for 2-3 additional small business clients

Develop standardized accounting SOPs and quality control systems

Act as Finance Director/Controller advising on business decisions

Who You Are

Must-Haves:



5+ years of accounting experience (public accounting or industry experience preferred)

Expert-level QuickBooks Online or Xero proficiency

Experience with U.S. accounting standards and small business tax requirements

Proven track record of building or reorganizing accounting systems (not just maintaining them)

Leadership mindset—you're comfortable making decisions and eventually managing others

Excellent English communication (written and verbal) for client and CPA interactions

Reliable high-speed internet and backup power

Nice-to-Haves:



Experience with engineering/construction industry accounting (job costing, progress billing)

Payroll processing experience (Gusto, ADP, or similar)

Previous experience managing remote teams

CPA or equivalent certification (not required but valued)

Why Join Us?

Real Career Growth: Start as our accounting lead, grow into a department manager. We want someone who sees this as their long-term career home.

Stability: We're established, profitable, and committed to our Filipino team. Our current tea
mbers have been with us for [X years—insert your actual tenure].

Autonomy: You'll own the accounting function. No micromanaging—we hire experts and trust them to do their jobs.

Competitive Compensation: Above-market salary for the Philippines (range: PHP [insert range] depending on experience) + annual performance bonuses

Benefits: Paid vacation, Philippine holidays off, flexible scheduling, and professional development budget for certifications

Culture: We’re a tight-knit team that respects work-life balance. You’re not a "vendor"—you’re a valued tea
mber.

To Apply

Please send your application with the subject line: "Accounting Architect – [Your Name]"



Include:



Your updated resume/CV

A brief video intro (2-3 mins) telling us about a time you improved or built an accounting system from scratch

Your expected monthly salary range

Answer this question: "If you were to join us, what would be the first three things you'd implement in our accounting department?"

Note: We value attention to detail. Please mention the word "blueprint" somewhere in your application so we know you read the entire post.



We’re excited to meet the person who will help us build the financial backbone of our company. If you’re looking for a stable, long-term role where you can truly make your mark and grow into a leadership position, we want to hear from you.



Only applicants through OnlineJobs.ph will be considered. We look forward to welcoming you to our team!

title: Social Media Operator — Earn $1,500-$2,000+/month — Base + 15% Commission on Every Sale You Generate
description:
???? THIS IS NOT A NORMAL VA JOB. This is a performance-based role where the harder you work, the more you earn.

We're a fast-growing e-commerce company doing $250K+/month. We need someone to build and run social media accounts that drive traffic and sales to our store.

Base salary: $400-$600/month

Commission: 15% of every sale that comes from YOUR accounts and content

Top performers will earn $1,500-$2,000+/month total

The math is simple: if your content drives $10,000 in sales this month, you earn $1,500 commission on top of your base. The more accounts you run, the more content you post, the more you earn. No cap.



WHAT YOU'LL DO:

You'll create and run social media accounts across multiple platforms. You post content every day that drives people to buy on our store. Every sale tracked back to your content = you earn 15%.

Platforms:



TikTok — short faceless videos (no face needed, text + stock footage + AI voiceover)

Instagram — carousels, reels, theme pages

YouTube Shorts — same faceless videos repurposed

Pinterest — pins, boards, SEO-optimized

Reddit — helpful posts and answers in relevant communities

Quora — answers to questions people ask about social media growth

/X — threads and posts

Medium — articles that rank on Google



Your daily work:



Create 10-20 pieces of content per day using Canva, CapCut, and AI tools

Post across all your accounts — target: 30-50 posts per day total

Create and manage multiple accounts per platform, in different languages (we'll provide translation tools and AI)

Engage with comments, answer DMs, interact with other accounts to grow yours

Track every link with UTM codes so we can see exactly which sales come from you

If an account gets banned, create a new one and keep going



Content examples (we'll provide templates):



Carousels: "5 ways to grow your Instagram fast"

Short videos: screen recording showing follower growth + AI voiceover explaining how

Reddit posts: "I tested a growth service, here's my honest review" (genuine, helpful, not spammy)

Pinterest pins: "Instagram Growth Tips 2026" linking to our site

Articles: "How to get 10K followers on Instagram in 2026"





NO EXPERIENCE REQUIRED. Here's what matters:



You're hungry and want to earn more than a normal VA salary

You're willing to learn — we'll teach you everything (Canva, CapCut, AI tools, posting strategies)

You're fast — you can produce content quickly once you learn the system

You're consistent — you post every single day, no exceptions

You're resilient — accounts get banned sometimes, you don't panic, you rebuild

You're organized — you'll manage many accounts and you can't lose track

You're comfortable with basic technology — if you can use a phone and a laptop, you can do this

You have a reliable internet connection and a computer



Bonus (not required but nice):



You've used Canva before

You've managed social media accounts (even your own personal ones count)

You speak multiple languages

You've done any kind of online marketing





HOW THE COMMISSION WORKS:

Every account you create gets a unique tracking link (we set this up for you). When someone clicks your link and buys on our store, the sale is tracked to you. You earn 15% of that sale.

Real examples of what you can earn:



You post a TikTok that gets 50K views ? 200 people click ? 20 people buy ? average order $60 ? $1,200 in sales ? you earn $180 from one video

You write a Reddit post that ranks on Google ? it drives 10 sales per week ? $600/week in sales ? you earn $90/week from one post forever

You run 10 Pinterest boards driving 5 sales per day ? $300/day in sales ? you earn $45/day = $1,350/month just from Pinterest

You post a carousel on Instagram that goes semi-viral ? 30 sales over a month ? $1,800 in sales ? you earn $270 from one carousel



The more accounts and content you create, the more passive income you build. Old posts keep driving sales weeks and months after you publish them. Your income compounds over time.

Monthly earning potential:



Month 1 (learning): $
base + $
commission = $600-$1,100

Month 2-3 (ramping up): $
base + $800-$1,500 commission = $1,200-$2,100

Month 4+ (full speed): $
base + $1,500-$3,000+ commission = $1,900-$3,600+





TOOLS WE'LL PROVIDE / TEACH YOU:



Canva Pro (free for you) — create carousels, pins, thumbnails

CapCut (free) — edit short videos

ChatGPT / AI tools — generate content ideas, write captions, translate to any language

ElevenLabs — AI voiceover in any language (no need to record your voice)

Residential proxies — to post from different countries safely

Tracking system — so every sale you generate is tracked and credited to you

Templates — we give you proven content templates that work, you just adapt them

Training — first week is fully guided, we show you exactly how to do everything





YOUR KPIS:



Content posted per day: minimum 30 across all platforms

Accounts active: maintain as many as possible (more accounts = more traffic = more commission)

Sales tracked to your content per week: this directly determines your bonus

Daily report in Slack: what you posted, on which accounts, how many clicks/views, any accounts banned/created





DAILY ROUTINE:



9:00-11:00 — Batch create content: carousels in Canva, short videos in CapCut, write Reddit/Quora posts using AI

11:00-13:00 — Post everything across all accounts (TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest, Reddit)

13:00-14:00 — Engage: reply to comments, answer DMs, interact with other accounts

14:00-15:30 — Create and post more content (Pinterest pins,
 threads, Quora answers)

15:30-16:00 — Account maintenance: check for bans, create new accounts if needed

16:00-16:30 — Track performance: check which posts are getting views/clicks, note what's working

16:30-17:00 — Daily report in Slack

title: AI Video Generator (Sora/Veo)
description:
AI Video Creator (Sora + Voice Over AI)



Company: Scale Prediction

Position: Full-Time

Hours: 9 AM – 5 PM EST

Pay: $4 – $6/hour (based on experience)



About Us



Scale Prediction is a B2B marketing and lead generation company that helps blue-collar service businesses (painting companies, cabinet refinishers, roofing companies, etc.) generate qualified estimates through high-performing advertising systems.



We produce a large volume of advertising creatives and are looking for a skilled AI video creator who can generate high-quality AI video ads using tools like Sora, VO AI generators, and advanced prompting techniques.



Role Overview



Your primary responsibility will be creating AI-generated video ads used in paid advertising campaigns.



You must have a strong understanding of prompt engineering, scripting, and AI creative tools to consistently produce engaging, high-converting videos.



Responsibilities



Generate AI video content using Sora or similar AI video tools

Create AI voiceovers using VO generation tools

Write and structure scripts using Claude or similar AI writing tools

Develop strong prompts to produce high-quality visuals

Turn ad scripts into fully finished video footage

Optimize visuals and voiceover pacing for advertising





Required Skills



You must have prior experience with:

Sora or AI video generation tools

AI voiceover tools

Prompt engineering

Claude or similar AI scripting tools

Creating short-form advertising content

Google Drive organization and file delivery



You should also:

Be detail-oriented

Understand ad creative structure

Be able to produce content efficiently

Work well within a team environment



Work Schedule



Full-time

9 AM – 5 PM EST

Remote position



How to Apply

To apply, please include the following:



A Google Drive link showing examples of AI videos you have created

A short explanation of the AI tools you use

Your experience with Sora, voiceover AI, and prompt engineering



?? Important:

To confirm you read this entire job post, start your application with the word “Apple.”

Applications that do not include “Apple” or a Google Drive portfolio will not be reviewed.
